Name: Cushman & Wakefield - Formerly DTZ
Description:
Cushman & Wakefield is a global leader in commercial real estate services, helping clients transform the way people work, shop, and live. The firm’s 43,000 employees in more than 60 countries provides deep local and global insights that create significant value for occupiers and investors around the world. Cushman &
Wakefield is among the largest commercial real estate services firms with revenues of $5 billion across core 
services of agency leasing, asset services, capital markets, facility services (branded C&W Services), global 
occupier services, investment management (branded DTZ Investors), project & development services, tenant 
representation and valuation & advisory.

Name: 315Work Avenue
Description: 315Work Avenue ( A Nestavera Venture ) is a new age and rapidly growing co-working space provider that focuses on enterprise solutions. We aim to create vibrant auto-pilot ecosystem for employers and inspirational community work spaces that fosters innovation. Its design-driven workspaces and best-in-class services and amenities instill a sense of pride in its customers and empower the work community to be their best each day. The work space encourage community engagement of similar-minded individuals from any space – they may be investors, freelancers, founders or professionals who just want to focus work without getting distracted about running the office.

Name: Dalian Wanda Group
Description: Dalian Wanda Group, ranked #380 on the 2017 Fortune 500 list, was established in 1988 and has developed into a conglomerate of commercial management, culture, real estate and investment. Endeavoring to become a model in corporate social responsibility, we are the only company to have received the China Charity Award 9 times. Wanda is ambitious in its vision, demanding only the highest workplace standards, and striving to create a masterpiece with each one of its projects. We are also one of China's pioneer advocates in sustainable development.

Name: Irvine Company Office
Description:
We create places that bring people together to succeed. Our expert teams, uniquely flexible leasing model, and experience-driven amenities ensure our 3,000+ customers achieve more, every day. As a forever owner, we invest and reinvest in our 150+ workplaces so what’s exceptional today is even better tomorrow

We invest in our talented team with mentorship, training and an exceptional employee experience. United by our shared values and purpose, we’re building the future of work together.

Name: KingSett Capital
Description: KingSett Capital is a Canadian private equity real estate investment business which creates and co-invests in real estate investment solutions to deliver sustainable premium risk weighted returns. KingSett manages $18 billion in assets across its Growth, Income, Urban, Mortgage, Residential Development and Affordable Housing strategies.

Name: Ascencia Ltd
Description:
Ascencia, one of the top 10 listed companies on the Stock Exchange of Mauritius, stands as the leading retail property player in Mauritius.

With a portfolio of seven strategically located malls, namely Bagatelle Mall, Phoenix Mall, Riche Terre Mall, Bo'Valon Mall, So'flo, Kendra, and Les Allées, Ascencia is synonymous with creating singular shopping and leisure destinations that prioritise accessibility, sustainability, comfort and engagement for visitors and retailers alike.

Name: SYN
Description:
Somos a SYN, uma empresa referência no mercado imobiliário comercial brasileiro. Nosso compromisso é oferecer soluções de alta qualidade para nossos clientes, garantindo que cada ambiente colabore para o sucesso de seus negócios.

Atuamos em diversos segmentos do mercado imobiliário, como shoppings, edifícios comerciais e galpões, com um portfólio que abrange locação, administração, compra e venda de imóveis comerciais.

Em tudo o que fazemos, entregamos um atendimento personalizado e eficiente, sempre focados em facilitar a vida de nossos clientes.

Nosso time é composto por profissionais com grande experiência, autonomia e talento. Juntos, atuamos para atingir nosso propósito de integrar pessoas e espaços, criando ambientes que geram experiências incríveis.

Name: Landmark
Description:
At Landmark, we understand that great businesses need great places to work. And we know this isn’t just about bricks and mortar, furniture and technology. It’s about creating a professional experience that reflects your success, and a place you can call home. 

Our approach is to blend new ways of working with a business class experience. So we offer stunning communal spaces and inspiring design, alongside smartly presented, professional teams. 

We’re proud of our workspaces – and we know you will be too.

Our products include Private Offices, Meeting Rooms, Virtual Offices and Coworking Memberships so you can work however best suits you. 

For more information visit our website.

Name: Cassidy Turley
Description: DTZ is a global leader in commercial real estate services providing occupiers, tenants and investors around the world with a full spectrum of property solutions. Our core capabilities include agency leasing, tenant representation, corporate and global occupier services, property management, facilities management, facilities services, capital markets, investment and asset management, valuation, building consultancy, research, consulting, and project and development management. DTZ manages 3.3 billion square feet and $63 billion in transaction volume globally on behalf of institutional, corporate, government and private clients. Our more than 28,000 employees operate across more than 260 offices in more than 50 countries and proudly represent DTZ’s culture of excellence, client advocacy, integrity and collaboration.

Name: Amdec Group
Description:
Amdec is a privately owned property development, investment and project management group, with an established reputation as South Africa’s leading developer of new urban lifestyle solutions. Founded in 1989, the company is active in all sectors of the property industry with a national footprint to match its significant industry experience and brand development ethos.

Amdec’s current property portfolio places the company among the country’s biggest private property developers. The company’s outstanding growth may be attributed to a solid foundation of superior service, consistently high building standards and on-time delivery. These qualities underpin a focus on building brand equity and retaining industry leadership by creating innovative new urban spaces that embrace the foremost international trends.

Name: Arch-Con Corporation
Description:
Arch-Con Corporation is a national commercial general contractor founded in 2000 with offices in Houston, Dallas and Austin. 

Arch-Con’s award-winning team simplifies the construction process using the latest cost-efficient technologies to stay on the cutting edge of the industry. With experts in the construction of office, industrial, retail, hospitality, corporate interiors, healthcare, multifamily and community developments, we make construction easy. Learn more at www.arch-con.com.

Name: Azzam
Description:
Azzam es una sociedad gestora de patrimonio inmobiliario, parte del Grupo Azora, especializada en la prestación de servicios globales a vehículos de inversión (Property Management).

Actualmente gestiona activos inmobiliarios por valor de más de 1.850 millones de euros, gestionando un total de 13.000 viviendas, repartidas por toda España.

Azzam cuenta con un gran equipo humano: más de 150 profesionales expertos en la gestión integral de patrimonio inmobiliario.

Name: Commercial Real Estate Australia
Description:
Commercial Real Estate provides commercial property seekers access to comprehensive sale and lease listings.

We offer an integrated mix of media advertising solutions that spans online, print and mobile that is tailored for the Australian commercial property industry. Our solutions also provide national reach and visibility across premium publications including The Australian Financial Review, The Sydney Morning Herald and The Age. We give clients access to audiences that matter and provide expert commentary on the latest news, trends and commercial property insights. 

Keep up to date with the latest commercial property news delivered daily into your inbox - commercialrealestate.com.au/newsletters

Name: Pacific Retail Capital Partners
Description:
Evolving Real Estate for the Next Generation

Establishing mixed-use and community-centric places and spaces that enrich lives and create value.

Pacific Retail Capital Partners (PRCP) is one of the nation’s premier real estate investment groups of large format retail-led properties, with more than $3 billion in assets under management in the United States. Based in Southern California, PRCP strategically manages over 20 million square feet of regional, open-air lifestyle and mixed-use centers. With a proven track record of evolving and repositioning retail-led properties with a keen focus on unlocking the value and enhancing the quality of its growing portfolio, PRCP is dedicated to creating a unique and strategic vision for each property and exceeding the highest expectations of investors, retailers, and consumers.

Name: Edamah (Bahrain Real Estate Investment)
Description: Edamah (Bahrain Real Estate Investment Company) is the real-estate arm of the sovereign wealth fund of the Kingdom of Bahrain. Incorporated in 2006 to manage and expand an assorted portfolio of real-estate in Bahrain, Edamah has established itself as one of the Kingdom’s leading property developers. With an unwavering commitment to its founding principles of quality, efficiency and sustainability, and in line with the highest standards of transparency and corporate governance, Edamah strives to transform the Kingdom’s diverse and dynamic property sector. Edamah’s portfolio will also include projects in the leisure and entertainment and industrial sectors.

Name: COPT Defense Properties
Description: COPT Defense Properties owns, manages, leases, develops, and acquires mission critical properties. We are the preeminent provider of real estate services to the U.S. Government and Defense/IT contractors, with buildings and developable land adjacent/proximate to hi-tech and cybersecurity-oriented USG defense installations executing priority missions. An S&P 400 company, our shares are listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CDP.

Name: MCube Financial LLC
Description:
MCube Financial LLC is an international boutique consulting firm focused on providing advisory and consulting services to the commercial real estate industry. Our senior leadership team has over one hundred years of combined real estate experience across all property types, at all levels of the capital stack, as both principal and lender. 

 In addition to substantial underwriting, advisory and due diligence knowledge, the team brings a wealth of real estate servicing and work-out experience. With the capability to provide solutions to complex, large scale problems posing significant time and resource constraints, MCube partners with clients to develop long term relationships that add value across their organizations. 

 With offices in the US and India, MCube provides a broad talent base across time zones and the ability to provide scale and flexibility to clients around the world. Whether underwriting individual or pooled assets for a US based CMBS or balance sheet lender, underwriting a trophy US property for a Singaporean financial institution or re-underwriting a large non-performing European real estate portfolio, MCube has the expertise and manpower to exceed client expectations. 

Vision:
MCube’s vision is to become the most respected provider of due diligence, advisory and valuation support services to the commercial real estate industry. We want to develop long term partnerships with our clients by offering innovative and cost effective solutions to their most pressing problems. MCube services are based on values of honesty, integrity and consistency, and treating its clients and employees with dignity and respect.


Our client base is global and includes-
* Real Estate Lenders
* Institutional Investors
* Developers
* Brokers
* Borrowers
* Servicers

Client Services:
Loan Sizing, Full Underwriting, Asset Summary Reports, Cash Flow Modeling (ARGUS), Lease and Loan Abstracts, Site Inspections, Financial Modeling, B-piece Due Diligence

Name: Dermody
Description: Dermody is a privately-owned real estate investment, development and management firm that specializes in the acquisition and development of logistics real estate in strategic locations for e-commerce fulfillment centers, third-party logistics and distribution customers. Founded in 1960, Dermody has invested more than $10 billion of total capital across all platforms nationwide, having acquired and developed approximately 110 million square feet of logistics and industrial facilities. In addition to its corporate office in Reno, Nev., it has regional offices in northern and southern California, Atlanta, Phoenix, Seattle, Chicago, Dallas, Indianapolis and New Jersey. For more information, visit www.Dermody.com.

Name: NewQuest
Description: Established in 2001, NewQuest is a privately held, full-service commercial real estate firm specializing in development, land brokerage, leasing, tenant representation, investment sales, and property management. Headquartered in Houston, our portfolio comprises over 100 retail and mixed-use projects valued at more than $2.3 billion. We oversee leasing for more than 12 million square feet of commercial space across Texas, Louisiana, Arizona, Georgia, and other key markets nationwide. NewQuest has been consistently recognized as one of Houston Business Journal’s Best Places to Work.

Name: Vail Williams
Description:
Vail Williams are a team of property specialists with over 30 years of experience and a wealth of high quality clients.

Our large, flexible and mobile team have both ‘Commercial’ and ‘Residential’ expertise in all property disciplines across 6 main regions. We find that local knowledge is a definite strength but we are equally able to flex our muscles by combining experts from different disciplines and regions to provide multi region or national advice of the highest order.

We understand that your property needs as a Vail Williams client will vary hugely depending on whether you are an occupier, landlord, owner, investor, developer or professional referrer. We have expertise in pretty much every business area in both the private and public sectors. 
Our highly specialised teams are all tailored to ensure delivery of client objectives. They are made up of experienced individuals who concentrate on specific aspects of property, ensuring the highest quality, expert advice. We pride ourselves on our excellent reputation and high levels of client satisfaction.

Name: Blacks Business Brokers
Description:
The Number 1 Business Broker with over 60 Years of expertise in selling.

We are continually looking to improve every aspect of our business, from customer service, successful utilisation of the latest technology and the delivery of the highest quality business information.

At Blacks Business Brokers we understand there is no substitute for knowledge and experience. Our dedicated and professional team has over 60 years combined expertise in the Business brokering Sector and therefore we know the important factors in achieving results. Blacks Business Brokers aims to provide a comfortable one-to-one experience with a unique way of launching businesses on to the market. Forward thinking alongside an innovative attitude are designed to offer a professional, efficient service on a more approachable level.

Whether you are seeking to buy or sell a business, Blacks Business Brokers offer a fresh approach with a personal touch. As a seller you are able to take advantage of unmatched promotion of your business to qualified purchasers and as a buyer you receive the freshest database of business for sale with the most accurate and trustworthy detailed information.

Name: EMAREA Immobilier Entreprise El-Djazair
Description:
EMAREA IMMO ENTREPRISE est un cabinet crée en 2006, spécialisé dans la commercialisation, Vente, Achat, Location et la Prospection auprès de ses clients, entreprises Nationales et privés Algériennes et Etrangères, ainsi que les Particuliers.

Le cabinet offre une prestation de service à la carte et personnalisé pour ses clients, dans cinq segments immobilier :

Name: CANMOOR
Description: Canmoor is a private commercial property business with a proven track record for originating, implementing and delivering a wide variety of property solutions. Since its inception in 2005, Canmoor has acquired, managed, developed and sold over £5 billion of commercial property assets. Canmoor currently manages a portfolio in excess of 12,000,000 sqft with over 700 tennants across the UK.

Name: NAIOP SoCal
Description:
NAIOP, the Commercial Real Estate Development Association, is the leading organization for developers, owners and investors of office, industrial, retail and mixed-use real estate. At the national level, the organization represents more than 18,500 commercial real estate professionals who gain from unparalleled networking, trend-driven research, educational programs and powerful legislative representation.

At the local level, the chapter is the industry’s greatest ally and resource. Serving Orange and Los Angeles counties, NAIOP SoCal comprises more than 1,200 members making it the leading commercial real estate trade association in Southern California.

NAIOP SoCal Chapter’s mission is to provide a unified voice to protect and enhance the commercial real estate industry and quality of life in Southern California. This is accomplished through proactive involvement in public policy, superior educational programs and interactive business relationship opportunities.

Membership in as well as sponsorship of NAIOP SoCal is the best return on investment you can make in your commercial real estate career and business. Contact us for more information.

Name: RECAM Solutions
Description:
RECAM Solutions is a trusted partner for end-to-end Commercial Real Estate (CRE) lease management services. We specialise in delivering comprehensive support through Lease Abstraction, Lease Administration, Lease Translation, Lease Audits, and Contract Validation services.

We empower property managers, landlords, tenants, and enterprises with the tools and expertise needed to simplify and standardise lease processes, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and compliance across their entire portfolio.

Whether you're managing a local portfolio or navigating global leases across multiple languages, RECAM delivers reliable, cost-effective solutions tailored to your business needs. Our expert team has successfully served clients in retail, healthcare, telecom, industrial, and corporate real estate sectors.

Our strengths include:

1. Lease abstraction across 45+ languages
2. Compliance-focused lease audits
3. IND AS116-aligned lease management (India-specific)
4. Translation services for Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 languages
5. Standardised formats, high accuracy, and quick turnarounds

Leasing should be innovative, scalable, and simple. With RECAM, you gain a strategic partner committed to operational excellence, risk mitigation, and client success.

Name: Basis Investment Group, LLC ("Basis")
Description:
Basis Investment Group LLC (“Basis”) is a commercial real estate (CRE) investment manager, primarily focused on debt and structured equity strategies.  Basis originates and acquires diversified CRE debt investments across the capital stack of stabilized, transitional, and development assets throughout the United States.  Basis was founded in 2009 by Tammy K. Jones in partnership with JEMB Realty Corporation, a U.S. real estate company established over 30 years ago.  JEMB owns and manages approximately eight million square feet of commercial real estate assets. Basis is a certified Minority and Woman Owned Business.

Basis originates and invests in the following CRE debt products: 

•	Fixed rate CMBS loans and B pieces
•	Bridge loans
•	Mezzanine financing
•	Preferred equity
•	Structured equity/JV Equity
•	Distressed debt
•	FreddieMac - Small Balance Loans

Asset classes include:
•	Multifamily
•	Retail
•	Office
•	Industrial
•	Hotels (limited and full-service)
•	Senior Housing Properties
•	Self-Storage
•	Manufactured Housing Community


COMPANY HIGHLIGHTS

•	DEMONSTRATED TRACK RECORD OF SUCCESS ACROSS THE CAPITAL STACK - Since 2009, Basis has made over $2.5 billion in CRE debt and structured equity investments.  

•	EXPERIENCED TEAM - Members of the Basis Senior Management Team have been investing together for more than 15 years at Basis and prior firms.    
 
•	EXTENSIVE NETWORK OF RELATIONSHIPS - The Senior Management Team’s combined 60 + years of experience in the real estate industry fosters a broad array of industry relationships that drive an active investment pipeline.   

•	ESTABLISHED INVESTMENT PLATFORM  - Basis has a national platform with an established brand that is widely recognized across the United States.

Name: Inversiones Aliadas
Description: Somos una empresa que se dedica al desarrollo, comercialización y operación de proyectos inmobiliarios en Honduras.

Name: Block Real Estate Services, LLC
Description:
Block Real Estate Services, LLC (BRES) is a full-service commercial real estate company managing over 45 million square feet of retail, office, and industrial properties for equity partnerships and third party owners.  BRES’s portfolio of services continues its role as the most comprehensive commercial real estate firm in Kansas City by providing and specializing in: real estate brokerage services, tenant representation, investment services, asset and property management, economic incentives consultation, financial services, construction and development services, and the Block Funds. 

We continue to grow by better serving our existing clients and expanding our real estate operations into other surrounding communities. BRES is headquartered in the heart of Kansas City’s Country Club Plaza district with a regional office in St. Louis. BRES also has management offices in properties located in Overland Park and Lenexa, Kansas; Riverside and St. Louis, Missouri as well as operation offices in several of our office portfolio properties.

Name: Douglas Development Corporation
Description:
Since 1985, Douglas Development Corporation has garnered redevelopment successes in the District of Columbia, Virginia and Maryland.  The company has earned a reputation for revitalizing underdeveloped, emerging areas.

Founder and President Douglas Jemal established the company in 1985 as a private family-owned company and it has since grown into a fully integrated real estate developer with more than 100 employees.  

Between 1990-2017 the company expanded its portfolio from less than 250,000 sf to over 10 million sf expanding from 15 properties to over 250.  Its specialty is restoring and preserving mixed-use buildings with the most well-known projects located in the East End of Washington serving as catalysts for the redevelopment of the entire area.

The current portfolio is over 10 million sf and there is more than 5 million sf in the development pipeline.  Douglas Development one of the most dominant and successful real estate developers in the Washington area.

Name: EastGroup Properties Inc
Description: EastGroup Properties, Inc. is a self-administered equity real estate investment trust focused on the development, acquisition and operation of industrial properties in major Sunbelt markets throughout the United States with an emphasis in the states of Florida, Texas, Arizona, California and North Carolina. The Company’s strategy for growth is based on ownership of premier distribution facilities generally clustered near major transportation features in supply-constrained submarkets.

Name: VVA - Part of Drees & Sommer
Description: At VVA, we become an integral part of your team, serving as trusted advisors who are deeply invested in your success. Our mission is to deliver successful projects that enhance the built environment for the benefit of others by focusing meticulously on your interests and goals from start to finish. With specialized expertise across all phases—from planning to occupancy—we’re committed to delivering value that elevates every aspect of your project. We are proud to be part of Drees & Sommer, a global leader in sustainable and innovative project management for the real estate, infrastructure, and industrial markets, enhancing our ability to deliver even more value to our clients through expanded global insights and resources.

Name: Childress Klein
Description: As one of the largest real estate development, investment and management companies in the Southeast, Childress Klein has developed more than 50 million square feet of commercial real estate and owns assets valued at more than $2 billion. Guided by the highest standards, we recognize that each property and client need is unique. With more than 31 years of dedicated commercial real estate experience, backed by a team of 280 dedicated and experience professionals, we take a hands-on approach to investment, development and management by putting our client’s needs and interests first. Building upon the legacy established by Fred Klein and Don Childress, we are passionate about delivering exceptional customer service, collaborating with our clients and building relationships that last.

Name: The Student Housing Company UK
Description:
We are The Student Housing Company. We want to raise your expectations about student accommodation, service, building quality and communication.

We want students to find renting a room from us incredibly easy and we want them to feel safe, comfortable and looked after. We want their parents to have peace of mind and we want the students to recommend us to other people.

We try to make everything we do as clear and upfront as possible. From our plain speaking name to the refreshingly simple job titles on our team's badges, we want students who rent from us to understand what they're getting and who they're talking to at all times.

Our goal is to have buildings close to lots of UK universities. We want these occupied 100% of the time. We can only do this by being excellent.

Name: BOMI - Building Owners and Managers Institute
Description:
BOMI, a nonprofit educational organization founded in 1970, provides critical education and expertise to industry personnel with property, facility, and building systems management responsibilities. 

As the Building Owners and Managers Institute, BOMI delivers courses, certificate programs, and industry-standard designations—Real Property Administrator (RPA), Facilities Management Administrator (FMA), Systems Maintenance Administrator (SMA), Systems Maintenance Technician (SMT), and High-Performance Sustainable Buildings (BOMI-HP)—with a proven record of increasing job performance and company efficiency. 

More than 40,000 industry professionals hold one or more BOMI International designations, and over 90,000 property and facility management professionals have turned to BOMI for their continuing education, professional development, and staff training needs. 

To learn more, please visit www.boma.org/education/, call 1.800.235.BOMI (2664), or email service@bomi.org.

Name: V7
Description:
V7 is the most creative and forward-thinking asset and development management company you could choose to work with. We are passionate about transforming mismanaged office and industrial buildings or sites into dynamic, highly sustainable, service led workplaces.

Our core aim is to add value to buildings by repositioning them in line with the very latest workplace trends and ESG credentials.

We work with partners including institutional funds, family offices, private equity and individual investors.

We also work with owners looking to drive value though intensive asset and development management of their existing assets.

Name: Bel Air Camp
Description:
Notre mission est de réinventer de nouvelles manières de travailler pour permettre à chacun, du stagiaire au chef.fe d'entreprise, de s'épanouir sur son lieu de travail !

Nous sommes un écosystème à impact positif, ancré sur le territoire et en lien localement,

Name: Spire Property Solutions
Description:
At Spire Property Solutions, we are experts in South Africa’s commercial real estate market, offering over 25 years of industry experience. We specialize in helping businesses navigate complex property decisions, whether it's leasing or buying, with tailored solutions to fit your unique needs. Our comprehensive services cover everything from property management and leasing to investment sales and corporate real estate services. Partnering with Spire means you gain a trusted advisor who understands the market and is committed to delivering value-driven results. Let us help you make informed property decisions that drive your business forward. 

Our vision is to be South Africa’s foremost commercial real estate service provider, recognized for our leadership in sustainability, service innovation, and delivering tailored property solutions that maximize returns for our clients. Our team is composed of highly qualified property professionals with deep experience across all sectors of the real estate market. This extensive knowledge allows us to anticipate market trends and provide strategic guidance that aligns with our clients’ objectives.

Name: AGL Espacio Inmobiliario
Description:
¿Quiénes Somos?
AGL ESPACIO INMOBILIARIO es una empresa conformada por expertos en el mercado inmobiliario, con más de 15 años de experiencia, que trabajan para integrar proyectos comerciales con la mejor rentabilidad mediante una filosofía de ganar-ganar con los propietarios/vendedores, arrendadores, inversionistas y brokers.

Name: Oxford Development Company
Description:
Oxford Development Company is a premiere full-service commercial real estate firm with a solid foundation of  a 50-year history and is the largest, privately owned real estate development/services firm in Pennsylvania.  The company’s owned/managed portfolio consists of retail, office, institutional, healthcare, residential, industrial and sports and entertainment assets throughout the United States.

Oxford has the unique ability to offer an integrated package of turnkey real estate services in development, property management, project management, brokerage and leasing and investment advisory services to all commercial real estate asset classes.  Unlike companies who only focus on a single service, Oxford has the distinct advantage of leveraging its different business groups and affiliates to create customized solutions that maximize the

Oxford and its affiliates have worked with such clients as Fortune 100 Companies, over 20 national retailers, government agencies and community and nonprofit groups on its way to overseeing more than $1 billion of commercial real estate. H.J. Heinz, BNY Mellon, PNC Financial Services Group, Highmark, Inc., UPMC Health System, Pittsburgh Cultural Trust and the Sports and Exhibition Authority of Pittsburgh and Allegheny County are just a few of the companies that rely on Oxford’s commitment to quality and excellence to maximize and protect their investments.

Oxford has been involved in over 4.5 million square feet of LEED certified projects.

Name: TRASTOR Property Investments
Description:
Trastor REIC is the first real estate investment company to be established in Greece. It is listed in the Athens Stock Exchange (ATHEX) and is devoted to the acquisition and management of commercial assets. Name: Appelt Properties
Description:
Typically commercial real estate is an investment vehicle available only to very wealthy individuals, or large corporations. Offering a potent combination of profit and security, many fortunes have been forged through the acquisition of land and the development of commercial real estate properties. 

Unfortunately securing the financing for developments at this scale isn’t something most individuals can manage on their own, which is how we came into existence and where our business model takes a profound turn. We are an organization that brings together a small number of individuals who collectively are able to secure the financing to build, lease and manage first-rate developments. To date, by partnering with more than 40 individuals across Western Canada, we have developed over 300,000 square feet of commercial real estate. This shared ownership structure gives individuals access to high quality commercial investments that would’ve otherwise been out of reach. As our business advances so does health care in the developing world.

For every building Appelt Properties develops, we provide the funding for a nurse practitioner to open and run his or her own medical practice in Kenya. These sister buildings provide the people in their communities access to basic health care that would otherwise be out of reach, such as access to low-cost, high-quality essential drugs and health care services.

Name: Executive Hills Management, Inc.
Description:
Executive Hills Management, Inc. has owned and managed office buildings in the Kansas City area for over 40 years. We are the single largest owner-operator of commercial office space in the metropolitan area. The company currently owns approximately 4 million square feet of Class A office space and related parking structures. Our diversified portfolio includes property located throughout the metropolitan area.  One Kansas City Place with over 800,000 square feet is the company’s flagship property in the heart of Downtown Kansas City. The Plaza Steppes building is located on the iconic Country Club Plaza.  Over 1 million square feet of property is located along the vibrant Ward Parkway corridor, and another 1 million square feet is centrally located in South Kansas City. We own and manage another 10 office buildings all along the College Boulevard corridor of Overland Park.  
 
We pride ourselves on delivering the highest level of service to each of our tenants. Our portfolio leases to some of the finest national and locally based firms including: Evergy, Spring Venture Group, Black & Veatch, Bank of America, CBIZ, St. Luke’s Hospital System, Baker University, NBKC, Netsmart, NIC/Tyler Technologies.
 
Our broad range of tenant services allows us to offer exciting and rewarding careers to our associates in every field of property management.  We have divisions specializing in Construction Management, Engineering and Maintenance, Asset Management, Accounting and Finance, Security and Quality Control.
 
Executive Hills Management, Inc. is headquartered in Overland Park, Kansas.

Our dynamic multi-disciplinary business model of specialist departments enables us to respond promptly to clients' needs and ensures we offer them the very best advice and service.

The Specialist Services we offer:

Commercial Agency:  the sale, acquisition and letting of all types of vacant commercial property including shops, offices, factories, warehouses and open storage sites.

Business Transfer: helping business owners and aspiring business owners across Cornwall and Devon buy and sell all types of businesses including:
Hotels and Guesthouses
Holiday Cottage Complexes
Caravan Parks & Campsites
Tourism and Leisure Attractions
Pubs 
Restaurants, Cafes, Takeaways
Hair Salons, Garages, Garden Centres

Property Management: Managing everything from single stand-alone units to portfolios owned by institutions and high net worth individuals

Investment: we act on a wide range of investment opportunities around both the acquisition and disposal of all types of commercial property

Development: bespoke advice to facilitate the acquisition and disposal of commercial development projects

Valuations and Lease Advisory: highly experienced RICS Registered Valuers providing expert advice and market knowledge

Name: Noble Harris
Description:
‘’London’s Commercial Property Specialists’’
Noble Harris is a commercial property specialist in operation for over 20 years based in the heart of Central London, providing expert and bespoke advice on sales, rental and lettings of office, retail and industrial premises. Our range of property services includes estate agency, rent reviews, lease renewals, rating appeals, property management, investment, acquisition and development advice. 

Tenant Services – covering all your tenancy requirements, representing your interests - freeing your time to focus on running your business

Landlord Services – we offer access to a loyal tenant’s portfolio, making it easier for you to access reliable clients on a timely basis - helping to minimise the stress of being a landlord.

Specialist Sectors - we have a strong track record in negotiating commercial space for a number of sectors such as luxury retail, charities, education, technology and more

Building Consultancy  - we harness our expertise to support our clients on all aspects of building surveying, often working to short deadlines

Commercial Property Management - we manage your properties working to maintain productive tenant and landlord relationships whether it’s rent collection or asset management we help ease the process.

With over 100 years of combined experience, the Partners of The Noble Harris Partnership have created a well-established and well respected commercial property consultancy practice which boasts an impressive portfolio of loyal clientele. Name: Spacenow

Our vision is to create a more sustainable world (financially, socially and environmentally) by reducing the amount of underutilized space and making it more accessible to people that may be starting out in business.  By making more space available, with more flexible terms, we lower the barrier of entry for new or young businesses that need space to operate.  We remove the worry about large upfront costs for rent or fitting out a space, leaving more time for innovation and entrepreneurism.  

The space you’ll find on spacenow.com is not limited to your usual repertoire of co-working spaces, boardrooms or car parking spots - the categories of space are limited only by your imagination.

We like to refer to ourselves as being pioneers of the activated-space-economy!

Spacenow was founded in 2015.  We are headquartered in Sydney, Australia with offices opening in in Singapore and Dubai very soon. 

To learn more about how Spacenow helps people monetise underutilized space or book space visit us today at www.spacenow.com

Name: Kildedal By
Description:
Mellem det åbne land og den tætte by bygger vi Kildedal. I Kildedal har vi en bæredygtig tilgang til livet og naturen. Vi sætter fokus på fællesskabet, dyrker sundheden og inspireres af fremsynede virksomheder med vokseværk. Vi er udkanten af København, men i centrum af livet.

I Kildedal bevarer og styrker vi biodiversiteten og passer godt på naturen. Vi øger naturværdien på den gamle landbrugsjord og forbinder enge, moser og overdrev med en grøn korridor. Vi giver plads til naturen mellem husene og passer på den fredede natur rundt om. Her lever mennesker og dyr side om side.

I vores nye by bidrager vi aktivt til den grønne omstilling. Vi udleder maksimalt 8,5 kg CO2/m2/år i alle bygninger og certificerer med DGNB Guld som minimum. Vi har fyrtårnsprojekter med særligt innovative teknologier eller bæredygtige tiltag. Vi er en varieret by med materialer, der patinerer smukt og har et lavt miljøaftryk. Vi vil være en by i balance.

I Kildedal dyrker vi fællesskabet, nyder naturen og lever et sundt hverdagsliv i bevægelse. Via stiforbindelser bevæger vi os gennem bynaturen ind til bymidten. Her køber vi ind lokalt, nørder natur i naturbasen, får sved på panden i bevægelseshuset eller tager S-toget til København. I Kildedal lever vi det dynamiske hverdagsliv, men har ro på. 

Kildedal er et kraftcenter for life science, biotech og sundhedsteknologi. Her mødes medarbejdere fra hele verden i et mangfoldigt, innovativt miljø med fokus på netværk, synergi og videndeling. I flerbrugerhuse kan små virksomheder vokse sig store, mens etablerede kan lære nyt fra de mange vækstvirksomheder. I Kildedal dyrker vi det sunde arbejdsliv med nem adgang til natur, motion og offentlig transport.

• L'exigence : Votre satisfaction est au cœur de notre organisation, c'est pourquoi nous avons développé une démarche spécifique reposant sur le sérieux et la réactivité de nos collaborateurs.

• La confiance : Nous avons à cœur d'instaurer avec vous une relation de confiance sur la durée.

• La confidentialité : Notre équipe respecte une charte de « confidentialité » tout au long de la réalisation de votre projet.

Vaneau bureau et commerce met à votre service l’ensemble de ses compétences pour vous accompagner dans tous vos projets immobiliers de manière efficace et globale.

Name: Upsuite
Description:
Where teams go to find coworking spaces.

Upsuite has created a service that helps leaders of growing companies find and secure coworking and flexible offices in an average of 23 days from the first call and with 90% less research and touring time. The company has assembled offices in nearly 2,000 locations throughout North America and has partnered with some of the world’s s best accelerators, commercial real estate pros, and business organizations to deliver them. Upsuite provides the easiest way to find, evaluate, and secure the coworking/flex office at the location, price point, and terms that teams want. Upsuite removes surprises and saves users time in their search by providing 99% of the market inventory, actual suite availability and pricing, all before they tour. If teams book through Upsuite, their membership also comes with exclusive discounts, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee. 

Verified coworking operator partners receive a stream of pre-qualified introductions, the ability to pick from interested companies who will provide the most revenue long term, delivered as a no-risk, no upfront cost on-demand service. 
Commercial real estate advisors/brokers work with Upsuite Coworking Advisors who help identify the ideal space for their clients and help close small or complex coworking deals. 

Upsuite Verified Operator Partners gain access to a steady stream of the most interested companies and corporate teams, all at no risk or upfront cost. Working with Upsuite maximizes their revenue, minimizes their sales and marketing risk, and ensures that they will have the kind of profitable members who will help their coworking business thrive. 

Commercial real estate advisors utilize Upsuite’s network of Coworking Operators to help find short-term coworking space for their clients in 90% less time that going direct.

Name: Everard Cole
Description:
Everard Cole is a commercial property consultancy specialising in the licensed leisure and development sector.

We operate nationwide, but have an expert knowledge and a detailed understanding of East Anglia, the Home Counties, Yorkshire and Midlands, serviced from our local offices in Cambridge, Leeds and Nottingham.

Everard Cole provides professional advice in all areas of commercial property. We have a unique insight into the licensed leisure and development sector gained from many years in general practice working for leased and managed pub operators, the private market, restaurant and a wide spectrum of leisure operators. 
Our expertise lies in property Acquisition, Disposal, Valuation and Professional Work. We pride ourselves on our professional approach and discretion, acting for a wide range of clients including pub companies, regional brewers, private investors, developers and individual freeholders and tenants. 

Everard Cole operate a tailored Agency function which can assist with buying and selling of both leasehold and freehold assets. We specialise in the sale of 'going concern' businesses as Business Transfer Agents with years of specialist sector knowledge.

Our experienced team can also assist with rent reviews, lease renewals, valuations for bank lending and pension funds, Independent Expert and Expert Witness work, PIRRS and assistance with Market Rent Only (MRO) cases.

Name: Groupe immobilier Bel-Rive
Description:
Propriétaire d'une trentaine de bâtiments commerciaux, industriels et de bureaux, Groupe immobilier Bel-Rive se positionne comme chef de file en gestion immobilière et se distingue par l’excellente qualité de ses espaces à louer et leur situation géographique favorable. Ces espaces totalisent plus d'une centaine de locataires partout au Québec. Nous travaillons avec ardeur afin de toujours proposer les meilleurs locaux à nos clients. Nous savons que c’est important et que la croissance de leur entreprise y est fortement liée.

This central and well-established area has long been at the forefront of the history of Dublin City. Name: Podjetniški inkubator Podbreznik
Description:
Podjetniški inkubator Podbreznik (PIP) leži na obrobju Novega mesta in je pravi kraj za nova inovativna podjetja. V urejenem poslovnem okolju s sodobno infrastrukturo in s širšim naborom svetovalnih in mentorskih storitev je v 15 letih delovanja omogočil učinkovito nastajanje in razvoj več kot 70 podjetij, ki so ustvarila preko 180 delovnih mest. Za kako kakovostno okolje gre, pove dejstvo, da je stopnja preživetja podjetij v PIP nad 90%.

Bistvo najema prostora v PIP ni zgolj ugoden najem, temveč sobivanje in sodelovanje z ostalimi naprednimi podjetji, številni poslovni dogodki ter programi, ki podjetjem ponujajo nove priložnosti za sodelovanja in razvijanja posla. Podjetja imajo na tedenski bazi na voljo številna kvalitetna izobraževanja ter dostop do novih izkušenj in širjenja prepoznavnosti podjetja. Vsa podjetja so ažurno obveščena tudi o vseh aktualnih razpisih in poslovnih priložnostih.

Pomembna skupina inkubatorja so potencialni podjetniki in mlada podjetja, katerim se preko individualnih svetovanj, mentorskih programov, startup vikendov ipd. pomaga razviti poslovno idejo. Tem skupinam je na voljo tudi ugoden coworking prostor, ki poleg samega pisarniškega prostora ponuja tudi sodobne govorilnice, kamor se je mogoče umakniti za sestanek, videokonferenco ipd..

PIP pa je preko storitve virtualne pisarne dom tudi številnim mladim podjetnikom, ki zaradi različnih razlogov na domačem naslovu ne morejo odpreti podjetja.

NAŠIM PODJETJEM NUDIMO: 
•	ugoden najem poslovnih prostorov v Novem mestu,
•      kvalitetno in urejeno poslovno okolje z brezplačnimi parkirnimi,
•	kreativno delovno okolje v coworking pisarni,
•	do 100% subvencionirane podjetniške delavnice in izobraževanja,
•	svetovanje in mentorstvo s področja podjetništva,
•	analizo in vrednotenje poslovne ideje,
•	sodelovanje z drugimi podjetniki, startupi in mentorji,
•	pomoč pri iskanju partnerjev, sodelavcev,
•	uporabo sejne sobe in projektorja,
•	pridobitev ugleda na trgu,
•	promocijo vašega podjetja…

Name: Caohejing Hi-Tech Park
Description:
Caohejing Development Corporation
Founded in 1984, the Caohejing Hi-tech Park Development Corporation (CHJ) is one of China’s leading real estate developers and operators. 

We develop LEED – certified office and R & D space for more than 2,000 domestic and overseas hi-tech companies, including over 500 foreign-invested enterprises. More than forty corporations on the “Fortune Global 500” list have set up over a hundred high tech enterprises with Caohejing.

Our main campus is located centrally in Shanghai's Xuhui District, along the Middle Ring Road; we have also built and operate satellite parks around the periphery of Shanghai, including in the city’s recently launched Free Trade Zone. As Shanghai’s economy has evolved, we have opened manufacturing plants in Zhejiang and Jiangsu provinces to serve our clients’ requirements

Caohejing works with companies in the following high technology sectors: information technology; biotech and healthcare; new materials; high-end equipment (including aeronautics); automotive; clean energy; and tertiary sector services (including financial services, telecom networking, and business process outsourcing). In addition, a number of leading global brands have set up regional headquarters in our high rise office towers.

The Caohejing Innovation Center serves as a start-up incubator for firms in several emerging sectors, including mobile apps and gaming. Our experienced team assists new companies with mentoring, HR and operational support, as well as early stage funding from banks, venture capital, and angel investors.

Over the past three decades, Caohejing has developed a close network with technology parks around the world. We have dozens of “sister” technology parks around the globe, and are active members of the International Association of Science Parks.

Nos domaines d’intervention
Transaction & Commercialisation
Vente et location de terrains, bureaux, commerces, locaux industriels ou résidentiels
Mise en marché de projets immobiliers (résidentiel, tertiaire, mixte)
Élaboration de stratégies de commercialisation : ciblage, pricing, mix locatif, marketing
Conseil à l'acquisition
Recherche d’opportunités foncières ou bâties
Études de marché et due diligence commerciale
Accompagnement à la négociation et sécurisation des transactions
Valorisation & Arbitrage
Diagnostic stratégique des actifs
Études de repositionnement
Optimisation du rendement ou de la valeur vénale
Scénarios d’arbitrage et recommandations de cession
Une activité guidée par des valeurs fortes
Notre activité est guidée par un ensemble de valeurs fondatrices qui définissent notre éthique de travail, et de valeurs fédératrices qui assurent la cohésion de notre équipe au quotidien.

Nos valeurs fondatrices
Honnêteté : transparence dans les analyses et les échanges
Humilité : capacité d’écoute et remise en question permanente
Franchise : dire les choses clairement, sans détour
Rigueur : précision, méthode et exigence
Confiance : fiabilité dans la relation et dans les résultats
Nos valeurs fédératrices
Leadership : sens des responsabilités, capacité à entraîner
Engagement : implication totale auprès de nos clients et partenaires
Coopération : travail en équipe et intelligence collective
Une démarche éthique et conforme aux standards internationaux

Name: Routes For Sale
Description:
Routes For Sale is an exclusive broker for Buying or Selling a route business.

Routes For Sale was founded by Ron Slusser who has been deemed by his customers as the “Route Guru of America!” Ron started his career as an independent distributor in route sales, and later acquired his Real Estate License which further led to him becoming a Commercial Broker. Ron previously sold residential real estate and owned route distributorships through Murray Cookies, and Snyder’s Of Hanover. This is important, because not only do you have an expert when it comes to answering questions about the buying and selling process, but you also have access to someone with hands on experience who has worked in the route sales industry for over 20 years.

Buyers
Have you considered owning a route distributorship or business in route sales? You can take control of your future now! Invest in one of our highly profitable, recession proof, routes for sale today, and let us help you jump start your new career. Tired of the corporate jungle? Are you ready to build a lasting and prosperous business that has the potential to build equity?

Sellers
We have brought together tons of buyers and sellers with our targeted marketing. The flexibility of our marketing program has caused “other” brokers in the industry to take notice… Don’t list your route for sale with a standard broker who charges 10 – 12%, has no experience in route ownership, and holds you “hostage” with their contracts and cancellation fees. Nobody knows your business like you do, and most route companies take care of the majority of the paper work for you. Our job is to bring the buyers to you after qualifying them. We are experts in the industry and will assist you with the process… All for a fraction for what other brokers charge, and only when your route sells!

Name: Atlantic Properties
Description:
Atlantic Properties is a full service real estate firm with a focus on Southeastern Massachusetts.  Client services include everything from Market Analysis, Investment Sales, Tenant/Buyer Representation, and Landlord Representation to Development Consulting and Construction Services.

Name: Q22 Warszawa
Description:
Q22 zawdzięcza swoją nazwę słowom "quality", czyli jakość oraz "quartz", ponieważ kryształ kwarcu był główną inspiracją architektów projektujących bryłę wieży. Monolityczność budynku o delikatnie przełamanych płaszczyznach oraz szklano-aluminiowa elewacja o prostych podziałach podkreślają jego dynamiczny charakter. 195-metrowy budynek mieszczący się w ścisłym centrum Warszawy przy skrzyżowaniu Al. Jana Pawła II oraz ul. Grzybowskiej zapewnia 53 807 mkw. nowoczesnej i w pełni ekologicznej powierzchni biurowej klasy premium. 

Na parterze i pierwszym piętrze znajduje się przestrzeń przeznaczona pod działalność handlowo-usługową, w której funkcjonują lokale gastronomiczne, kawiarnia, salon fryzjerski i kosmetyczny oraz pralnia. Piętro 14. oferuje zaś dostęp do centrum konferencyjnego oraz klubu fitness. 

Na pozostałych kondygnacjach mieści się powierzchnia biurowa zaaranżowana w klasie A, która zapewnia najemcom standard pracy na najwyższym poziomie. 

Do dyspozycji użytkowników biurowca Q22 w podziemnym garażu udostępnione jest 348 miejsc parkingowych, w tym stacje ładowania pojazdów elektrycznych. Ponadto trzy minuty pieszo, przy Rondzie ONZ znajduje się stacja II linii metra. 

Q22 to miejsce pracy skrojone na miarę potrzeb każdej firmy. Zróżnicowana struktura budynku bezpośrednio przekłada się na różnorodność planów pięter. Wybór strefy biurowca zależy od indywidualnych potrzeb najemców. Nowoczesne technologie pozwalają uzyskać realne oszczędności w różnym wymiarze, jak również istotnie wpływają na komfort pracy. 

Budynek uzyskał dwa ważne certyfikaty w zakresie bezpieczeństwa - BREEAM Outstanding oraz polityki środowiskowej – SGS Covid Free. Natomiast od 2021 roku korzysta wyłącznie z energii elektrycznej pochodzącej ze źródeł odnawialnych.

- Wynajem powierzchni w centrum handlowym
- Obsługa prawna przy analizie umów zawieranych z wynajmującym 
- Negocjacje wysokości czynszów 
- Kompleksowe prace związane z adaptacją lokalu - Prace budowlane, wszelkie pozwolenia, akceptacje projektów w centrach handlowych

- Projektowanie, produkcja oraz montaż wszystkich materiałów, które wspierają markę w miejscu sprzedaży.

Co nas wyróżnia? Przede wszystkim to, że posiadamy swój sprawdzony zespół ludzi, nie korzystając z usług innych podwykonawców i firm lub agencji reklamowych. Między innymi dlatego nasza oferta jest atrakcyjna cenowo, a proces decyzyjny szybki. 

Cenimy sobie długofalowe relacje. Zapraszamy do współpracy!

Description:
With its surface of 226.000 sqm, Westgate City is the largest shopping mall in Croatia. It opened its doors in November 2009, located west of the city of Zagreb, right next to the A2 highway.

The size of Westgate guarantees a complete and unique combination of shops which represent a variety of domestic and international brands. H&M, Reserved, Terranova, Mango, CCC, Europa 92, New Yorker, s.Oliver, C&A, Croata, Galileo, Mass, Müller are just some of the leading brands in the largest Croatian shopping destination.
Focused on the needs of a whole family, besides of the numerous children’s stores Westgate also incorporates Croatia's largest indoor playground for children - Family Park, whose surface spreads over 4.000 sqm. Westgate has been continuously following the interests of its visitors with the goal of maximum adaptation to their needs by organizing important and diverse events for all visitor groups. As a center of the top events, besides the concept of Late Night Shopping, Westgate hosts: Wedding Expo, Maternity, baby and kids Expo, Prom Expo, Pet fair, Rujanfest, Beauty Street and many others. 
Westgate is also the leading shopping mall in online and continues to develop in the research of new marketing opportunities.

THINK DIFFERENTLY

Redd Zebra challenges itself and our Clients to think differently. It’s in our DNA to challenge the status quo and think differently about how our Clients’ challenges can be met. Thinking differently by looking at the challenge and working backwards to find solutions that are smarter, simpler and more intuitive. Our thinking differently about our Clients’ needs and challenges is engendered in our name. We challenge our Clients to think differently about us; starting with our unconventional name, our unorthodox spelling of ‘red’ and our refreshing and disruptive approach to the way we offer our services.
 
THE STORY
The ‘Red(d) Zebra’ is based on a folklore told by African tribesman. It is said that the Red(d) Zebra will appear in times of need, when you are lost, and need direction to reach your goal. It is said that the Red(d) Zebra will lead you to the ‘truce of the water hole’ where everyone works collaboratively for the collective benefit of all.
 
THE METAPHOR
The African folklore (and beautiful metaphor) together with a drive to disrupt the current consulting experience, culminated in the inception of Redd Zebra; a collective of like-minded consultants who think differently and work collaboratively to provide a higher level of service that leads you to the achievement of your goal(s). Redd Zebra is driven to provide the expertise and results you expect but never truly experience.  

THE WHAT
Redd Zebra provides Asset & Building Advisory services throughout the property (asset) continuum; from origination, acquisition and operation to re-positioning and disposal.  We work with you to minimise and mitigate risk, reduce unnecessary costs and optimise returns.

WHY REDD ZEBRA?
It is said that people engage on the Why not the What of a business. Our Why is enabling you to achieve your project goals.  Our success is measured in its attainment. 

Welcome to Redd Zebra…think differently

This progressive, friendly place is designed for those who want reliable and quick wi-fi, a central location, natural light and who care about being around a real community of inspiring people – from all over the world.

This is what makes KAPTÁR new and unique: the perfect mix of working from home and from a coffee shop, where you can focus on your job, but you can join our community programs when you feel like it. Name: 国际金融地产联盟（IFFRE）
Description:
中国首个聚焦地产与地产金融领域推动接轨国际标准的行业联盟
 
国际金融地产联盟(简称：IFFRE)，是中国最具影响力的国际性、非政府、非营利性行业组织。主要由各个国家和地区的政府机构、地产开发企业、地产金融机构、地产运营管理公司、相关专业服务机构、金融行业组织、地产行业组织、以及金融领域、地产领域的有关专业人组成。

作为中国首个聚焦地产与地产金融领域的行业联盟，国际金融地产联盟(IFFRE)致力于打造全球金融地产交流对话的中国舞台，并推进国内实践接轨国际标准。联盟会员均为来自地产与地产金融行业的专业人士，汇聚了中国金融地产全产业链的中坚力量。联盟本着专注、专业、创新、诚信、共赢的精神，整合国内外行业顶尖资源，联合各大国际权威专业协会，成为中国金融地产标准化的领航者。

Name: Concord Properties, LLC
Description:
In the early years, the Concord portfolio was both geographically and functionally diverse. Properties were held, on the West Coast, the Rocky Mountains, the South Eastern United States, and of course, in Texas. Concord functioned both as a developer and an investment partner with local developers who had local knowledge in new, unfamiliar markets. Eventually, Concord ventured into non-real estate ventures, including mining, food service and golf courses.

In the mid-1990s, Concord made the strategic decision to redirect its focus back to the San Antonio market and to primarily concentrate future growth on real estate endeavors. It was at this time that Concord also decided that, except for projects in which it had no development experience, Concord would act as the developer, with or without partners. Philosophically, Concord has steered its efforts towards developing high quality, but affordable projects. Management strongly believes that the best result is not always the most expensive endeavor.

Concord Properties is known as a small, but experienced, high-end boutique developer of commercial real estate with a reputation to hold and manage their portfolio, and not to sell. Quality from the ground up and responsive hands on management, define us. Our tenants are our best references.

Name: The InteRisk Group
Description:
InteRisk is an ALL operational risk specialist. 

The strength in our service delivery is built on the depth of technical expertise and diversity of platforms we deliver to assist our clients in all areas of operational business risk. 

We have not rushed into our corporate growth. We have instead invested in seeking the best people from a greater range of specialties to give a depth of quality and industry experience. We have our graduate programs that have produced recognised industry experts and we continue to watch and learn from our clients every day to assess their needs and exposures, ensuring that we can be the leading edge of their Operational Risk Plans. 

Our guiding principles of “Accuracy and Honesty” have served the company well and can be seen in the relationships we have with many of our clients and the people we have worked with going back over 20 years, we are very proud of our history.

Our services include:

Audit & Inspection: Our aim is to improve the performance standards that is evident to our clients, their clients and stakeholders. We are not in the business of identifying hazards and moving on, we will assist, guide, recommend actions and follow up to achieve good practice and compliance.

Business Solutions: We offer a vast array of specialised solutions including safety, risk, incident management, security, technology, learning and development just to name a few.

Technology: Our “Tech Platforms” have been designed to bring all your Risk Management, Compliance, Inspection and Reporting requirements together by linking all elements into one easy to use platform. 

Educational Processes: Our education solutions are individually tailored and incorporate technology-based eLearning, webinars and the facilitation of Face-to-Face sessions or a combination of these.

Name: Inmobiliaria Dama de Elche
Description:
Somos una empresa dedicada tanto a la intermediación inmobiliaria, como a la compra venta de todo tipo de inmuebles. Tramitando todo tipo de documentación, asesoramiento, búsqueda de financiación, cancelaciones y demás actos necesarios para llevar a buen fin cualquier compra-venta o arrendamiento de inmuebles.
En los últimos años nos hemos especializado en la colaboración con gestoras de fondos, llevando a cabo labores diversas como: la realización de valoraciones externas de carteras, a los efectos de evaluar la viabilidad de la adquisición; asistencia a toma de posesión; gestión y custodia de inmuebles; venta de los mismos; asistencias a notaría (con mandato verbal o por poder); liquidación de impuestos; inscripción en registros, etc. 
En la línea comentada, otra de nuestras actividades es, a través de nuestros contactos en las entidades bancarias de la zona, llevar a cabo la identificación de activos (de manera individual o en lotes) que nuestras redes de venta puedan comercializar; realizando informes económicos y de viabilidad, con presentación a inversores para su adquisición, encargándonos del resto de trámites hasta la venta de los mismos. Todo lo cual nos ha permitido posicionarnos como agentes con un alto grado de eficacia en toda nuestra zona de actuación, la cual, en la actualidad, es de las que más actividad de compra-venta de inmuebles está registrando, principalmente por el flujo de capital extranjero en cuyas redes de inversión tenemos importantes contactos. 
Contamos asimismo con un departamento jurídico capaz de adoptar posiciones de sustitución procesal respecto de las entidades acreedoras, llevando a cabo, hasta su finalización, los procesos de toma judicial y extrajudicial de inmuebles, resolviendo asimismo todas aquellas cuestiones de carácter legal que puedan plantearse en el proceso completo de identificación, adquisición, inscripción y venta de los inmuebles de referencia.

Name: Vicus Partners, LLC
Description:
Vicus Partners, LLC is a full-service commercial real estate firm that exclusively represents tenants in commercial transactions. We provide consultative and advisory services to our clients whether they are relocating to new space, restructuring an existing lease, or expanding within their current location. Our detail-oriented approach allows us to take on the entire process of finding the best space for a client and negotiating all lease points to help achieve bottom-line results.

We only represent tenants. Vicus never acts as a landlord’s agent. Why? So we can act as our client’s unwavering advocate, free of the conflicts of interest that are inevitable when attempting to represent both landlord and tenant. Since the lease negotiation process is oppositional in nature, this freedom is crucial in serving a tenant’s best interest.

Identifying the right space and securing the best lease terms requires broad market knowledge and a sharp business sense. We deploy our deep knowledge of the market to negotiate to our client’s best advantage. What’s more, we can put together the right team of lawyers, design and construction consultants, engineers and contractors to help complete the transaction.

We are real estate brokers, consultants and advisors to our clients. Our plan of action, based on the input we receive and the options we assemble, will impact our client’s financial well-being for years to come.

Name: Prop.Exchange
Description:
Prop.Exchange, powered by TrueMarketValue, is a digital auction platform for trading commercial real estate properties; it's where supply meets demand. The purpose of this digital tool is to efficiently trade properties at the true market value - and in a time efficient manner.

The challenge we are solving:
•	Property valuations can be uncertain; often there are only few relevant comparables
•	Running costs can be a burden – Taxes, reporting, maintenance, security, etc. are wasteful
•	Selling has been time consuming and frustrating – historically there was no easy solutions without compromising good governance

Our solution; 3 easy steps:
1.	Preparations – Due Diligence material/essential documents and the SPA are added to our data room
2.	Marketing of the property in newspapers and virtual
3.	Digital auction – Divestment by Dutch Auction on prop.exchange

The Dutch Auction is characterized by a descending price, starting at index 100 and decrease by e.g. 1 point every weekday at noon until a bidder accepts the price offered or until seller decides to rather keep the property. 

Once a bidder accepts a price offered, the bidder has 2-5 business days to sign the Purchase Offer/SPA and pay a reasonable deposit. If bidder fails to perform he becomes disqualified from this and future auctions - and the auction will resume for everybody else. 
Interested bidders can access relevant data, drawings and the applicable contracts after log-on and qualification for the auction.

Value for buyers: 
•	All buyers have access to same information 
•	The auction takes out the “bluffing” of the negotiation 
•	No bias or disadvantage due to lacking relationship 
•	You don't have to pay more than you think the property is worth

Value for sellers:
•	It's very time efficient
•	Determines and documents the true market value
•	Sales complexity, cost and time are significantly reduced 

For more info please contact:

Founder

Name: Larson Capital Management
Description:
Larson Capital Management was founded in 2014 to provide alternative investment opportunities to accredited investors. Our team currently manages over a dozen commercial assets across the United States. We’ve grown from $50 million in asset acquisitions in our early days to now over $6B in AUM as of Q1 2024. Our core focus is to inspire the confidence and loyalty of our investors by making equity investments, both on a direct basis and through joint ventures. 

 Our investors are forward-thinking. They areinterested in diversifying their portfolios through non-traditional assets for long-term growth. Our model allows stakeholders to directly own well-managed real estate without taking on the risk of paying off a loan in the event of a default while leveraging the tax efficiencies of depreciation. 

 We have expertise in various properties, including commercial office space, industrial buildings, and multi-family housing. 

Larson Capital Management, LLC is the managing member/general partner of a group of private equity funds affiliated with Larson Financial Group, LLC.

Description:
The Sanchez Group is a McKinney, Texas based firm that specializes in creating high quality, sustainable communities.  We are experienced, highly-skilled and passionate about our work. We keep our promises and we do it with honesty, integrity and quality.

Martin and Kim Sanchez, Founders of The Sanchez Group, have worked hard to build a firm that embraces a culture of hard work, honesty and integrity. At its core, The Sanchez Group is made up of individuals, working as a team, doing the right things the right way to ensure everyone is successful.

Name: Blake Real Estate
Description:
A full-service, fully-integrated Commercial Real Estate firm.

Blake Real Estate was founded more than seventy years ago by Jack I. Bender and has been an integral member of the Washington, DC area’s real estate community ever since. Today, David Bender, Chairman, brings a third generation of the Bender family’s leadership to the management of the company.

In addition to its presence in the office building development and management sectors, Blake is known for its work with other property types such as shopping centers, warehouses, multifamily, hotels, and land acquisition.

Blake’s greatest asset is its staff of real estate professionals. With in-depth knowledge and experience in commercial leasing, construction, development, property management, and consulting, the Blake Real Estate team offers clients a full-service operation and is committed to getting results. The Greater Washington, DC area’s real estate market is complex and requires innovative thinking. With a history of successful ventures, Blake knows that positive results are the product of hard work and commitment.

Blake Real Estate commits to reinvesting in its properties which allows them to maintain a high occupancy level in its 11-building portfolio. Blake’s “Star Service”, sustainable practices, and lowering of operational costs aids in maintaining long-term quality tenants. The level of well-coordinated services that are being provided by Blake ranges from leasing to management, engineering, construction, security, cleaning, and a responsive customer relations program.

Name: Federación de Asociaciones Inmobiliarias (FAI)
Description:
El 4 de marzo del año 2013 nacía la Federación de Asociaciones Inmobiliarias (FAI), como resultado del manifiesto previo, suscrito por representantes de ocho asociaciones locales inmobiliarias de diferentes puntos de España en noviembre 2012. La vocación de esta Federación, creada por y para los inmobiliarios, ha sido actuar como coordinadora de las asociaciones que la integran, canalizando de forma ágil las demandas, la experiencia y la fuerza de sus asociaciones adheridas, con una estructura MÍNIMA y SIMPLIFICADA que la dote de TRANSPARENCIA y EFICACIA.

En la actualidad, FAI está integrada por 16 asociaciones inmobiliarias, lo que representa unas 800 agencias y un colectivo de 3.000 agentes inmobiliarios.

Entre sus FINES, destacan los siguientes:

FOMENTAR la creación y el desarrollo de las asociaciones inmobiliarias orientadas a la colaboración mediante mandatos en exclusiva compartida (MLS), así como la profesionalización de sus agencias asociadas. 
FACILITAR la transferencia eficaz de información sobre inmuebles, procesos, sistemas y todo tipo de proveedores necesarios. 
REPRESENTAR a sus organizaciones asociadas ante terceros, influyendo en legislación y normativas que hagan crecer de forma sostenible el sector inmobiliario, en los ámbitos geográficos e instancias que correspondan. 

Y para su consecución, varias han sido las ACTIVIDADES puestas en marcha a lo largo de estos años. Entre ellas, resaltan las siguientes:

Creación de comisiones de trabajo que propongan a la Asamblea acciones concretas encaminadas a la consecución de los fines. Las comisiones estarán formadas, al menos, por un miembro de la Junta Directiva, que actuará como coordinador, y un máximo de tres personas más. 
Creación de imagen corporativa, así como diseño, puesta operativa y actualización de una página Web de la Federación con contenidos y documentación práctica para las asociaciones integrantes.
Creación de un Foro de discusión profesional abierto, tanto online como presencial, sobre el futuro de la profesión de Agente Inmobiliario, que proponga acciones encaminadas a dar valor y notoriedad al ejercicio profesional.
Organización de una Mesa Inmobiliaria, con representantes de todos los colectivos de agentes inmobiliarios, para consensuar propuestas comunes sobre el mercado de la vivienda, compraventa o alquiler, y en especial en los ámbitos de accesibilidad, fiscalidad y financiación.

Name: Ghassan Holding Group
Description:
Ghassan Al-Nemer Group, famous for the gold business with rich experience and exceptional reputation is a privately owned family business. The family has been involved in the gold business (originally as goldsmith) for approximately 122 years, with the skills passed along within the family from one generation to the next. 

With the collective wisdom and experience spanning over 122 years Mr. Ghassan A Al-Nemer started his business in 1985, and he expanded rapidly securing the significant market share. Ghassan now operates 19 Gold Jewellery outlets in KSA with wholesale offices in Dammam, Jeddah and Dubai UAE. These outlets deal in a complete range of high class Gold and Diamond Jewellery and Artefacts. 

Ghassan has been ranked 'number one' as a gold supplier in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia with gold trading turnover of SR13.476bn ($3.6bn) for fiscal year 2008.

In line with the Kingdom's policy of encouraging the indigenous work force, 70% of GHG employees are Saudis, who have been rigorously trained to cope with the needs and requirements of their work.

In addition to the gold and jewellery business, the group has diversified portfolio with interests; in real estate, financial investments, general contracting, trading in electronics, hardware, manufacturing of wooden furniture & fixtures and heavy transport business. GHG is a significant player in the transportation business and owns some 200 heavy commercial vehicles.

 Acteur de la réussite de vos projets », plus qu’un slogan, c’est la philosophie de Quatuor Transactions qui accompagne les transmissions d’exploitations agricoles dans l’Ouest de la France. Therefore, we’ve created a workplace where opinions are respected, where everyone is invited to contribute to the success of our business and where they’re rewarded for excellence. Our New Zealand based teams in Auckland and Christchurch are dedicated to providing world class advice to all of our international and kiwi clients. Knight Frank New Zealand is world-class quality, with a kiwi focus.

Name: FC Group
Description:
FC Group represent landlords, tenants, owners, and occupiers in commercial real estate, and operates as a collective team of experts working towards a common goal - to serve the client. Our methodologies have been proven to lower client costs and increase project efficiencies without sacrificing quality.

How and where people work has changed.  People want to Work Local and stay closer to home.  FC Group is working with municipalities/towns/cities to help them capture business before it leaves. We need to focus on new strategies that support more smaller suburban work spaces.  

Multifamily developments provide a good opportunity to achieve this.  Adding a place to "work" with the typical places to "live" and "play" will also increase community sustainability.  Let's Work Local.

Name: NAI Norwood Group
Description:
NAI Norwood Group is an affiliate of NAI Global, the world’s leading managed network of independently owned commercial real estate brokerage firms.  Through this network of 325 offices in 55 countries, NAI Norwood Group is able to leverage their strong local experience around the world. Whether your commercial real estate needs require local expertise, or you need brokerage consulting around the world, the firm is here to help. With our extensive background and strong local contacts, we are able to assist individual corporations in negotiating leases, sales, business brokerage, investments, relocation, site selection and development.
 
Founded in 1968 by Karl Norwood, The Norwood Group became one of the largest real estate firms in the State of New Hampshire.  The company expanded into residential land development and home construction in the seventies and formed Norwood Group International, focusing on attracting foreign investors to form joint ventures in commercial real estate, primarily in the New England marketplace. In 2008 NAI Norwood Group opened a second location in Portsmouth, NH vastly widening services into the seacoast area. NAI Norwood Group has remained a viable leader in the commercial real estate field and has continued to hone its skills in this evolving world of sophisticated clients who demand services in dealing with the complexity of the current global market.
 
NAI Norwood Group offers a range of services to clients that include landlord representation,    tenant/buyer representation, business brokerage, consulting, and development. NAI Norwood Group’s affiliation with NAI Global enhances the services by spanning resources on a worldwide level.

What is the Tree of Knowledge?

The Tree of Knowledge (TOK) is a free informal quarterly networking event for people who operate in the property, construction and affiliated industries. TOK events are held in Sunshine Coast, Brisbane, Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Canberra & Newcastle. 

Events are generally held on a Wednesday between 5.30 – 8.30 pm in a public bar, hotel, pub or similar where attendees are able to purchase food and beverage at their leisure and own expense.
