Name: ZenTeq
Description:
Zenteq is a specialist community scheme service provider offering holistic management capabilities and administrative support to the property industry. Zenteq offers a fresh, revolutionary take on the typical property management structures, enabling higher levels of service and expertise coupled with even greater customer interaction and scheme support.

New community scheme legislation came into effect in October 2016 which has significantly changed the landscape for all role players, this from scheme executives to the managing agents that service them and the greater community scheme market. Under the new legislation, scheme executives, and by extension property management professionals, are held to a much higher standard of care in conducting the affairs of a communal living scheme.

Zenteq is ideally placed to provide, and so support, with the requisite skill and capacity allowing you to focus on the management of your valued clients leveraging off Zenteq’s economies of scale and expertise and associated scheme affiliate partners.

Šiuo projektu užbaigtas Kauno centro architektūrinis ansamblis tarp „Žalgirio“ arenos, „Akropolio“ ir Laisvės alėjos. Verslo resursais atkurta istorinė kadaise čia besidriekusi Spaustuvininkų gatvelė. Sovietinių statybų metu sunaikinta gatvė bus rekonstruota į pėsčiųjų bulvarą, kuris leis nuo Simono Daukanto tilto patogiau pasiekti „Akropolį“.

„Magnum“ verslo centras išsiskiria ne tik unikalia vieta, bet ir komfortu darbuotojams, ir minimaliomis išlaikymo sąlygomis. Išmanųjį biurų pastatą valdo automatinė BMS sistema, kuri parenka tinkamiausią mikroklimatą darbuotojams, naudoja atsinaujinančius energijos šaltinius, reguliuoja taupųjį LED apšvietimą ir leidžia autonomiškai valdyti biuro kaštus.

„Magnum“ verslo centrą sudaro du 12 ir 8 aukštų tarpusavyje sujungti bokštai, aukštesnysis siekia 42 metrus ir yra bene aukščiausias Naujamiesčio pastatas. Biurų darbuotojams, svečiams bei tai garantuoja įspūdingą Nemuno salos bei senamiesčio panoramą.

Name: Box Clever Consulting
Description:
Box Clever provides development and project management services on residential, retail, student living and office developments from £1 million upwards across the UK.

United by a common vision, Box Clever was formed in 2015 by three senior, experienced managers with the goal of creating an exceptional development and project management service for clients.

We're a bit different. Here's how:

WE LISTEN.
And we mean REALLY listen so that we truly understand your needs.
We don’t assume to know it all. We’re inquisitive and always learning.
We’ll keep asking if there’s anything else we can do to improve.

WE THINK.
All the time, about the best way of making things happen.
We know where to look for gaps or problems, and solve them before they become an issue.
We ask the tough questions & use our experience and intuition to guide you.

WE DELIVER
We do what we say we’ll do. Simple as that. And if we can’t, we’ll tell you beforehand.
We help you make informed decisions at the right time to keep everything on track.
We treat your money and time as though it was our own.

WE CLOSE
We take full responsibility. Shaping, directing and leading from the front right until the end.
We’re relentless. We don’t rest until all your objectives have been met or exceeded.
We help you deliver on your promises. We don’t leave until it’s done. Properly.

WE HAVE FUN.
We provide the passion, buzz and energy in the room. It’s our job and one we take seriously.
We motivate, inspire and direct so that everyone enjoys the journey, not just the outcome.
Life is simply too short not to love what you do. This is what we love. We want you to love it too.

Get in touch to find out how we can help you.

Name: Helm
Description:
For most business leaders, real estate is viewed as just another cost of doing business.
In our experience over the last 12 years, we have seen this mindset dominate, over and over again.
Leaders view the places their teams work and the properties they operate out of as little more than
a requirement to be in business.

While there’s nothing damaging about this approach, it is probably one of the most consistently
missed opportunities in business and in real estate.

We want to end that.

We believe real estate should be viewed as a business opportunity, not a business expense.
If executed correctly, real estate is a revenue generator for business, regardless of the business you
are in. So why isn’t this approach the strategy everyone employs?

A big reason is that brokerage services have become commoditized. Real estate, by its nature, is
transactional. This reality has created a transactional mindset among many brokers, who do not
view themselves as strategic partners of their clients. Nor do they see themselves in a position to
help clients achieve their clients’ own strategic goals.

We work differently.

Our approach is to understand how your business works, then how real estate could work for your
business.

We want to work with leaders with businesses that have high real estate costs, multiple locations,
and require multiple real estate asset types to conduct business. We want to work with innovative
leaders – especially those going through a new executive leadership integration or expansion, a
merger and acquisition, relocation or dissolution. We are seeking an exclusive relationship to serve
a company’s real estate interests and want to be known as their in-house real estate department
and team member.

Helm is not for everyone. But we are the go-to choice where innovative thinking and complex
projects converge.

If you know someone who is looking for a partner to create a winning corporate real estate strategy,
I would be honored with the introduction.

Name: AP-ADE Park
Description:
Andhra Pradesh Aerospace & Defence Electronics Park (AP-ADE Park) is an incipient 264 acres vibrant & eco-friendly Innovation-led manufacturing cluster focused on Aerospace, Defence & Electronics. AP-ADE Park is an initiative of the Government of Andhra Pradesh through a joint venture between Andhra Pradesh Industrial Infrastructure Corporation (APIIC) and Vittal Innovation City (VIC).

It is strategically located in Anantapur, in the designated Aerospace & Defence Zone identified by the Government of Andhra Pradesh. AP-ADE Park abuts National Highway 44 and is an hour's drive from Bangalore International Airport (BIAL) connecting Bangalore and Hyderabad. It is also in very close proximity to PSUs like BEL (<50mtr) and global manufacturers like Kia (~14kms). The park is circumvented by two major proposed Industrial Corridors of Bangalore-Chennai and Chennai-Visakhapatnam.

Le Business Park multi-enseignes offre une grande visibilité et un emplacement stratégique aux entreprises, car il est facilement accessible de l’autoroute, entre le nord et le centre.  

PiNPOiNT réunit tous les critères pour faire croître votre entreprise et sera prêt à vous accueillir dès Mai 2022.

Name: L'ALVEOLE
Description:
L’ALVEOLE est un lieu dédié aux entrepreneurs et entreprises, pensé autour du confort, de l’esthétisme et de la sérénité.

Cet espace a été étudié pour remplir toutes les attentes et besoins de nos locataires, sans charges et surcoûts potentiels : vous n’avez plus qu’à « mettre les pieds sous la table » et profiter pleinement de votre lieu de travail.
Tout est compris dans nos tarifs : connexion internet Wifi fibre, assurance, mobilier, mise à disposition d’une imprimante multifonction avec consommables, équipement pro pour visio conférence…

L’Alvéole est un espace qui propose plusieurs solutions d’accueil, via la location flexible : 
-	D’une salle de réunion
-	De bureaux partagés
-	D’un bureau dédié aux rendez-vous avec vos clients et partenaires


Vous serez accueillis à L’Alvéole par une équipe professionnelle, engagée pour la qualité de ses services et pour laquelle votre bien-être sera la priorité.

Située à moins de 2 minutes de la sortie d’autoroute A41  Grésy-sur-Aix  et implantée dans une zone commerciale dotée de plusieurs parkings gratuits, L’Alvéole est facilement et rapidement accessible, et proche, même à pied, de toutes commodités (grande surface, petits commerces de proximité, station-service …). 
Pour la mobilité douce, nos locaux sont proches de la gare de Grésy-sur-Aix.

Cet espace a été conçu comme une offre complémentaire aux espaces de coworking déjà existants sur notre territoire. 

En effet, ces derniers accueillent souvent beaucoup de personnes en même temps. Ça fourmille, ça interagit… Mais dans une certaine agitation et bruits ambiants. Cela peut ne pas correspondre à toutes les attentes, et certains préfèreront plus de calme et de sérénité, sans pour cela renier sur l’aspect convivial.

C’est dans cette optique que nous avons axé notre différenciation. Tout cela rassemblé dans un lieu où la décoration, le beau, l'envie de faire plaisir, la qualité des matériaux et le confort ont été au cœur de nos préoccupations et de nos choix.

Name: Catalyst Ventures Development (CVD)
Description:
Boston is a city of firsts. From the very beginning of American history, with the shot heard around the world, the people of Boston and Massachusetts have taken pride in being at the forefront of innovation and revolutionary civic planning.

The first public library, the first African American Meeting House, the first public school, the first subway, the first public garden - the lists of Boston firsts are lengthy and are hallmarks of Boston’s commitment to the health and well-being of its citizens. As a city, we should take collective pride in our achievements. And as a city, we must share collective shame in the lack of economic opportunity within our minority communities. In January 2016, the Brookings Institute named Boston as the city with the highest income inequality overlap, making Boston first at being worst.

It is my mission to help tip that balance and be a catalyst that helps position Boston as a leader in the fight against income inequality by facilitating opportunities for minority-owned businesses. If you are ready for change, are interested in innovative enterprises and want to be a part of the solution, I want to hear from you.

Name: The Paperchain Project
Description:
paperChain—the collaborative research and innovation project funded under the European Union´s H2020 programme, and coordinated by Acciona Construction.

The paperChain Project “New Niche Markets for the Pulp and Paper Industry Waste based on circular economy approaches” intends to demonstrate the technical and environmental feasibility (TEF) of using different streams—generated in the Pulp & Paper Industry—as secondary raw material, with the aim of becoming competitive substitutes for the primary raw materials in near future. 
This Project includes five large-scale demonstrators or demo-cases in different operational environments: Construction in Portugal (asphalt mixtures and concrete in roads), Spain (stabilised-soil layers in roads) and Slovenia (composite materials for slide stabilization in railways); Chemical in Sweden (bio-ethanol for secondary chemicals); and Mining in Sweden (sealing layers for reactive spoil). 

This project has received funding from the European Union’s  Horizon 2020 research and innovation Programme under grant agreement N° 730305

Name: Asbestos Audits Queensland
Description:
Asbestos Surveys, Asbestos Inspections, Asbestos Audits, Asbestos Reports, Asbestos Registers, Asbestos Risk Assessments and Asbestos Management Plans.  Call the Asbestos Experts

At Asbestos Audits Queensland we have over twenty years experience at inspecting and reporting on the presence of asbestos in buildings. You can be confident of your asbestos survey or audit results as we use only NATA accredited laboratories for our sample analysis.

We travel Australia wide from our premises on the Gold Coast. For all asbestos audit services, call us on (07) 55492250 or mobile 0407 756 440 or email us for a quote.

Commercial asbestos audit services

Did you know that from January 1 2012, all commercial buildings built before 2004 ( in Qld the build date has reverted back to 1990 as of May 2014) must have had an asbestos inspection carried out by a competent person from which an Asbestos Management Plan, Risk Assessment, Register and Report is completed if asbestos is found or assumed to be present.

Why? The National Code of Practice for How to Manage and Control Asbestos in The Workplace requires mandatory compliance of these codes.

The issue of asbestos can sometimes be a sensitive one. Our friendly staff understand this and can explain to your staff if needed, exactly what we are doing and how all but new buildings require this service.

We can inspect your building and produce an Asbestos Containing Materials Report, Register and Management Plan so that you comply with the regulations. We also offer asbestos inspections and report services for pre-demolition, pre-renovation, or sale purposes.

Name: Atlanta Emerging Markets, Inc.
Description:
Atlanta Emerging Markets, Inc. (“AEMI”) is a community development entity, wholly-owned by the Atlanta Development Authority (d/b/a Invest Atlanta), that seeks to spur job creation, economic development and neighborhood revitalization in the City of Atlanta.  AEMI provides innovative, flexible financing products to high-impact, credit-challenged businesses and real estate development projects.

AEMI manages the City's New Markets Tax Credits (NMTC) program and has received $198MM of allocation from the U.S. Department of the Treasury since 2007.  The New Markets program aims to finance projects that create quality jobs accessible to low-income residents, provide services that benefit low-income communities, expand affordable housing, allow flexible lease rates for locally-owned businesses, and improve access to healthy foods.

AEMI has allocated over $136 million to 10 redevelopment projects, including Aerotropolis Atlanta, the Center for Civil and Human Rights, The Flatiron Building, and Grady Memorial Hospital's new emergency room department.  The ten projects have created more than 3,500 construction jobs and 4,000 permanent jobs for Atlanta's under-served communities.

Businesses or developers with sites in census designated low-income neighborhoods can apply for NMTC loans of $5 million+ to finance the construction of new facilities, equipment, or operating expenses to expand a business.  The financing is typically structured as a 7-year, interest-only loan with the option to convert about 20% of the loan into equity at the end of the loan term.

AEMI has also created new programs designed to aid small businesses in Atlanta, including the Advantage Loan Fund and the Atlanta Catalyst Fund, a $500,000 small business revolving loan fund that provides $50,000-$100,000 loans to qualifying businesses.

Name: Ménagez-Vous inc.
Description:
Chez Ménagez-vous, on prend soin de votre environnement depuis 1986.

Un engagement sans faille envers la qualité. Chaque mission est minutieusement inspectée pour garantir un résultat impeccable.

Découvrez une approche humaine et rigoureuse qui change tout. Faites confiance à Ménagez-Vous pour transformer votre environnement.

Name: RE/MAX Corporate
Description:
RE/MAX Corporate nasce dall'esigenza di soddisfare le necessità immobiliari di grandi clienti, istituzioni e mondo imprenditoriale, con esigenze particolari di acquisto, vendita e locazione a livello nazionale e internazionale, con particolare attenzione alle dismissioni di patrimoni immobiliari ad uso residenziale commerciale, industriale e terziario.
RE/MAX Corporate si pone come un unico referente che coordina le attività di commercializzazione degli immobili di agenzie e consulenti RE/MAX specializzati in ognuno dei segmenti di mercato.
RE/MAX Corporate parte avvantaggiata perché può contare sulla capillarità territoriale del network a livello nazionale con oltre 300 agenzie e più di 2.000 agenti ed internazionale dove è presente in oltre 100 Paesi nel mondo in cui operano più di 111.000 agenti immobiliari. A tale plus si associa la capacità di promuovere immobili e servizi di intermediazione sul mercato in modo mirato, grazie anche a strumenti aggiornati e all'avanguardia come l’esclusivo sistema MLS (Multiple Listings Service).
Inoltre i professionisti per accedere ed operare nel network immobiliare devono sottoscrivere il ‘codice di etica professionale RE/MAX’ - che stabilisce i più alti standard per il servizio ai clienti, garantendo un trattamento equo e promuovendo e proteggendo i loro interessi – e devono mantenersi aggiornati sugli sviluppi del mercato attraverso corsi di formazione ed aggiornamento professionale.

Name: CREModels
Description:
At CREModels, we take ownership of outcomes, align our interests with stakeholders, and dedicate ourselves to your success.

Invested in Our People: 
We invest significant resources to ensure our people have a rewarding and engaging work environment with challenging growth opportunities.
The development of our people is our top priority through internal and external training initiatives that enable employees to follow a career path available nowhere else in the real estate industry.

Invested in Our Clients:
We are invested in delivering a unique experience through a transparent and aligned relationship, working towards common goals with our smart, accessible and efficient team.
We want every referral we receive to be absolutely thrilled they found us.
We stand by our clients on the front lines defending them, standing shoulder-to-shoulder.

Invested in Our Industry:
We are invested in driving the real estate industry forwards by continually raising the standards for transparency, accuracy and ethics.
We invest our time to produce free and low-cost tools for the industry and educational institutions.
We also maintain a strict ethics policy that prohibits any team member from acting in a way that could potentially deceive other real estate professionals.

Invested in Our Community:
We invest resources providing free and discounted products and services to nonprofit organizations and endowments.
We also dedicate personnel and financial support to charitable organizations through sponsorship, volunteering, and board service.

Name: Hatch Real Estate
Description:
Hatch Real Estate is a privately owned real estate firm that focuses on providing creative and innovative advice to a range of regional, national and international clients. 

Based in Reading’s Thames Tower, we are focused on the Thames Valley commercial property market, specialising in office and industrial & logistics agency, as well as investment and development acquisitions and sales.

Through our intimate knowledge of the market, we pride ourselves on creating compelling opportunities for our clients.
 
We deliver an experienced, energetic and innovative service right through to the conclusion of the project.  We believe in quality over quantity and are passionate about giving more time to each instruction, to maximise our client’s return on investment.

Name: Barshop & Oles Company
Description:
Barshop & Oles Company is a privately owned, full service commercial real estate development and management firm based in Austin, Texas. Founded in 1983, BOC and its affiliates have developed, owned and/or managed more than 5 million square feet of shopping centers, industrial, office properties and limited service hotels, as well as several highly acclaimed master-planned mixed-use land projects located in several major Texas markets.

Today, BOC is actively involved in approximately 2 million square feet of high-quality retail assets. With over 30 years of success, BOC is proud of its core business of developing and managing top quality grocery-anchored neighborhood and community shopping centers, and managing and leasing first class retail properties on a third-party basis for a select group of institutional clients. 

For more information, please visit our website at www.barshop-oles.com.

Name: Cushman & Wakefield NorthMarq
Description: Cushman & Wakefield is a leading global real estate services firm that helps clients transform the way people work, shop, and live. Our 45,000 employees in more than 70 countries help occupiers and investors optimize the value of their real estate by combining our global perspective and deep local knowledge with an impressive platform of real estate solutions. Cushman & Wakefield is among the largest commercial real estate services firms with revenue of $6 billion across core services of agency leasing, asset services, capital markets, facility services (C&W Services), global occupier services, investment & asset management (DTZ Investors), project & development services, tenant representation, and valuation & advisory. 2017 marks the 100-year anniversary of the Cushman & Wakefield brand. 100 years of taking our clients’ ideas and putting them into action. To learn more, visit www.cushwakecentennial.com, www.cushmanwakefield.com or follow @CushWake on Twitter.

Description:
With approximately 133 members, CREW Richmond is the leading organization for senior-level executive women in the Richmond real estate field. As part of CREW Network, the industry’s premier networking organization, CREW Richmond is dedicated to transforming the commercial real estate industry by advancing women globally. CREW Network’s membership of more than 11,000 professionals in 75+ major global markets represents all aspects of commercial real estate—providing our members with direct access to real estate professionals across all geographies and disciplines.

Since 1990, CREW Richmond has connected commercial real estate professionals in the Richmond area, working together to:
- Create a dynamic and supportive environment that promotes advancement through knowledge sharing and networking
- Push the boundaries in every facet of commercial real estate through provocative dialogue among peers drawn from every discipline in the industry
- Provide educational programs which directly affect your day-to-day work and promote real change
- Encourage our members to be a force for activism and involvement in our communities.

CREW Richmond members are empowered by sharing their knowledge and experience with others in our community, while also learning from the insight and know-how of others. That’s why we focus our efforts on networking programs such as our Leadership Symposium and hold our annual Summer Social fundraising event. In growing and strengthening our network, we aim to create more opportunities for women in commercial real estate.

Description:
We are an independent multi-disciplinary property consultancy who develop genuine partnerships with our clients. Our experts collaborate and provide advice across every stage of the property lifecycle to ensure our clients achieve optimal solutions and maximum value.

Our market presence has been established across a range of industry sectors for more than 20 years and our exemplary performance has ensured strong long-term relationships with our clients. 

Our strength lies in our ability to quickly understand our client’s needs and provide them with optimal solutions. Our Project Management team works hand in hand with our Property Advisory team to provide a seamless end-to-end service.

At Spectrum Property & Projects, we believe in fostering a flexible, productive, and inclusive work environment that supports both our employees and the needs of our business. 

Our hybrid working culture blends the best of both remote and in-person work, while still maintaining the high level of collaboration and communication that is essential to our success. With the support of technology, clear guidelines, and a commitment to work-life balance, we are committed to creating a hybrid work environment that enables our employees to achieve their full potential and drive our business forward.

IDV primarily focuses on opportunistic acquisitions of land, industrial and office properties specifically in the Houston MSA and larger Texas Triangle area.

Name: Alpine Investments
Description:
Alpine Investments is a Denver-based real estate investment and development company focused on the design, development and construction of upscale, urban infill projects in high barrier-to-entry neighborhoods along Colorado’s Front Range.

Alpine targets off-market development opportunities in premier locations where thoughtful design, in-depth market and financial analysis, and superior execution will lead to premium rents and the creation of strong risk-adjusted returns for its investors.  Alpine supplements its own design, development, marketing and asset management expertise with a strong network of dedicated partners in order to create differentiated offerings that meet the demands of today’s sophisticated tenants and buyers.

Alpine raises project capital from friends & family, high net worth individuals, family offices and select institutional investors, depending on project size. Alpine is also involved in several co-GP and joint venture partnerships where additional asset class or operational expertise, balance sheet support, and/or capital is needed.

Le Cabinet Michel-Simond Aix-Marseille vous accompagne dans votre projet de cession ou de reprise sur l'ensemble du territoire des Bouches-du-Rhône.

Name: Melrose Arch
Description:
Melrose Arch captures the imagination, invades the senses and invites you into a sophisticated 21st century environment with its breathtaking new urban design that creates a rare quality of in and out-doors residential, commercial, retail and leisure spaces. Bustling with boutique browsers and café culture, Melrose Arch offers a truly international high street fashion experience, alfresco style, leading to the sparkling retail galleria that provides an open air stage in which over 100 of the country’s top retailers re-define the face and future of shopping.

Savor the unique tastes of twenty restaurants and coffee shops arranged around the Square and Piazza. Live, work, play, shop or stay, you’ll discover Melrose Arch’s people-friendly meeting places, amazing buildings and curved streets and a vibrant atmosphere that is simply out of this world! Discover why Melrose Arch has been voted the place to see and be seen for 8 consecutive years by the Leisure Options Best of Johannesburg Readers’ Choice Awards. You’ll believe it when you see it.

Name: The Comras Company
Description:

https://www.instagram.com/comrascompany/

Name: Evergreen Capital Strategies
Description:
Evergreen maximizes negotiated and discretionary incentives for our clients that are spending capital and creating jobs in all 50 states in the US. We work with clients to ensure that they capture incentives based on all aspects of their project in job creation, capital investment, energy infrastructure and beyond to enhance the ROI of the project.

Evergreen works with clients ranging from mid-size to large in capital intense industries to leverage their job creation and capital spend to maximize the incentive packages driven by federal, state and local governments and utilities.

Evergreen will negotiate on behalf of our clients using our skills in the space to aggressively drive more incentive dollars to the clients’ bottom line while enhancing the ROI of the project for our clients. With a high level of advisory and service minded delivery, Evergreen will push to assure that both the local community and our client locating in the community are treated fairly to create a “win-win” scenario for all parties. In using Evergreen’s services, we will assure to our clients that we will secure 50% higher incentive packages than they would on their own.

Evergreen was founded by two partners that in working with clients and Economic Development in the US and Globally saw a better and more client-centric approach to managing and maximizing the incentive process. At Evergreen, we work with clients in an advisory capacity so they can focus on their core business and at the same time be assured they left nothing on the table relative to incentives.

Evergreen is structured financially to only win when our clients win. Our success is tied to the amount of incentives we can secure for our clients and lends itself to total transparency in the process.

Our goal is to ensure timely and efficient transactions while maintaining the best interests of our clients through professionalism, integrity and the highest ethical standards.

Description:
Zinati Realty is a dedicated Sales and Leasing company servicing occupants and investors in the Ottawa area. We pride ourselves on having comprehensive knowledge of the local commercial real estate market, offering our expertise in retail, office, industrial, apartments, land, and other investments.

We are a result driven brokerage providing creative real estate solutions for commercial leasing and sales in the Ottawa area. We offer a complete range of real estate services to occupants, tenants, owners and investors while specializing in office, retail, industrial and land transactions.

With a passion for real estate and over 10 years of experience in Ottawa’s commercial real estate market, including property management, leasing and sales, John Zinati founded Zinati Realty Inc. We combine our sales and business knowledge to provide outstanding service for our office, retail, and warehouse property owners and clients. It’s our first priority to ensure that every one of our valued clients receives outstanding and personalized service in every interaction with us.

Name: Amplio
Description:
Amplio is a nonprofit organization with a mission to promote the growth of small businesses in Minnesota and nine counties in western Wisconsin.  We are a Certified Development Company, certified by the U. S. Small Business Administration to provide SBA 504 commercial loans in Minnesota.

Obtaining a small business loan can be complex. So let the SBA experts at Amplio handle it for you. We’re a Minnesota Certified Development Company (CDC) that originates SBA 504 loans in Minnesota and Western Wisconsin. With a commitment to excellence, a wealth of experience, and a team of experts, we are the go-to solution for technical due diligence reports, buyer's property inspection reports, quantity surveying services, CAD drawings services, and civil engineering consultations.

Our Services

1. Technical Due Diligence Reports

In a world where informed decisions are crucial, our technical due diligence reports serve as the bedrock for your investments and project planning. We meticulously assess properties, infrastructure, and assets to identify potential risks and opportunities. Our comprehensive reports are designed to provide you with a clear understanding of the technical aspects of your project or property, ensuring that you can make sound decisions.

2. Buyer's Property Inspection Reports

Buying a property is a significant investment. Our buyer's property inspection reports are designed to give you a complete picture of the condition of a property before you make your purchase. Our thorough inspections cover all critical aspects, from structural integrity to safety compliance, empowering you to negotiate effectively and make informed decisions.

3. Quantity Surveying Services

Cost management is a critical aspect of any construction project. Our quantity surveying services provide accurate cost estimation and management, ensuring that your project stays within budget. We assist in budget preparation, cost analysis, and procurement strategy development, ultimately saving you time and money.

4. CAD Drawings Services

In the digital age, accurate and detailed CAD drawings are essential for effective planning and execution. Our CAD drawing services provide you with precise and comprehensive architectural and engineering drawings.

Name: KWB Commercial Property Specialists
Description:
KWB is the leading independent firm of commercial property consultants in the Midlands. Initially specialising in office sales & lettings, KWB has evolved to offer a unique body of knowledge and expertise in commercial property with specialist teams. KWB Holdings Ltd comprises:

► KWB Office Agency Ltd - benefiting from an extensive portfolio of commercial properties, KWB has developed a strong sales and lettings reputation within Birmingham, Solihull and the M42 corridor. KWB also provides a professional search and acquisition service for our occupier clients.

► KWB Industrial Agency Ltd - specialises in all aspects of the industrial, logistics and warehousing markets across the West Midlands, with a broad knowledge base covering small industrial manufacturing units to larger warehouse and distribution facilities. We also provide a professional industrial search and acquisition service for our occupier clients.

► KWB Property Management Ltd – proactive property and asset management services that maximise the value of commercial property assets. Activities include building maintenance, health & safety, lease renewals, appealing business rates, valuations, residential block management.

► KWB Corporate Cleaning Ltd – professional cleaning service that offers intelligent, cost-effective solutions for maintaining a clean, hassle-free working environment for offices and commercial property.

► KWB Serviced Offices Ltd – serviced offices consultancy that utilises expertise across a variety of disciplines to provide invaluable advice to this area of the commercial property industry.

Members of RICS, Office Agents Society, Industrial Agents Society, British Council for Offices, EGi, Birmingham Office Market Forum.

Name: FOOD PLACE par Maison THIRIET
Description:
Le FOOD PLACE, centre de vie alimentaire premium de proximité a vu le jour en 2017 à Augny (57) sous l’impulsion de la MAISON THIRIET. Soucieuse de garantir à ses clients un environnement commercial alimentaire dynamique, une nouvelle expérience de consommation mais aussi d’enrichir l’environnement commercial de ses magasins, la MAISON THIRIET a élaboré le concept commercial du FOOD PLACE.
L’idée initiale du FOOD PLACE consiste à regrouper, sous un même toit, autour d’une même place, autour d’un même parking, un ensemble de commerçants et artisans, spécialistes des métiers de bouche et/ou de la restauration. 
Complémentaires dans leurs offres produits, ils sont tous animés par la qualité produits, le service clients, et le Bien Manger en général… 
Avec le FOOD PLACE, la MAISON THIRIET travaille en pleine complémentarité avec des artisans et commerçants locaux. 
Fiers de créer une nouvelle attractivité commerciale sur leur zone de chalandise, ils travaillent ensemble à dynamiser le commerce local grâce à un parcours marchand innovant, moderne et attractif pour devenir la place de marché nouvelle génération.

Name: 氪空间（Kr Space）
Description:
氪空间于2014年成立于北京中关村创业大街，是最早一批中关村管委会认定的“创新型孵化器”，2016年初从36氪拆分独立运作，并确定了联合办公的发展方向，2019年5月，氪空间确立了打造“全周期企业办公服务商”的新战略，完成从“联合办公”到“综合办公服务+新型资产管理”的业务模式升级。

目前氪空间已经覆盖北京、上海、香港、广州、杭州、南京、武汉、天津、苏州、厦门、合肥等11个城市，运营40多个联合办公社区，服务企业数量超过3000家，会员数超过50000个，在行业中处于领先地位。创孵方面，氪空间已累计孵化260+项目，融资总额50亿+，项目总估值超过300亿元人民币。

氪空间诞生的初心是解决小微团队办公难的问题，使命是“让办公更美好”，从用户需求出发推出更多围绕办公生态的服务，实现“赋能一亿人的快乐办公生活”的愿景。未来，氪空间将依托成熟的空间产品规划能力、领先的智能办公系统与数据分析能力、精细化资产运营管理能力和独具优势的创投和增值服务能力，通过综合办公服务和新型资产管理方式，深度覆盖全生命周期企业办公及发展需求。

The vision of Kr Space is to build a global leading co-working space network and community. Its mission is to solve the difficulty of SMBs and SMTs to find proper working space, and to provide a much better working environment. The slogan of Kr Space is “Be With The Best”. With its closed-loop of co-working space, service and community network, Kr Space aims to build global leading elite communities.

Kr Space has built up high quality co-working spaces tailored for SMBs and SMTs. Its product offerings include individual office, mobile desk and open office area, catering for companies of different size. By the end of January 2018, Kr Space has 30 co-working spaces in 9 cities (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Hangzhou, Nanjing, Wuhan, Tianjin, Suzhou and Chengdu), and it will enter Hong Kong, Tokyo, Singapore and other markets soon. 

Kr Space has attracted leading investors for its fast development. In January 2016, Kr Spaces was separated from its parent company 36Kr, started to operate independently and finished A round fundraising. In the following November, Kr Space received over 200 million RMB A+ round funding from Prometheus Capital and IDG Capital. In July and September 2017, it received several hundreds of million RMB investment in another A+ round funding from CMIG and IDG. In November 2017, Kr Space finished its Pre-B round funding of 600 million RMB.

Name: EXQUISITE BUILDCON PROJECTS. PVT. LTD.
Description:
The Company is Acting as Turnkey Executors for and on behalf of the Societies which are intending to explore, "Self-Redevelopment" of their Registered Society, within the Region of Mumbai.

Once the Company is appointed Irrevocably as an Executor by the Society, shall plan the Suitable strategy for the Re-Development of the Project, prepare feasibility projections, appoint appropriate team including Architect, Structural Engineers, Liaison Agency, mobilize required means / funding for Re-Development of the Society, Obtain required clearances and permissions, source required TDR, avail Fungible FSI by paying Premium for and on behalf of the Society, Supervise Development of the Project Execution as per approved Plans, Handover Redeveloped Apartments to the existing / eligible members of the Society, plan marketing strategy, promotion and Sales of the Sale Component Area of the Redeveloped Society preferably as per Strategy or post OC, and provide Exit to the Society from the Borrowing and debt, (Subject to Feasibility).

Please share Proposal of the Societies Eligible for Re-Development, having Resolution, Consent of over 50% and more members for initiating Self-Redevelopment Process, having Conveyance of the Plot, without any Encroachment, and intending to appoint a Turn Key Executors.

Society / Land Lord may please share IM of the Society / Plot, sharing complete details of the total Occupants of the Society with Notified Carpet Area of respective Members of the Society, Area of Land Parcel, how old is the Present Structure ? Configuration for the Present Apartments ? Width of the Road, Any D P Remarks ? DP Plan, Conveyance Agreement, Society Registration Certificate, Liabilities if any, Share Copy of the Property Card, Floor Plans of the Present Building ? FSI Consumed by the Developers / Society ? Share Google Coordinates / PIN of the Location of the Property, please email complete details of the Society for evaluation.

Name: Wallace Development Company Limited
Description:
Wallace Development Company limited began in 1982 with the purchase and development of five small industrial units in Pacific Place in Wanganui.

From these humble beginnings our company has seen strong and steady growth and now, with offices in Havelock North, Palmerston North, Auckland and Tauranga, we have hundreds of successful commercial property development projects under our belt, side by side with a substantial commercial leasing portfolio, nation-wide.

We are known for our professionalism, integrity and specialist knowledge, backed by over three decades of experience and stability in the marketplace.

PROPERTY DEVELOPMENT

Wallace Development Company Limited offers a comprehensive turn-key service for the development of new commercial properties and the redevelopment of existing buildings.

Our strength lies in providing the right premises in the right location with the right design to accommodate our clients’ business profile and operational needs.

The process encompasses analysis of client requirements, site selection and procurement, the preparation of concept plans and design specifications followed by project management of the development from construction to handover.

We work closely with companies such as Omega Engineering and DesignCo to ensure a universally high level of expertise and experience is brought to every project.

COMMERCIAL LEASING AND PURCHASE

Our specialised leasing team excels in matching business premises and clients.

For new commercial property developments, we can procure purchasers or lessees for the premises and manage the leases on an ongoing basis.

We are skilled in the resolution of pre-existing leasing or ownership commitments and should a client have specific leasing requirements we can, with a tenancy agreement in place, either develop new premises for them from scratch or purchase and then upgrade, renovate, expand or adapt existing buildings to meet their needs.

Name: Triple O Campus Breda
Description:
De Triple O Campus is het centrum voor creativiteit en technologie in Breda en omstreken! Een groene en rustige oase in de stad. Bijna 100 bedrijven en uit verschillende disciplines werken hier samen. 

De aanwezigheid van de gezamenlijke buitenruimte, studio’s, huiskamer VONK en de vergaderruimten dragen bij aan de onderlinge samenwerking. De campus draait om het netwerk. Nieuwe mensen leren kennen, samenwerken, borrels, synergie, voetballen op het gras, maar ook uitbreiding van zowel het vrienden-, maar voornamelijk zakelijke netwerk. De campus omvat het Blushuis, AV Huis, Merkhuis, Posthuis, Pakhuis maar ook bedrijven als Handpicked Agencies, Grosfeld Bekkers van der Velde en Blogic Media. Men begrijpt men elkaar en spreekt dezelfde taal. De meeste units worden bevolkt met het creatiefste deel van de provincie.

Op de Triple O Campus werkt een cluster van bedrijven dat een groot scala van creativiteit vertegenwoordigt. Creativiteit op het gebied van vormgeving, film, technologie en zoveel meer. Creativiteit van het woord en ook van het beeld. 

Als creatief bedrijf gedij je goed in zo’n sfeer. Bezig met een grote opdracht? En heb je expertise nodig die je zelf niet hebt of extra handjes nodig die je tekort komt? Een paar deuren verder vind je vaak de oplossing al. Werken wordt dan snel samenwerken.

Name: Coniston Industrial Park Limited
Description:
About Us:
The “Coniston Industrial Park Limited”, also known as “CIP” is a company that was incorporated in 1990. Prior to this, the site was home to a smelter, owned and operated by “The Mond Nickel Company”. Construction of the smelter began in 1911 and the operations subsequently concluded in 1972. During this time, The Mond Nickel Company was absorbed by INCO (VALE). The smelter was later demolished in 1976 and INCO began the transforming the area into an industrial park.

Products and Services:
The CIP offers a wide range of services including but not limited to a diverse range of leasing opportunities, warehousing services, logistics, transportation, on site amenities and complimenting business operations.

More well-known locations are the office complex, cinema Kinepolis in Groningen, building "Parktoren" at Station Arnhem Centraal, office complex Il Fiore in Maastricht and TRIBES Eindhoven Airport (Flight Forum 840).

Name: Immo Industry Group
Description:
IIG regretfully announces that IIG Belgium filed for bankruptcy.

In September 2008, IIG was hit by the liquidation of Jersey based Belgravia Asset Management. Together with IIG’s own funds and additional funds, Belgravia invested in IIG’s projects in CEE, through project financing and the acquisition of completed projects. Belgravia’s liquidation had a significant impact on IIG’s cash flow position.

When IIG turned to the financial market to address its liquidity requirements, it was faced with a heavy storm, as the bank crisis was at its peak. The global economic crisis led financial institutions to refuse project financing to IIG, despite the fact that IIG’s business model consists of strong company guarantees by IIG’s clients. As a consequence, IIG was forced to increase its own project financing share. In addition, IIG was confronted with the effect of weakening currencies in Central Europe. As early as October 2008, IIG started negotiations towards a significant capital increase and attracting new project financing sources. In Q4 of 2008, IIG implemented a series of cost saving measures, including the departure of 16 staff members at headquarters. Earlier this month, these measures were followed up with a cost saving exercise at IIG’s foreign offices.

IIG's repeated requests to its banks to provide sufficient working capital was not heeded. The decision impacts directly on 74 employees and consultants at headquarters and indirectly on 137 employees abroad. 

The company has several important assets towards potentially interested parties: a strong sales pipeline, a portfolio with several completed or almost completed projects, a business model that works even in times of crisis and a motivated and well qualified work force.

All interested parties are invited to contact the liquidator, Mrs Marga Pieters, at marga.pieters@pandora.be

Description:
Jesteśmy szybko rozwijającym się inwestorem w zakresie prowadzenia kompletnego procesu inwestycyjnego, związanego z budową i komercjalizacją parków handlowych na terenie Polski. 

Głównym założeniem EDS Retail Park jest kompleksowa realizacja projektu:
 pozyskanie atrakcyjnego gruntu pod nieruchomość
 projekt budowlany oraz wykonawstwo
 komercjalizacja powierzchni
 oddanie do użytkowania

Bazując na wieloletnim doświadczeniu, wszystkie inwestycje realizowane przez EDS Retail Park charakteryzują się uznanymi i popularnymi najemcami sieciowymi, pozyskanymi w drodze wnikliwej analizy lokalizacji każdego z obiektów. Realizujemy parki handlowe przy kluczowych dla danego regionu drogach wojewódzkich lub krajowych, ze szczególnym uwzględnieniem doskonale funkcjonującej sieci połączeń komunikacji miejskiej. Często budowane przez nas parki handlowe są pierwszymi tego typu obiektami w poszczególnych miejscowościach, co dodatkowo wpływa na wartość projektu.

Zaangażowanie, profesjonalizm i unikalne podejście do realizowanych inwestycji owocuje kolejnymi realizacjami. Dzięki zaufaniu największych marek handlowych w branży spożywczej, kosmetycznej, czy RTV-AGD, a także lokalnych przedsiębiorcy i usługodawców, możemy się poszczycić wartościowymi projektami, mającymi znaczący wpływ na rozwój sieci handlowych w Polsce. Name: Jubilee Place
Description:
Jubilee Place, located within one of Brisbane’s most vibrant and well-established commercial hubs on the corner of St Pauls Terrace and Symes Street, Fortitude Valley, combines state-of-the-art technology and design with classic heritage to create Brisbane’s most impressive commercial development.

Jubilee Place will catalyse the revitalisation of one of Brisbane’s most treasured places, the Jubilee Hotel – an iconic gathering place that has played a much-loved part in Brisbane’s history for over a century. The development will benefit from the Hotel’s beautiful heritage character sitting alongside the modern architecture and authentic structural expression of Jubilee Place. 

Designed in an integrated manner by Blight Rayner, and currently under construction by Watpac, Jubilee Place will be a 14-storey A-Grade office asset with approximately 17,500m² NLA.

Robert Bird Group’s impressive exoskeleton structure, a response to site constraints imposed by the Clem 7 tunnel below, provides a unique design identity whilst also enabling an impressively flexible floorplate, floor to ceiling glass and unobstructed views of Brisbane’s CBD. 

Designed to inspire productivity and wellness at work, Jubilee Place is a destination focused on supporting its tenants and their people. 

In a nod to project quality and certainty, Watpac has committed to locate its head office within Jubilee Place upon completion. Co-working giant IWG’s Spaces co-working hub will also be housed on levels 1 – 5, facilitating on-site flexible workplace options.

Jubilee Place is being developed by JGL Properties in partnership with Credit Suisse Asset Management, who will be represented locally by Kirsty Smith of Kelen Property during delivery phase.

Office leasing enquiries should be directed to JLL’s Connor O'Shea or Colliers International’s Shane Van Beest.

Retail leasing enquiries should be directed to Chesters Real Estate's Greer Gittoes or Michael Platsis.

Name: Commercial Real Estate Alliance for Tomorrow's Employees (CREATE)
Description:
The Commercial Real Estate Alliance for Tomorrow’s Employees (CREATE) educates a diverse workforce and connects career-ready candidates to employers in the Commercial Real Estate (CRE) industry.

Since 2011, CREATE has educated hundreds of students from San Francisco State University and Merritt College, both of which are recognized as having among the most diverse student populations in the nation. Approximately 30% of these students have been hired directly into the industry upon graduation. CREATE’s signature program is the 16-module, 32-hour Fellows curriculum facilitated by industry subject matter experts. Student Fellows learn the fundamentals of the industry and about the career opportunities in commercial real estate. The experience is enhanced by mentoring, job shadowing, building tours, internships and networking as well as the free career portal that connects students with employers offering internships and entry-level jobs.

CREATE connects students to local employers via an alliance of the following associations:
BOMA San Francisco
BOMA Oakland/East Bay
IREM San Francisco Bay Area Chapter
NAIOP San Francisco Bay Area Chapter

Name: Vector90
Description:
Vector90 is a coworking space and start-up incubator located in the inner cities around the United States. We partner with local heroes and the local government to develop the space to best suit the needs of the community. Vector90’s mission is to build and bring a community of entrepreneurship to the inner cities of America, starting with our local community of Los Angeles. 

Our goals are two-fold: 1. Supporting and developing local entrepreneurs and businesses, and 2. helping eliminate opportunity gaps that exist for women and minority groups. We’re dedicated to targeting underrepresented populations, such as minority and women entrepreneurs, in the most successful sectors of the economy.

Vector90's ultimate goal is to replicate this model in inner cities throughout the United States, partnering with local influencers and the local government in each market to create spaces that are both relevant and resonant with the local community. Vector90 plans on developing intellectual and cultural hubs for entrepreneurs and creatives which will heighten the existing social and economic fabric of each neighborhood we grow into.

Name: Empire Capital Holdings
Description:
Empire is an independent private partnership of investment professionals with hands-on experience and capital market expertise. Empire professionals have overseen extensive investments and joint ventures and have invested with a focus on commercial real estate through a broad range of opportunistic investments. Empire professionals have built a successful track record across multiple asset classes and market cycles. Empire’s professionals are a high energy, results oriented team, allowing us to carefully analyze and act quickly as circumstances warrant.

Empire professionals have structured complex real estate investments and joint ventures establishing a strong track record across multiple asset classes.
Empire’s approach targets both income-producing and opportunistic assets in New York City, both independently and as participants in joint venture opportunities.
 
Strategy
 
Income Producing Opportunities
Empire invests in income-producing assets with the following characteristics:
High-Quality/Creditworthy Tenancy
Future Conversion or Repositioning Potential
Sale-Leaseback Arrangements
Transitioning submarkets with statistical and circumstantial evidence suggesting significant growth
Assets with inefficient management requiring new leasing strategies, active management, physical capital improvements, and opportunities to renegotiate undervalued leases
Unique architectural features or historical significance
 
Value-Add Opportunities
 
Empire also executes conversions and repositioning projects to realize the highest and best use of an asset, including:
Opportunities to bifurcate mixed-use assets to sell the retail, residential or office components in separate transactions while retaining others at a reduced basis
Distressed assets requiring an expedited sale due to external circumstances
Acquisition of existing assets for conversion below replacement cost
Repositioning existing assets to realize highest and best use
Development assemblage opportunities (simultaneous transactions with multiple owners of adjacent lots)
Acquisition of loans

Notre savoir-faire repose sur la parfaite connaissance de notre métier, de la recherche d’emplacement à la commercialisation en passant par la gestion intégrale des projets de construction. Notre société à taille humaine a construit son projet sur trois valeurs fortes : 

  * QUALITÉ : La qualité est le fil conducteur de chaque projet réalisé par RJO. Celle-ci se manifeste en premier lieu par le choix des meilleurs emplacements, adaptés aussi bien à l’investissement locatif qu’à l’accession à la propriété. In recent years, millions of sqm of office, industrial and logistics space as well as development sites have successfully been completed. Beside the domestic markets in Austria and Slovakia, Modesta Real Estate also assists in numerous transactions in the CEE markets and supports its international partners with corporate real estate advice. The Managing Partners Andreas Polak-Evans, SIOR, and Sebastian Scheufele, SIOR, have more than 15 years of exclusively, commercial real estate experience. 

Modesta Real Estate is an expert in finding investment properties, offices, logistics, industrial and commercial real estate in Austria or the CEE region, together with the subsequent location analyses and contract negotiations. Modesta Real Estate also offers professional advisory and valuations, corporate real estate services as well as the implementation of highly efficient marketing strategies for existing properties. With their in-depth knowledge, they help clients to make the right decisions regarding property specific questions. Modesta Real Estate’s network extends from the two office locations in Vienna and Bratislava across Austria and the CEE region and consists of European and American investment companies and private investors.

Name: GVZ Europark Coevorden-Emlichheim GmbH
Description:
Op de grens van Nederland en Duitsland, tussen Coevorden en Emlichheim, ligt het bedrijventerrein GVZ Europark. De combinatie van de perfecte logistieke mogelijkheden, de variabele bouwkavels en het uitstekende prijs/kwaliteitsniveau, maakt bedrijventerrein GVZ Europark een interessante vestigingslocatie voor bestaande en nieuwe ondernemers!

Het bedrijventerrein GVZ Europark onderscheidt zich door zijn logistieke mogelijkheden per spoor, weg en water. Uniek aan dit bedrijventerrein is de strategische ligging op de Duitse-Nederlandse grens, tussen Coevorden en Emlichheim. Dit betekent directe toegang tot de Nederlandse én de Duitse markt. Inmiddels zijn er al veel succesvolle bedrijven gevestigd op het GVZ Europark. Het bedrijventerrein is in totaal 350 hectare groot. Er is nog ruimte beschikbaar voor meerdere nieuwe vestigingen. Er zijn ruime mogelijkheden in bouw, kavelgrootte en milieuklasse in een aantrekkelijke werkomgeving, dus ook bedrijven met een grote ruimtebehoefte vinden hier een geschikte kavel. Bovendien zijn er uitstekende mogelijkheden voor duurzame energievoorzieningen. 

Vanwege de aanwezige infrastructuur en het brede aanbod van diverse voorzieningen is het Europark bijzonder geschikt voor logistieke bedrijven en voor logistiek afhankelijke industrieën. De Duitse en Nederlandse spoornetten komen hier bijeen op de openbare railterminal Euroterminal Coevorden. Het spoor sluit bovendien direct aan op de naastgelegen haven. En op korte afstand van de autowegen A37/E233 en A31.

Dit verklaart tevens de formele GVZ-status (GüterVerkehrsZentrum) van het Europark.

Name: JMP Expansion SA
Description:
Une histoire et un patrimoine à votre service

Nous partageons depuis 35 ans la vie du commerce, une histoire de lieu, d’échanges, de réciprocité...
La pratique du terrain nous a permis d’envisager l’ensemble de la dimension marchande et de ses exigences. 
Des engagements comme le service, la convivialité, l’attention et la relation aux autres, nous ont poussé à développer des projets pertinents.
L’expertise de chacun de nos collaborateurs est de mettre en oeuvre ces derniers, cette dynamique à taille humaine nous place comme acteur référent de l‘immobilier commercial en France.
Le monde a changé radicalement ces dernières années. La place du Commerce et de l’individu consommateur est bouleversée. Pour y répondre, notre parti pris est clair : placer l’individu citoyen au cœur de nos conceptions, pour garantir une réponse porteuse de sens sociétale et génératrice de lien.
Un de nos engagements fort la protection de l’environnement : apporter une réponse sur mesure aux différents enjeux de la société et aux objectifs des collectivités locales, comme la durabilité de nos projets indissociable de la dimension  environnementale. Désormais nos projets sont développés  visant une certification BREEAM ou HQE.
Enfin afin de répondre au mieux aux exigences du marché, à la volonté des élus et à la diversification du territoire, nous nous orientons vers plus de mixité dans le choix et la réalisation de nos projets. 
JMP Expansion aménage des espaces d’habitation intégrant une programmation mixte avec commerces, logements, institutions, résidences collectifs pour personnes âgées, crèches …
Pour répondre aux besoins sociétaux et économiques du marché de la maison individuelle, JMP Expansion développe son savoir-faire en lotissement et se positionne aujourd'hui également en tant qu'aménageur.
Notre conviction est que le travail effectué aujourd’hui écrit l’histoire de demain, travail toujours géré avec le même bon sens et la même passion depuis 35 ans.

Name: Strategic Asset Services
Description:
Strategic Asset Services was formed with the goal of elevating the quality of annual lender property inspections as a collateral monitoring tool. The company has been providing superior property inspections to the industry since 1997. With training programs, strong supervision, and perspectives gained through the extensive outsourcing services provided by the experienced professionals of SPA, SAS uniquely understands the needs of the various end users of inspection reports. For annual compliance, lender assumption underwriting, disbursement reviews, watch-list criteria, and default management, our inspection reports are thorough, providing maximum utility, information, and accuracy. 

Due to our stellar track record in meeting deadlines and our consistent report quality, many of our clients who rank among the leaders of the industry, have chosen SAS as their exclusive inspection vendor. We not only provide timely and consistent reports on key property and market characteristics to determine the property's current condition, but we also specifically identify issues that may adversely impact future revenue and provide red flag alerts requiring additional client review. The quality of our inspections is a direct result of the high caliber of individuals at SAS.

Con la impronta que nos distingue y una fuerte actitud vanguardista nos encontramos en la búsqueda de fusionar el clasicismo del estilo arquitectónico de París con las mas innovadoras tendencias europeas. Este proyecto promete ser el nuevo emblema de Nordelta, promoviendo marcas que compartan los valores que perseguimos. Nuestra visión de Chateau Portal es una experiencia que genere una conexión emocional, recreando una forma de vida en esencia parisina que se evoca a través de todos los sentidos.
Comprometidos a generar de cada ocasión un momento memorable: Un desayuno sobre tu balcón francés, una reunión de trabajo en tu café favorito, un encuentro de compras, un espacio de relax en el spa o una cena romántica en el interior de la Plaza. 

El equilibrio entre lo sofisticado de la ciudad y un espacio distendido.

Name: Seven Square by Kapset
Description:
Seven Square est le nouveau fleuron architectural du groupe Kapset conçu en superposition bureaux-hôtel. Situé en plein cœur de Casablanca à l’angle du boulevard Sidi Abderrahman et à proximité de Casablanca Finance City (CFC), l’immeuble nouvelle génération Seven Square a été pensé pour proposer aux futurs locataires une qualité de vie professionnelle aux standards internationaux et à la hauteur de leurs aspirations.

Doublement certifié WELL et HQE, Seven Square est le seul immeuble bureaux-hôtel Casablancais qui répond à un double enjeu: celui d’un projet mixte, muti-usage, fonctionnel et répondant parfaitement aux attentes du marché et aux nouvelles tendances mondiales, et celui de la volonté de proposer une œuvre architecturale équilibrée, singulière et dédiée au bien-être des futurs locataires au cœur de Casablanca.

Un défi accepté et relevé par les équipes et partenaires de Kapset qui, animés par la volonté d’innover et faire différemment, ont proposé une architecture qui répartit les composantes du projet verticalement sur 7 étages autour d’un espace central végétalisé, le tout, avec un style architectural contemporain.
 
- Au Rez-de-chaussée: les services corporatifs et commerces, salles de conférence et restaurants
- Aux 4 premiers étages: 13 000 m2 de plateaux bureaux
- Aux 3 derniers étages: un hôtel et un rooftop avec une vue imprenable sur Casablanca.

Faites partie d’un projet novateur conçu « Like Nowhere Else » au cœur de Casablanca.

Réservez votre rendez-vous au 05 22 94 94 04

Incorporated in 1928, the Oklahoma City Association of Building Owners and Managers represents and promotes the interests of the commercial real estate industry through leadership, education, advocacy, information and networking.  Currently, our real estate members represent over 37 million square feet of commercial property in the central Oklahoma area.

BOMA Oklahoma City fosters cooperation among all who are interested in the management and ownership of real estate, particularly owners and managers of commercial office, corporate, government, institutional, medical, loft or apartment buildings and shopping centers.

BOMA Oklahoma City promotes the professional and educational growth of members through the exchange of ideas of interest in the construction, maintenance, management and ownership of commercial real estate, including legislation, taxation, insurance and other matters of public interest.

BOMA Oklahoma City works to improve the conditions pertaining to the ownership, management and operation of commercial real estate.  BOMA OKC is the spokesman for members in matters affecting development, ownership and operation of commercial real estate and make representations to the various offices of government in that respect.

Wij mikken op kleine dynamische, positieve en creatieve ondernemers, op zoek naar ruimte om hun verhaal verder vorm te geven.
