Name: SANIFAIR
Description: 2004 als hundertprozentige Tochtergesellschaft der Tank & Rast GmbH gegründet, ist SANIFAIR seit jeher führender Anbieter für flexible Sanitärkonzepte im öffentlichen Raum – beziehungsweise dort, wo die globale mobile Gesellschaft einen Stopp einlegt, sei es an Raststätten, Bahnhöfen oder in Einkaufszentren. Zunächst in Deutschland beginnend, finden sich SANIFAIR Standorte heute in ganz Europa. Als Anbieter für Sanitärkonzepte verfolgen wir stets das Ziel, ein angenehmes Erlebnis außerhalb der eigenen Wände zu schaffen. SANIFAIR steht für das gute Gefühl in jeder Situation – vor, bei und nach dem Besuch. Dies erreichen wir durch kompromisslose Sauberkeit und Hygiene unserer kontaktlosen Ausstattung, innovative technische Elemente („State of the Art“), maßstabsetzende zertifizierte Qualitäts- und Servicestandards, eine diskrete Wohlfühlatmosphäre und ein faires Preis-Leistungsverhältnis.

Name: Escrick Park Estate
Description:
Escrick Park can provide the perfect working environment.  Avoid the traffic chaos and take a short drive out of York to our tranquil workspace.  Small to medium offices available, complete with all modern facilities, a landlord who cares and a dedicated team on hand to help with any issues.

We are a small business with years of experience in property lettings and management.  Owned by the same family for 300 years, we retain the historic detail but with a modern outlook.  

Also available, land hire for weddings or corporate functions, horse riding course, holiday homes for sale.

Call us now for more details.

In 2021 we began developing our vision for Heronby - a carefully masterplanned new village, inspired by the character and function of traditional North Yorkshire communities, and fit for the 21st century. 

Heronby will lie to the south west of the village of Escrick, midway between Selby and York, on a site owned by Escrick Park Estate. It will have its own market square with a high street, business space, new schools and a broad mix of homes to meet the needs of families, first time buyers and older people. 

The proposal for Heronby is in response to Selby District Council’s requirement to allocate land for new homes in its emerging Local Plan which provides a template for future development up to 2040. 

Escrick Park Estate is committed to ensuring Heronby is an enduring success. It is investing in the development of a masterplan for Heronby and inviting the community to share ideas as part of the design phase. Visit www.heronby.co.uk for more information.

Name: Collective Barcelona | Coworking & Business Lounge

Con una ubicación extraordinaria en pleno corazón de Barcelona, Collective ofrece diferentes tipos de espacios de trabajo, oficinas privadas y salas de reuniones para elevar tu negocio al siguiente nivel.

Collective es mucho más que un espacio de trabajo, ofreciendo tantas ventajas como puedas imaginar, desde 4 amplias y soleadas terrazas con vistas panorámicas de Barcelona, phone booths privados, mobiliario de diseño de alta gama y descuentos en restaurantes y servicios seleccionados.

Además, Collective ofrece un exclusivo programa de eventos en los que incluye business networkings, charlas con speakers cualificados, afterworks y mucho más.

Ven y descúbrelo!

Description:
Attivi nel Sultanato dal 2017, proponiamo operazioni di investimento immobiliare condivise con partner del settore e/o di mero investimento.
Se sei un imprenditore del settore costruzioni / operazioni immobiliari, e ti interessa investire in uno dei paesi con maggior tasso di crescita nel settore specifico, con noi puoi attivare immediatamente una o più operazioni immobiliari tra quelle che abbiamo attive e a portfolio.
Siamo disponibili a valutare operazioni su richieste specifiche (sia in partnership che solo seguendoti e fornendoti tutto il know-how locale necessario).

Active in the Sultanate since 2017, we offer real estate investment operations shared with partners in the sector and / or for mere investment.
If you are an entrepreneur in the construction / real estate operations sector, and you are interested in investing in one of the countries with the highest growth rate in the specific sector, with us you can immediately activate one or more real estate operations among those we have active and in our portfolio.
We are available to evaluate operations on specific requests (both in partnership and only by following you and providing you with all the necessary local know-how).

Name: RDC Properties Limited
Description:
Welcome to RDC Properties Limited – the first property listed company on the Botswana Stock Exchange. Registered in 1992 and restructured in a Variable Rate Loan stock in 1996.

The company actively achieves long-term, income-generating investments in a diverse range of property sectors, ensuring a stable growth to the investor. The growth of the portfolio is achieved by acquisitions of yielding properties, developments and acquiring turn-key developments carried out under our management oversight.

Our properties, generally considered of a prime nature are geographically situated in Botswana, South Africa (Western Cape), Madagascar, we are presently carrying out developments in Botswana, South Africa, Mozambique, Namibia and the USA, each property and all developments are selected to provide a strong revenue and substantial capital growth.

The company is committed to achieving exceptional returns by creating partnerships with local investors, diversifying the portfolio geographically within the Southern African regional and taking advantage of sectors of the economy that are foreign currency hedged and captive.

Name: Rafinia Property Group
Description:
Rafinia Property Group is a family owned and operated commercial real estate investment, management and leasing company.

We strive to acquire multi tenant, income producing, high cap rate commercial properties around the United States.

With an experienced management team in place, all of our properties are managed meticulously. Our team works diligently on a daily basis to keep the properties running flawlessly.

Our leasing team has developed relationships with hundreds of tenants nationwide, giving us the advantage to add value to our assets through leasing. Some featured tenants we work with include; Food Lion, Save-A-Lot, Dollar General, Dollar Tree, Family Dollar, Goody’s, O’Reilly Auto Parts, Planet Fitness, Burger King, AT&T,  Subway and more.

We specialize in retail, office, industrial and land properties for lease and for sale.

Name: Selwyn Property Group
Description:
Selwyn Property Group is a leader in Southeastern industrial, office and retail asset management, acquisitions, development and brokerage, which offers a proven track record of performance and public-private cooperation, a growing real estate portfolio and more than 75 years of combined industry experience. Our commercial real estate project experience is concentrated in the Carolinas, Virginia and Georgia, where our partners have developed properties in excess of over $1 billion and total more than twelve million square feet.

The three partners of Selwyn Property Group bring together diverse and complementary areas of expertise gained from years at larger development firms, and are skilled in large-scale projects as well as smaller developments in the $1 million – $10 million price range.

Since its inception in Rochester, Minnesota in 1979, Hamilton Real Estate, Inc. has gained a reputation as innovative, dependable and trustworthy, providing all the requisite skills to successfully meet our client’s needs and desires.

Name: RailField
Description:
RailField is a multifamily investment/asset management firm that focuses on high-quality assets while seeking to minimize risk, generate above-market returns to investors, and create a sense of community for our residents.  We partner with a wide range of investors such as family offices, pension funds, and private equity firms and recently closed a fund anchored by Citibank focused on the preservation of affordable housing. Since our formation in 2013, our portfolio has consisted of 14 properties with approximately 4,500 units in 8 markets in the Mid-Atlantic, Southeast, and Texas.

Our partners, each with over 25+ years’ experience, have held prominent executive level positions in the multifamily industry, including leading Fannie Mae's multifamily division.  We have completed over $215 billion in transactions and have extensive experience growing multifamily portfolios while working together for two decades. With nearly a century of collective experience, our management team brings unparalleled expertise as investors and fiduciaries, in addition to offering a unique national perspective to identifying and creating value across the spectrum of multifamily assets. 

We are actively seeking investment opportunities and partners.  For more information, please contact us at 240.743.3315 or visit us at:  www.railfieldrealty.com.

Minority-owned business.

Name: UCLA Real Estate Alumni Group (REAG)
Description:
The UCLA Real Estate Alumni Group is a membership-based organization open to alumni of UCLA who are employed in or affiliated with the commercial real estate industry. UCLA REAG has established a dynamic and enthusiastic membership and board of directors who create programming aimed at connecting alumni to each other and to the real estate industry at large. We also encourage and facilitate alumni involvement with the University and with the UCLA Ziman Center for Real Estate. 

Membership in UCLA REAG is open to graduates of UCLA from any school within the University. Detailed information on membership options, as well as a full calendar of events, is available at www.uclareag.org.

Name: Cherry Associates
Description:
From Start-Ups to Am-Law 100 law firms, Cherry Associates is your partner for corporate real estate strategy, process, and tactical execution.

Cherry Associates was founded on the principle of relationships that extend beyond our clients’ leases. Our experts are here to advise and counsel, not just on the initial lease, but throughout the entire cycle of each lease in our client’s portfolio. We bring over 96 years of experience negotiating and advocating on behalf of legal, corporate, financial, technology, and professional services clients.

Our core competencies are summed up into two key specialties; Occupier Advisory and Portfolio Management. The two share many of the same disciplines, with the exception that our portfolio clients have multiple locations. Many of our clients started out by looking for a single location, and many still maintain just one office or facility today. Our Occupier Advisory platform is comprised of Workplace Strategy and Transaction Management and is tailored to ensure that any corporate real estate need can be met, regardless of size.

Description:

Sitting directly across from Buffalo Niagara International Airport with access to major roads and highways, our campus is just moments away from downtown Buffalo and surrounding suburbs making it the perfect location for your business to set up shop in Western New York!  

Currently there is 120,000 square feet of both Class A, B and build to suit space available.  We are largely owner occupied by Calspan Corporation with additional anchor tenants including NRG, CUBRC and Harper International.  The tenants in our community enjoy top notch amenities such as 24/7 security, monitoring and access controls, onsite property maintenance staff, a 24/7 fitness center, a courtyard patio, shared conference and event spaces along with arguably WNY's premier cafeteria, "The Eatery at Calspan".

We are home to a variety of industries and welcome you to come view our Better Place To Work - call to schedule a tour today!

Name: Commercial Space (Commercial Property in Cape Town)
Description:
Commercial space assists you in locating your office, warehouse or commercial property investment.

"Effective use of property can increase profitability, attract quality staff, enhance your image and make your business more efficient and easy to run.”

We realize the importance of property to your business as it is an issue which impacts on every company in Cape Town. It is vital that businesses think about property issues and the effect that property – from use to location – has on competitiveness.

In Cape Town we are noticing significant change in the property market and any successful business cannot afford to ignore this key area.

For most companies property is the second highest business cost.

Commercial property usually represents over a third of total business assets;
and running costs can be the second highest cost after wages. Property is therefore key to business success: not only does it dominate your financial
statements, but it can also provide real competitive advantage through its location, the working and sales environments it provides, and
the image and profile it supports.

A lack of strategic awareness around property means that many companies have little knowledge of their property costs.

Zu diesem Zweck wollen sich die Zentren nicht nur untereinander besser vernetzen, sondern auch mit anderen Organisationen und Einrichtungen im Land zusammenarbeiten und kooperieren. Furthermore, our approach leads to a reduction in corporate overhead costs, optimizing financial resources for greater profitability. By streamlining operations and strategically positioning your company for efficient project execution, we contribute to significant cost savings.

-Push the boundaries in every facet of commercial real estate through provocative dialogue among peers drawn from every discipline in the industry
-Provide educational programs which directly affect your day-to-day work and promote real change
-Encourage our members to be a force for activism and involvement in our communities.

Name: Coop Ejendomme
Description:
I Coop er retail og real estate tæt forbundet. Derfor knokler mere end 70 specialiserede medarbejdere i Coop Ejendomme hver dag på at sikre, at butikkerne i Coop Danmark A/S har de bedst mulige fysiske betingelser og rammer. 

I Coop Ejendomme arbejder vi med alle områder fra køb og salg af ejendomme, udvikling og byg af nye butikker, udvidelser, konverteringer og flytninger af eksisterende butikker, indgåelse af lejekontrakter og etablering af butikken til understøttelse af den efterfølgende drift af bygning og teknik samt energispareprojekter. 

Vi opererer bredt fra strategiske projekter, der bl.a. skal sikre, at Coop i højere grad ejer de ejendomme, hvorfra der drives butikker, til driftsopfølgning for butikkerne i alle kæder. 

Bæredygtighed er desuden et af koncernens største fokusområder og er derfor et vigtigt og bredt spor i arbejdet med vores butiks- og ejendomsportefølje og ved nye investeringer. Coop Ejendomme arbejder fx på to store projekter, hvor der stræbes efter DGNB Guld-certificering: En nybygget Coop 365discount butik på Hvissinge Torv i Glostrup og Coop Byen - en ny, bæredygtig bydel med plads til 4.500 beboere rundt om Coops hovedkontor i Albertslund.

Hvis du vil vide mere om vores spændende rejse, så følg med her på LinkedIn eller på info.coop.dk/kontakt/ejendomme-kontakt/

Name: IEFM
Description:

Notre modèle de Facility Management intégré, repose sur la réalisation en propre de la plupart des prestations, en faisant le moins possible appel à des prestataires extérieurs. Réaliser les services avec nos propres collaborateurs, c’est nous donner l’opportunité de créer et d’exploiter les synergies entre les  différentes prestations que nous délivrons. Le développement de la polyvalence des équipes et la montée en compétence des personnes permettent d’optimiser les processus, la gestion des moyens, la qualité de service ainsi que les coûts de production.
Nous connaissons parfaitement les hommes et les femmes qui délivrent nos prestations au quotidien et sommes ainsi en capacité de faire évoluer ou moduler notre solution selon vos besoins et vos enjeux.

IEFM répond aux besoins des clients qui souhaitent se recentrer sur leur cœur de métier et confier les prestations annexes à des experts.

IEFM vous propose une palette de services variés que vous pouvez à tous moment personnaliser en fonction de vos besoins dans le cadre d’un pack facilities qui sera géré et coordonné par nos experts.

Name: Spatium
Description:
En Spatium ofrecemos los espacios ideales para mantener el equilibrio y la maximización del funcionamiento de la empresa, conectando con potenciales proveedores y/o clientes de la región. 

El mundo laboral ya no es el mismo, por lo cual estas grandes corporaciones tienen el reto de mantener su identidad corporativa, la productividad de sus colaboradores y la optimización de sus gastos operativos, bajo un esquema híbrido entre el home office y la oficina tradicional. 

Spatium es una empresa creada en el año 2015 en ciudad de Panamá, con el concepto de Centro de Negocios, enfocando la optimización de los costos operativos de pequeñas y medianas empresas. 

En el año 2018 sumamos a la oferta de valor, ofreciendo espacios abiertos de coworking, dirigidos a freelancers, emprendedores y profesionales independientes. 

Posteriormente, en el año 2020 las operaciones se expanden hacia la ciudad de Santo Domingo, República Dominicana, orientando el ofrecimiento de espacios flexibles para multinacionales y brindando espacios de Networking personalizado. 

En este último tiempo nos dimos cuenta que en la nueva realidad post-pandemia, grandes compañías se han visto forzadas a funcionar bajo el sistema de home-office/teletrabajo, teniendo inconvenientes en la cohesión de sus equipos, y en algunos casos perdiendo identidad corporativa. 

El mundo laboral ya no es el mismo, por lo cual estas grandes corporaciones tienen el reto de mantener su identidad corporativa, la productividad de sus colaboradores y la optimización de sus gastos operativos, bajo un esquema híbrido entre el home office y la oficina tradicional. 

Spatium es un Centro de Negocios en el que, gracias a nuestra experiencia, networking y equipo de alto nivel, ofrecemos más que espacios, una alianza estratégica para potenciar la operación de nuestros clientes.

Name: ARGENCONS
Description:
Since 1969 Argencons has been developing major ventures and is recognized for its reliability, the security of its proposals, and the widespread reception and esteem given to its innovative products.
At the peak of the 70’s, Argencons takes on the planning of a city block in Palermo bound by Ugarteche, Segui, Scalabrini Ortiz and Cerviño streets, hitting a milestone with the creation and development of the first complex with an infrastructure for security, amenities and leisure (the “luxury building” model used by all today).
In the 90’s—a period marked by economic growth, deregulation, and access to credit—Argencons learned to see the importance of incorporating the latest technology and creating offers tailored to the client, with strong added value, creating the Quartier brand, synonymous with top-notch residential complexes with innovative concepts in quality, service and operations.
In 2003, Argencons begins construction and financing of large residential complexes under the Trust At Cost model, initiating—with Quartier Libertador and Quartier de la India—a method that today has been fully implemented.
It has turned over 17 Quartier Complexes.
At Argencons we work to achieve the highest quality at all stages of development, and, above all, to provide the best service to our clients.
In each one of our projects, we seek solutions that are both original and flexible, allowing us to cater to distinct tastes and needs and attract users and investors from an ample spectrum.

Description:
Su Development is a self-sustaining vertical integrated design-build firm in the Puget Sound area founded in 1981. The company performs roles as owner, developer, in-house designer, self-performing general contractor, and property manager for our own projects. With lateral collaboration between in-house design and construction teams, we apply a “master builder” philosophy to projects.
Our visions are:
1.	Orchestrate community oriented projects to enhance cultural and urban environment.
2.	Strive to be the leading residential team by achieving architectural excellence with human comfort in mind.
3.	Practice Master Builder principles with a core value emphasizing each individual member embraces full range of responsibilities.
4.	Provide affordable housing components to fulfill social responsibility.
Over the years, we completed five high-rise residential projects in downtown Bellevue. The project currently under construction is a 23 story, 259 units, mixed-use apartment community. 
We are seeking highly motivated, team oriented individuals who enjoy taking hands-on approach to design and construction detailing in a fast paced environment. Excellent verbal, technical and written communication skills are essential. The successful applicant should have a working knowledge of concrete and steel construction methods and detailing. Must have strong organizational skills, ability to give and take direction, and interface well with consultants as well as construction trades.

Name: CREW Calgary

Name: Real Estate Network
Description:
Real Estate Network er en professionel netværksgruppe med fokus på alle aspekter af ejendomsbranchen i og omkring Aarhus og København. Medlemmerne af gruppen kan være alt fra banker, investorer, mæglere, administratorer, arkitekter, advokater, entreprenører, ingeniører mv.

Gruppens helt overordnede mål er, at skabe nye relationer samt at styrke de bestående.

Hvorfor vælge Real Estate Network?
Der findes mange professionelle netværk i og omkring Aarhus. Mange af netværksgrupperne er meget formelle med dagsordener og programmer fra gang til gang.

Konceptet er meget uformelt og enkelt. Vi er af den klare overbevisning, at hvis man bringer mennesker tættere sammen i sociale og uformelle sammenhænge, så skaber man tætte og gode relationer. Derfor er omdrejningspunktet for gruppen sociale arrangementer, som eksempelvis middage, vinsmagning, fyraftensøl mv. Der vil selvfølgelig også være fagligt relevante arrangementer løbende. I denne sammenhæng tænker vi hele tiden på, hvordan vi involverer vores medlemmer i arrangementerne og vi gør meget ud af, at tænke ud af boksen og forny os selv.

Ved at vælge vores netværk, får din virksomhed adgang til et anderledes socialt og professionelt netværk, som styrker relationerne på tværs af de forskellige aktører i ejendomsbranchen.

Hvordan bliver din virksomhed medlem?
Vi er altid åbne for nye medlemmer og det eneste kriterie er, at din virksomhed har et fokusområde indenfor ejendomsbranchen. Du kan ansøge om at blive medlem via vores website. Vi behandler typisk ansøgninger indenfor 2-3 arbejdsdage.

Hvordan kan din virksomhed engagere sig?
Alle medlemmer er velkomne til, at komme med input og ideer til løbende udvikling af netværket. Hvis din virksomhed har lyst til, at arrangere relevante indlæg, vise projekter frem, give en virksomhedsrundtur eller lignende, er der også rigtig god mulighed for dette. Alle input, ideer og tiltag til arrangementer bliver løbende evalueret i forhold til relevans, ønsker og interesser i gruppen.

Name: Innes Building Consultancy
Description:
OUR STORY

Our success is driven from the lasting relationships we have formed with key clients and our understanding of their business and aspirations. 

We provide advice from pre-acquisition stage right through to disposal and can be involved in all stages in between.

We work with property investors, asset managers, funds and end users across all sectors of the commercial property market.

Our team have expertise in the project management of new build and major refurbishment schemes together with providing strategic advice on individual property or portfolio acquisitions and end of Lease dilapidations for both Landlord and Tenant.

We are fortunate to work with some of the leading property companies in their chosen sector and focus on working hard for them while enjoying what we do.

CAPABILITY STATEMENT

We have advised on property acquisitions in the office, industrial and retail sectors totalling over £450m over the last 5 years across all parts of the UK including individual assets worth in excess of £70m.

Our team have completed major office refurbishments totalling over 500,000sq.ft of CAT A space. We have provided full Project Management and Cost Consultancy services to deliver projects within very challenging timescales to facilitate Tenant occupiers.

We take on an average of 30-40 end of Lease dilapidations negotiations each year acting for both Landlord and Tenant and use our expertise to ensure our clients get the best advice to protect their interests. We work closely with several leading law firms on many of these instructions.

THE FUTURE

Our aim is to continue to grow our business alongside our existing and new clients to meet the needs of an ever changing commercial property market. We see lots of opportunities for hard working and dynamic companies like ourselves to continue to deliver a level of service which sets us apart from others.

Name: Paddington Square
Description:
Paddington Square is a new and design-forward workspace, shopping and dining quarter at the heart of Paddington’s regeneration. 

Owned by Great Western Developments Ltd and managed by Sellar, the visionary developer behind The Shard, Paddington Square has been conceived as a future-optimised, mixed-use development. The building will provide a flexible and inspiring environment, with sustainability and wellbeing at it core, designed as a connected and socially collaborative workspace for progressive industries and future thinkers.  

Set to open later this year, the Renzo Piano Building Workshop designed building will appear to float above the ground floor piazza; a light-filled crystalline building with a rooftop restaurant offering panoramic views of Hyde Park and London. A place with a cultural heart, Paddington Square will also contain four floors of shopping, restaurants and cafes, and 1.35 acres of new civic space, programmed with contemporary art and cultural events.

As a gateway into central London, Paddington Square benefits from Paddington’s national and international transport links, as well as the Elizabeth line accessible by a brand new Bakerloo line station entrance just minutes from the workspace and shops. In addition to the convenience of its connectivity, retail mix and dining experiences, the green spaces and blue waterways surrounding Paddington Square will provide the future community with opportunities to improve individual and collective wellbeing.

Name: CIP Real Estate
Description:
CIP Real Estate (“CIP”) is a full service real estate investment and management company based in Irvine, California, focused on the acquisition, development, repositioning and management of industrial and business parks.  Founded in 1995, CIP has completed more than $1.3 billion in real estate transactions, and owns and manages over 9.2 million square feet of quality real estate throughout California, Nevada, Georgia, Texas, North and South Carolina.

CIP Real Estate’s principals, Eric Smyth and Robert Strom, combined their backgrounds in development, investment, finance, law, management and marketing to create a business that was built on service and driven by results. The Company’s core business plan remains acquiring and creating value in real estate assets and co-investing with institutional partners. In order to implement its business plan, CIP established a $700 million industrial portfolio investment program with New York-based Almanac Realty Investors, LLC. Almanac, a Neuberger Berman company, is a leading provider of growth capital to private and public real estate companies. From the time of its funding in 1981, the group has raised over $6.5 billion related to a wide array of real estate opportunities and committed over $5.2 billion to 43 different companies in North America.

Guided by its founders, the Company’s educated and experienced team of professionals provides institutional level asset management, financial analysis, modeling, due diligence, accounting and financial reporting, as well as a full spectrum of traditional real estate services in property management, leasing and marketing and construction management. CIP’s headquarters are in Irvine, California and the Company has full-service management offices in Riverside, Upland, Las Vegas, Hayward, Atlanta, Charlotte and Dallas.

For further information on CIP Real Estate, please visit www.ciprealestate.com.

Name: Groupe VADIM
Description:
Le Groupe VADIM est une société foncière qui constitue et fait fructifier un portefeuille d’immobilier d’entreprise (locaux de bureaux) et d’exploitation (hôtels, biens para-hôteliers) en le louant ou en l’exploitant
Le Groupe source des projets d’investissement immobiliers, structure le financement d’acquisitions d’immeubles et pilote les travaux de rénovation, de restauration ou de réhabilitation lourde des bâtiments acquis, de la conception du projet jusqu’à la livraison de l’ouvrage. Le patrimoine détenu est ensuite mis en exploitation par les équipes du Groupe VADIM.
Le Groupe VADIM intervient ainsi sur toute la chaine de valeur d’une opération immobilière.
En premier lieu, les équipes de développeurs du Groupe VADIM réalisent un travail intense de sourcing et de développement, en prospectant des fonciers constructibles ou des immeubles à transformer et à restructurer pour créer de la valeur. 
Une fois les actifs identifiés, la Direction des Investissements du Groupe procèdent à leurs acquisitions et structure, en dette et en equity, le financement de l’acquisition. Pour financer ses opérations, VADIM a généralement recours à une dette bancaire et peut, pour la partie fonds propres, créer des Clubs Deals ad hoc. 
Lorsque le Groupe VADIM est titré sur les actifs, c’est la Direction de la Maîtrise d’Ouvrage du Groupe qui, en s’appuyant en interne sur une équipe programme dédiée, pilote l’ensemble du projet, de la conception jusqu’à la livraison de l’ouvrage.
Une fois la transformation de l’actif réalisé, le Groupe VADIM peut alors décider de conserver le bien immobilier dans son patrimoine et le mettre à bail (dans le cas de bureaux) ou en exploitation (dans le cas d’hôtels), ou bien de le vendre à un investisseur ou un utilisateur

Description:

Name: Birmingham Business Park
Description:
Birmingham Business Park (BBP) is the most established out of town office park in the Midlands. Set within 148 acres of mature parkland, BBP comprises 2.4m sq ft of high quality office space and is home to more than 150 companies, including Rolls Royce, IMI, Canon, Goodyear, GKN and Changan Automotive, and circa 10,000 employees.

Just minutes from Junction 6 of the M42, the park is perfectly located for easy access to all the major road and motorway networks as well as rail and air links, with Birmingham International Station, Birmingham Airport and the proposed HS2 Interchange within close proximity. Birmingham Business Park also forms part of UK Central (previously known as the M42 Economic Gateway), which supports an estimated 100,000 jobs region-wide and contributes £5.1bn to regional GDP.

Birmingham Business Park offers tenants a range of on site amenities including Greggs, WHSmith, a nursery, and a dry cleaners. A strong commitment to community engagement and health & well-being with a programme of regular events, from yoga classes to running and cycling clubs. Networking events, community clubs and weekly BBP Lunch Club for tenants to network and socialise.

We believe it is a conflict of interest to represent both tenants and landlords since that often means negotiations stop short of the best deal for private companies and non-profit organizations. At Bespoke, we advocate solely for the business success of clients, while earning respect from building owners and management along the way. Serving a diverse group of business leaders, we provide resourceful problem solving and skilled negotiation, along with ongoing strategic counsel to add value for clients long after a lease is inked.

We are experts in: 

•	Analyzing your present and future facility requirements

Name: The Job Seeker
Description:
Garden City is an award-winning mixed-use development in Nairobi, Kenya - the first real estate project of its kind to combine residential, retail and office components into one integrated design. Easily accessible from all parts of Nairobi, Garden City lies on a sprawling 47-acre site, located between Junction 7 and Junction 8 along Thika Super Highway. Since opening in 2015, a new community has been taking shape at Garden City, with 215 apartments and modern family town houses available for sale/rent, alongside one of Kenya’s largest shopping malls. Designed around a 3-acre central park, Garden City Mall is home to the largest and most popular iMax cinema in East Africa, a wide range of restaurants and cafes, and over 100 national and international shops and brands, including the first Game store in Kenya, and Shoprite’s first store - due to open its doors in Q4 2018.

To complete the LIVE, WORK, PLAY experience, the mall is connected by a pedestrian boulevard to Garden City’s Grade A office complex, offering over 12,500sqm of Gross Leasable Area (GLA) spread over 2 new buildings, plus a healthcare facility, two hotels and over 400 mid-market residential units coming soon.

Backed by leading emerging market investor, Actis [https://www.act.is/], Garden City has sustainability at its core and boasts Africa’s biggest solar panelled rooftop parking facility. Winner of the 2017 Best Green Building in Sub-Saharan Africa Award for its retail and residential spaces during the Africa Property Investment Summit & Expo, it will also be the first mixed-use development in East Africa to gain LEED certification, with offices designed and built to IFC Edge Certification standards. Garden City is ‘the perfect mix’.

Name: Midwest Manufactured Home Community Brokers
Description:
Our team was built around offering better local service to mobile home park owners throughout the midwest. Our team consists of Midwest Locals from North East Iowa, and North Central Wisconsin. 
 After several years of selling multifamily, our team lead Jason Bergan saw a need for a more local option when it comes to Mobile Home Park sales in the Midwest. We are seller focused brokers, which means we primarily represent sellers and help them get a fair price for their properties. 

Our team offers local expert service, and we offer the option to meet face to face with all of our local sellers throughout our areas of service. We do this in order to more accurately advise them on the value of their properties, and to help our clients better understand and feel comfortable with the selling process.

Through our years of experience in the Mobile Home Park industry, we have formed relationships with mobile home park lenders, owners, buyers, and supporting industry  professionals. This ensures our sellers a smooth and simple sales process. 

Our listing contracts are free to cancel at any time, and  no fees are ever due from our sellers until their  property is sold. We believe that owners should always be the final decision makers on their properties, and approach the sales process as professional advisors, not as salesmen. 

 All of our sellers have the option to keep their sale confidential. Even when we market the property, it is never listed on local platforms like the MLS, and you as the owner don’t have to worry about the residents of your property or your local community becoming aware of the sale before you want them to be. 


If you are considering selling your MHC, or if you have questions about the process or the current market, please reach out to us. 

Email the team at midwestmhcbrokers@c21sre.com

Name: CRE Valuation Services
Description:

Our approach to commercial real estate is unique. We are an independent commercial valuation firm with a proven record of success in the industry achieved through prosperous relationships with our clients and partnerships with leading commercial real estate providers. 

All commercial appraisals are compliant and prepared in accordance with the Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice (USPAP), applicable federal and state regulatory requirements, and the specific requirements of each client.

Our experts average over twenty years of commercial real estate experience and hold appraisal licenses in most states. We support an international network of real esteate brokers, many of whom hold the CCIM and SIOR designations, to provide expert valuation services. This relationship grants us access to the market’s leading data our competitors cannot easily access. Several of our appraisers hold an MAI designation, the most respected standard of appraisal credentials.

We comply with RICS, the highest professional qualifications and practice in the development and management of real estate valuation. We have MRICS designated professionals, bringing impartiality, ethical principles, and delivery of the most accurate valuations in the industry.

We support a nationwide network of brokers, many of whom hold the CCIM and SIOR designations, to provide expert evaulation services. This relationship grants us access to the market’s leading data our competitors do not have. In addition, we provide appraisal and consulting services for several national clients allowing us to provide current market based data, industry trends, and analysis in a logical, easy to read, well supported appraisal and Broker Opinion of Value report.

-	La recherche de vos locaux, à l’acquisition ou à la location
-	Les opportunités d’investissements tertiaires

-	La sélection des opportunités du marché et le choix des actifs correspondant à vos besoins
-	Notre conseil sur la valorisation de votre actif
-	Notre expertise de l’immobilier tertiaire parisien et de sa première couronne
-	Le suivi des négociations jusqu’à la signature d’un bail ou d’un acte authentique de vente.

Nos principales valeurs sont la créativité, la détermination, la curiosité dont nous faisons constamment preuve nous permettant d’identifier les nouvelles opportunités du marché, ainsi que la diversité de nos parcours professionnels.
Harbour Real Estate accompagne ses clients par un conseil complet prenant en compte toutes les problématiques liées au processus de vente ou de location (Loi Hoguet, types de baux, commercialité, taux de rendement …).

Notre dynamisme et notre connaissance profonde du marché nous permettra de vous apporter des propositions non encore identifiées par les différents acteurs du marché.

Comment recherchez les nouveaux locaux de ma société ? Cet immeuble est-il adapté à l’image de mon entreprise ? La localisation est-elle optimale ? Le prix est-il compétitif ? Quelles sont les opportunités d’acquisition actuelle ?

Name: Hazelvine Limited
Description:
WELCOME TO HAZELVINE

Hazelvine delivers comprehensive property management solutions to Leaseholders, Residents’ Management Companies, Developers and Freeholders. Our services, tailored to meet the specific needs of each client, are delivered by our team of highly skilled and experienced professionals.

As a business, we strive to be innovators; As part of the Qdime Group we can offer the entire residential property management solution, or any part thereof. Our ethos is to invest in our staff and in the technology that makes them efficient and effective, leaving them free to focus on exemplary communication and service.

About us-
Hazelvine was formed in 1986 by two brothers, who having moved to London and sharing a flat together were presented with their very first service charge budget. They challenged some of the cost headings, and were allowed to take over some of the services themselves, enabling them to reduce costs and offer better value for money.

What started as providing a few services to their own block grew into a business when residents from other local properties approached them and asked for their help. With backgrounds in Construction Management and accountancy, they believed they had the right knowledge base to offer a property management service.

Over the course of 30 years, the business has grown substantially, but the overriding principles the owners set themselves back then, of maintaining separate designated trust accounts for each property and always seeking value for money, remain just as strong today.

Hazelvine is now part of the Qdime Group of companies. The Group specialises in Residential Property, and comprises of three firms of managing agents; a maintenance division; a professional services company; and a firm of solicitors. As part of the group, Hazelvine is still able to offer a personal service, but with the added benefits that being part of a successful group brings.

Our Vision-
“Our vision is to be the best at what we do and to be different in our approach.”

Our services-
We provide professional property management services to a diverse client base whose needs can be very different.  Developers, owner-occupiers, buy to let investors and RMC directors can have very different agenda’s, some want to be involved in every decision and some don’t have the time so are happy to leave everything to us.

For this reason we employ specialist staff with specific areas of expertise.  Unlike most managing agents, we don’t dilute our property managers by expecting them to be a ‘jack of all trades’ we give them the time to be coordinators of their team and communicators with their clients and contractors, whilst maintaining the overall knowledge of their sites.

By employing specialist staff we can offer clients a full management service or a bespoke management service through an ‘A la Carte’ menu of Insurance management, Legal services/advice, credit control, accounts preparation, Health & Safety, surveying reports/major works or maintenance services.

The Terry Dicken Business Park is in Stokesley, between the North Yorkshire Moors and the Tees Valley. Characterised by its resilience, framed by rugged coastline and beautiful scenery, this is a diverse and exciting place to live and work.

Over the last 30 years, the Terry Dicken Business Park has evolved and changed to meet the needs of the modern market. Existing industrial sites are now complemented by significant growth in the digital and creative, IT, communications, consumer, advanced manufacturing and engineering industries.

We can provide you a scalable future for your business needs, self-contained office buildings from starter units to corporate headquarters, and manufacturing and distribution units to size and specification.

Makes great business sense for you, and us. 

See for yourself at www.terrydickenbusinesspark.co.uk

Name: Source Floor & Specialties Inc.
Description:
Source Floor & Specialties Inc. supplies and installs a wide variety of commercial floor coverings ranging from traditional to modern in the Vancouver and Lower Mainland Area. Source Floor supplies commercial-grade linoleums and carpets, complete entrance matting systems, polished and stained concrete, and porcelain and natural stone flooring.

OUR DIFFERENCE

We ‘get’ floors – and we know how important it is for your facility to make a good first impression.  Source Floor supplies and installs both custom high-performance entrance matting systems and the floors that go underneath them – and we know how to make them work in tandem.  We help owners, facility administrators, and property managers maintain a first-class appearance in their property portfolios.  We recognize that your facility’s condition is a direct reflection on you – and we’re here to make you look great!

PRODUCT QUALITY & TRUST

We focus on providing custom flooring solutions of the highest quality to meet your commercial facility’s unique performance needs.  Our Grizzly FX, Duromat, and Cobra Recessed Well Matting proprietary entrance matting lines allow us to provide custom solutions while ensuring the highest quality at every step along the way.  For full-coverage commercial flooring, we partner with industry leaders like Forbo, Mannington, and Shaw to supply and install proven products to realize your interior flooring designs.

Name: LDR PARTNERS
Description:
LDR is a full service real estate Investment and Brokerage company adding value throughout a uniquely designed suite of services. In 2009 LDR's primary goal was to acquire distressed performing and non-performing retail, office and hospitality notes, and REO's from first position lenders that had been impacted by the then current credit market conditions including borrowers of CMBS, mortgage or mezzanine products.  It has evolved today with a focus on a Brokerage/Consulting division and an Investment/Development business.  LDR's team collectively possess a wide range of value added expertise in Capital Markets which allows for a relatively easy transition to be able to fully evaluate Retail, Office, Land and Multi Family.

LDR continues to build its portfolio for its own book, along with select clients/partners and as a consultant on behalf of clients including developers, investors and end users. LDR has seamlessly developed relationships at the "country club" through the growing segment of Family Offices and the typical pockets of banks, private equity funds, hedge funds, CMBS bundlers, life companies, pension funds and state / municipal funds. LDR honed these relationships with substantive understanding of a range of capital market products including rarely executed Interest Rate Swap strategies to Private Placement Bond Financing and everything in between. LDR also has advised on accretive programs like New Market Tax Credits, TIFS, CDDs, 144 A Bond programs and more.

Name: Reds Group
Description:
At Reds Group, we seek out, identify and de-risk rare neighbourhood property opportunities to prepare for enhancement. 

Across established and growing LGAs, we focus on identifying precincts with the potential to become vibrant community centres for Neighbourhood Convenience and Neighbourhood Heart. Under these umbrellas, the provision of medical and wellness, fast-casual food, grocery and fresh food services is at the core of our acquisitions, as basic human needs that remain constant and universal. 

With more than 30 years of experience in the property sector, we have the networks to uncover rare assets, the skills to apply rigorous due diligence and financial modelling, and the ability to make informed decisions enacted with crucial timing.

Along with our partners Enhance Property Investments and Firefly Future, we’re also involved in the detailed planning of greenfield sites, redevelopment, refurbishment and repositioning of existing sites.

Feel free to get in touch to find out more about what we do.

Name: Real Estate Matrix, LLC
Description:
REAL ESTATE MATRIX, LLC is a commercial valuation and advisory firm based in Birmingham, Alabama and is one of the leading commercial valuation firms in the Southeast.  Real Estate Matrix’s primary coverage area includes all of Alabama, Georgia, Tennessee, Mississippi and Florida.  You can also visit our website for more information on our firm (www.realestatematrix.com).  

REM is extensively involved in appraisal management and review services. Our clients are able to save time and money, enhance security and auditability, and ensure regulatory compliance by employing us for the following services:

Assistance with maintaining a qualified approved appraiser panel
Ensuring proper scope of work to enable credible appraisals
Bidding out appraisal assignments to qualified appraisers
Engaging qualified appraisers to perform valuations on behalf of the client
Performing Compliance/Administrative Reviews, USPAP Standard Rule (3) Technical Desk Reviews or Field Reviews

Appraisal reviews performed by us or REM are either Administrative Reviews (Compliance) or full USPAP Standard 3 Technical or Field Reviews. Our detailed process elicits deficiencies in appraisal reports to ensure credible appraisals in support of financial institutions’ collateral. In addition, our valuation administration program is sure to pass the scrutiny of any bank regulatory agency in regard to appraiser independence and appraisal quality control issues – while also providing security, job status reports and performance review for each vendor via a rating system. Because of this detailed process, financial institutions throughout the United States turn to REM for commercial valuation administration services (Valuation Management-Administration).

Name: Synergy Real Estate Group Corporate Advisory, Inc.
Description: Synergy is a tenant / buyer representation - corporate real estate advisory firm that exclusively represents medium sized companies and corporations for their real estate needs. A short list of our clients include Paramount Studios, Hitachi, CBS Studios,  NASA, Cisco Systems, HP, ExxonMobil, DELL, Charles Schwab, Orrick Harrington, Farmers Insurance, Wabash Technologies (Mexico), TATA (India), Larsen Tourbo (India), TCP (China), Prexion (Japan).  We do not represent Landlords or Building Owners, only Tenants. We identify the space, send out proposals on your behalf, draft and negotiate the contract and close the transaction. In the proposal process, we get landlords/property owners to compete for your business to secure the best terms and price.  We differentiate ourselves from most commercial real estate brokerage firms by holding a strict policy of not talking Landlord / Property Owner listings.  By doing so, we are not limited to our own listings and can show you every property in the market.  By not aligning ourselves with Landlords /  Property Owners, we avoid any possible conflicts of interest inherent in representing both sides of the transaction.  We only get compensated if we benefit our client's interests.  The listing broker splits their commission with us for reparenting the interest of our clients.

Name: GPS Partners
Description:
GPS Partners provides conception-to-completion project advising services from experienced design and construction professionals. We strive to go beyond managing your project needs by helping you assemble and enable the best partnerships to maximize your valuable resources while creating your best project solutions.

The core of our services are:

Conceptual Planning:
We'll ensure the process begins with an accurate understanding of project goals and objectives, and then balance them against a realistic assessment of the available resources to make your vision a reality.

Brokerage Assistance:
Every potential site for your project has built-in advantages and challenges to success. Understanding economics of what's built into each site, as well as the "deal" itself, helps you understand how potential design concepts can lead to success or failure of project objectives. Make sure your site selection analysis includes this vital information.

Design Oversight & Coordination:
With employees from the paper, digital, & cyber generations of all side by side in the workplace, modern office design has evolved more in that last decade than the previous three. Make sure your architect is free to design. GPS will work with all your stakeholders while safeguarding your objectives, and your resources.

Project Implementation:
No design is complete until your entire project team has weighed in to your plans. This includes those internal to your organization and your trusted FF&E team. As your partner, GPS understands IT, Audio Visual, Physical Security, Construction, and Furniture so we can help you assemble the team right for your project's success.

Name: Hispanics in Real Estate & Construction
Description:
Our Mission

HREC was founded in 1996 by a group of Hispanic American and migrant workers, managers, professionals and students who want to see real changes leading to equal access for those of us in the real estate and constructing industry, and other related businesses. Equal access produces prosperity and with that the opportunity to stay connected to our heritage and deep roots in the community.

ADVOCACY FOR US BY US

HREC has met frequently with federal, state and local government officials such as the United States Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD), the United States Small Business Administration (SBA), the United States Department of Transportation, the New York and New Jersey Port Authority and New York City Housing Authority to bring about reform in contract procurement procedures.

BE PART OF THE MOVEMENT ...
 
●One of the most active and vocal business advocacy organizations in the State of New York and in the nation.
 
●Wide network of resources and our members enjoy an active calendar of networking events

●HREC works with other organizations to provide members with access to up-to-the-minute building techniques, credentials and certifications.

●HREC is a proud charter member of the widely renowned National Hispanic Construction Association.  

●Join us and become part of a team of construction business owners, professionals, managers and students that are impacting the economic vitality of our communities all over the United States.

Description:
Our clients are finding their way to making better choices in uncertain times and are able to maximize the value in their multifamily investment.

Many clients we speak with have been facing an overwhelming sense of uncertainty, sifting through an ocean of misinformation and dealing with their own fear and sometimes unrealistic expectations to the point where they have become paralyzed by not knowing what to do.

In order to remedy this our team has developed an improved service that will give our clients what they need most in this market learn how to use our advisory service in addition to  our brokerage service which many clients are unaware of. How we work with you in this advisory relationship is to gather the information we need to provide you with a comprehensive analysis of your property or your entire portfolio to establish a baseline of value. This will be an in depth multi-dimensional view that will show you exactly where you stand in this market and where things are headed. Then we will update you as things change on a regular basis. This way you can stay out ahead of changes which will likely occur at an ever increasing rate. Name: Nova Property Group
Description:
Nova PropGrow is a holding company owning and controlling assets worth in excess of R2.5 billion through a group of subsidiary companies.

Established in 2011, through the assimilation of a number of smaller, independently-owned companies, Nova PropGrow became and remains independent as a well-managed group of companies, that renders comprehensive property management and development, accounting, tax and company secretarial services to a self-owned property portfolio.

Shareholder control of Nova PropGrow lies with founder shareholders and executive management. This follows a debt to share conversion process during 2011/2012, in which the founder shareholders and executive management made it possible for debenture creditors to convert their debenture debt to ordinary shares in the Group.

To the extent to which any debenture creditor elected not to convert his/her debt into shares, the applicable shares (into which the debenture debt was convertible) were ultimately issued to the founder shareholders in return for services to be rendered (over a 10 year period) by them to Nova PropGrow by virtue of their employment with Nova PropGrow in terms of Section 8C of the ITA (Income Tax Act)

Nova PropGrow's assets comprise a balanced mix of commercial properties, both retail and office, and mixed-use residential developments, throughout South Africa.

Over the years, this portfolio has proven itself to be versatile and sustainable. Testament to Nova PropGrow's focus on strategic re-development, planning and stringent management measures, the portfolio is consistently well-maintained through mainly internal funding, targeting efficient tenanting and value enhancement.

Name: Q10 | National Mortgage Co.
Description:
Since 1924, Q10 | National Mortgage Co. has provided commercial borrowers with the expertise and resources that have contributed to countless real estate success stories throughout the Pacific Northwest. The company continues to grow and prosper by holding true to one simple mission:
To help our borrowers identify their long term goals and then customize finance solutions that achieve those goals.

Expertise, integrity and service define the Q10 | National Mortgage experience. Our loan origination team has a collective experience base in excess of 200 years. That experience base forms the foundation of our unique consultive approach to commercial real estate capital. At the earliest stages of project planning, we help borrowers identify the pitfalls that could have a negative impact on later financing. At the proposal stage, our finance professionals work closely with borrowers to identify goals and objectives. We consult as a group to take full advantage of the wealth of experience our varied backgrounds yield. With this groundwork in place, we then apply the knowledge gained through daily contact with our correspondent lenders, capital market sources and investors to customize a loan strategy that meets or exceeds our borrower's objectives. Above all else, Q10 | National Mortgage Co. specializes in building long-term relationships. We don't disappear when the deal is done. We service loans in-house whenever possible. We don't forget about our borrower's goals. We stay in touch with industry updates and strategic refinancing options. This full-service approach to our clients is supported by loan closing specialists, in-house loan servicing and a highly specialized real estate boutique. We currently provide servicing for over $1.1 billion in loans.

Name: Business Objects
Description: Business Objects SA provides business intelligence software and services worldwide. The company develops, markets, distributes, and provides solutions that enable organizations to track, understand, and manage enterprise performance within and beyond the enterprise. The company also offers information discovery and delivery solutions that includes its business intelligence platform, which provides customers with the technology to enable them to support users inside and outside the organization, and includes the ability to deploy, control, and manage their deployments; reporting tools that facilitate accessing data, formatting it, and delivering it as information to users inside and outside the organization; and query and analysis products that allow end users to interact with business information and answer ad-hoc questions themselves without advanced knowledge of the underlying data sources and structures. In addition, it offers enterprise performance management tools that enable customers to perform what if analysis; create capital plans and strategic forecasts; develop general budgeting, payroll planning, and sales planning; and manage financial consolidations and employee productivity. Business Objects SA serves the consumer packaged goods, communications, financial services, government, healthcare, and retail sectors. The company has strategic relationships with Accenture; International Business Machines Corporation; Microsoft Corporation; Oracle Corporation; Capgemini; Deloitte; Teradata; and Bearing Point. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Levallois-Perret, France. As of January 29, 2008, Business Objects SA is a subsidiary of SAP AG.

Description:
Dean Realty Co. evolved from several realty company mergers dating back to 1958. Founded by Lester M. Dean, Sr., the company’s development history began with construction of the Downtown Industrial Park on Terrace & Mercier in KCMO. The complex was renamed Downtown Business Park in 2008. 

Dean Realty Co. owns Dean's Downtown Underground, the first subterranean development of its kind in America. Located directly beneath Downtown Business Park on 31st Street, the 1.2 million sf complex contains 804,000+ sf of leasable office and industrial space. The Underground presents affordable space in the greenest environment achievable and features an economical residential/commercial storage option, SmartSTORAGE KC.  

Cambridge Business Park was developed in 1977, expanding over the next 15 years to five business centers and an office building.  In 2004 Cambridge Crest I became the Park's first Missouri-side project.  In 2008, an 89,555 sf headquarters for RiteMade Paper was completed. Master planning envisions retail, office, restaurants, hotel, residential and historic renovation of the Imperial Brewery. 

In 1991, a 16,500 sf building was completed for SISCO Equipment at I-435 and Truman Road. Dean acquired the site and adjoining 105 acres. The location offers dynamic development opportunities.

Dean Realty’s family-owned portfolio has grown to 2,100,000 square feet. The company is now led by Walt Clements, President and Chief Executive Officer, and the Dean Team. Dean Realty Co. develops, leases and manages only Dean property.

We vinden het belangrijk om haar gebouw te begrijpen en de eigenheid te behouden, maar ook om financieel correcte producten af te leveren. We plaatsen de juiste mensen in de juiste projecten om een succesvolle integratie te verzekeren.

The John Madden Company offers completely integrated real estate services, including land acquisition, asset management, project management, brokerage and leasing, tenant finish, construction management, and property management.

The John Madden Company Difference:

John Madden Company focuses on distinctive architecture, quality materials and impeccable construction to ensure our award-winning commercial real estate properties consistently perform well for owners and tenants.

In the last six decades, John Madden Company has developed more than 10 million square feet of office and related space nationally, and we manage more than 700,000 square feet of office space in the Denver area. We have significant experience with a variety of project funding structures, and we maintain strong relationships with a number of investor groups and financial organizations.

We believe in creating spaces of enduring beauty and quality that will add value to the surrounding communities now and for generations to come. Our developments are regularly recognized for their innovative mix of art, architecture, and landscaping, along with thoughtful master planning.

John Madden Company was an early adopter of sustainable building practices for our commercial real estate developments. (All of our properties in Colorado are LEED certified.) It’s just one more example of our long-term commitment to the prosperity of the communities in which our properties reside.

Our personalized approach and commitment to excellence help make our buildings an outstanding long-term investment. By managing our own properties, John Madden Company is able to keep our assets in peak physical condition with constant attention to maintaining strong tenant relationships.

Ken and his wife, Pamela, joke that they've been running Horizon Resources, Inc. for about a hundred years—and although it hasn't quite been that long, the company has built quite a reputation since 1971 as San Diego County’s premier commercial real estate resource.

That longevity makes Horizon uniquely qualified to work with tenants, owners, buyers, and investors since Ken and his team have an in-depth understanding of the challenges presented by San Diego’s ever-evolving real estate market. Whether called on to assist with sales, leasing, property management, property maintenance, tenant improvements, or tenant representation, the Horizon commercial real estate experts provide the highest level of personalized service and marketplace expertise.

As a native San Diegan, Ken’s heart is in America’s Finest City, but Horizon Resources also has an office in Memphis, TN and has a long history in commercial real estate in the greater Phoenix, AZ area.

Name: The Stevens Group
Description:
The Stevens Group is a Boston based commercial real estate firm specializing in representing tenants in the leasing, acquisition and disposition of commercial real estate. Our mission is to provide our clients with the most complete and unbiased real estate advice, combining international reach and local knowledge, to reduce risk and maximize savings.

The Stevens Group acts as an advocate on behalf of tenants and buyers to identify the most appropriate options and negotiate the best possible terms on their behalf. By not representing landlords or developers we are able to effectively, and without conflict of interest, identify properties which are optimally suited to a corporate client’s needs and negotiate the most favorable terms to maximize savings and reduce risk.

The Stevens Group is the Boston affiliate of ITRA Global, the International Tenant Representative Alliance, an organization of independently owned commercial real estate firms with offices in major markets in North America, Latin America, Europe, Asia and the Pacific Rim.  ITRA Global is one of the largest organizations that provides objective real estate advice and services exclusively to corporate tenants and occupiers of commercial real estate throughout the world.

Name: ComplessoSantaMaria
Description:
Complesso Santa Maria è un progetto di Alba Costruzioni S.c.p.a.
La nostra storia inizia nel 1998 dall’unione di esperti nella General Construction.Il nostro obiettivo è di contribuire allo sviluppo e alla crescita di paesi, territori e persone. Da più di 20 anni svolgiamo il nostro lavoro nel rispetto dell’ambiente e riqualificando il territorio. 
Il Complesso Santa Maria è una struttura di nuova costruzione situata a Castellabate. Incastonata nel Parco Nazionale del Cilento, dichiarato patrimonio mondiale dell’umanità dall’UNESCO, è la soluzione ideale per chi cerca una casa realizzata con materiali di pregio e dal design notevole. È facilmente raggiungibile, perchè in una posizione privilegiata con accesso diretto dalla strada regionale. A pochi passi dalle spiagge “bandiera blu” della Campania ed a soli 40 Km dalla città di Salerno. 
La riserva Naturale di Punta Licosa, le acque blu della costiera, le spiagge attrezzate, il centro della vita cittadina con i suoi ristoranti ed i locali notturni, il suggestivo borgo dei pescatori sono intorno a voi. Ogni stagione potrete assaporare le specialità tipiche del territorio e lasciarvi andare a degustazioni enogastronomiche nella patria della Dieta Mediterranea!Il territorio circostante offre anche numerose attività di relax e benessere tutto l’anno. 
Le abitazioni del Complesso Santa Maria sono circondate dalla colorata macchia mediterranea. Per la loro realizzazione abbiamo utilizzato solo materiali moderni, avanzate tecnologie e risorse rinnovabili.
Vivi il Cilento tutto l’anno.

Scopri di più su di noi: https://www.albacostruzioniscpa.it/
Richiedi informazioni a : info@albacostruzioni.it

Name: The Cove JC
Description:
Bridging disciplines, institutions and people, The Cove is a super-connected live-work-play supercluster just minutes from Manhattan in the heart of the East Coast life sciences/tech corridor. Connected to NYC and New Jersey and served by three international airports, it sits on the Hudson River at the mouth of New York Harbor. Simply put, this is the center of one of the world’s largest STEM concentrations: colleges and universities, hospitals, healthcare companies, tech firms, data companies, accelerators, maker spaces, pharmaceutical companies, finance firms and more. 

The Cove is reimagining city life by bringing people what they need and want closer together: flexible, state-of-the-art workspaces alongside residences, expansive parkland on the Hudson River, connections to multiple transit options, and exciting retail, restaurants and bars.  Its world-class purpose-built spaces have the power to stimulate thought and spark breakthroughs for scientists, thinkers and makers. Commercial Real Estate Group of Tucson does not represent landlords, nor do we manage or own commercial property. Instead, we strictly limit our practice to representing the interests of tenants and owner/users. This practice allows us to avoid the conflict of interests so prevalent within real estate firms that attempt to represent both landlords and tenants. Commercial Real Estate Group of Tucson understands that one bad real estate decision can cripple a company for many years. By eliminating any commitment to landlords, we are free to aggressively negotiate against them.

Commercial Real Estate Group of Tucson is committed to reducing real estate risk and occupancy costs on behalf of it clients – the Tenant. Our commitment to safe guarding tenants’ interests consistently yield savings in excess of 15%, often times more.

We are never conflicted or distracted from what I founded Commercial Real Estate Group of Tucson, LLC to do --- aggressively achieve the objectives of those seeking to lease or purchase commercial property for their use."

Name: KH Equities
Description:
KH Equities (KHE) is a privately held company focused on investing and operating affordable housing communities throughout the US. The firm aims to create and preserve affordable communities throughout the US, while delivering strong financial performance for it's LPs.

Since its founding, KHE has serviced over 11,000 residents through housing, enrichment centers, and community-building programs.  We aim to bring our expertise to enhance the quality of life for our residences through targeted resident services.  By creating a “pride of ownership” for our residences, we are able to lower operating costs by reducing turnover, lowering vacancies, and cutting insurance costs.

For our investors, we cultivate a culture of innovative thinking, high yields, trust, and an atmosphere of successful and like-minded individuals.

For our residents, we create and sustain clean, safe, and affordable environments that enable our residents to feel a sense of belonging.

For our communities, we aim to preserve and enrich the communities that we partner with.

KHE primarily focuses on the following assets:

1) Affordable Housing: Low Income Housing Tax Credits (LIHTC) /Section 42/Section 8

2) Workforce Housing: Class "B" and "C" properties that cater to under-served communities/Communal Living

3) Adaptive Housing: Crisis Shelters /Permanent Supportive Housing/Bridge Housing/Interim Housing/Sobriety Centers

Name: Homes Urban
Description:
WHO WE ARE

Homes Urban is a boutique-sized multifamily housing developer and investor with assets located throughout the Southeastern United States. Led by seasoned industry veterans, our expertise is building thoughtfully designed rental homes in many forms and configurations on prime sites within exceptional communities.

Based in Mount Pleasant, SC and Greenville, SC, Homes Urban was formed in 2013 by J. Russ Davis, Jr. and E.J. Mondor. Homes Urban’s predecessor, Davis Property Group, was formed in 1998. The principals of Homes Urban have developed over 15,000 multifamily units to date and are well-positioned to expand our established platform.

WHAT WE DO

We have an established track record for being creative problem solvers delivering quality rental housing and solid investment returns in a variety of Southeastern markets. Our communities range from complex urban infill mixed-use to suburban garden-style to single family rental. We have been on the leading edge of our industry by developing housing in urban cores since the early 2000s and working with municipalities to create communities where new ground-up multifamily had not been constructed in years.

A critical component of the success of our business is our outstanding partnerships with leading design professionals focusing on the unique context and market trends of each location and site. We have long standing financial partners and solid banking relationships that enable us to secure prime sites and to quickly capitalize investment opportunities. The result is the creation of exceptional homes and lifestyles for our residents and high-performing assets for our investors.

Günışığının maksimum düzeyde hissedildiği ve semt sıcaklığında tasarlanan özel mimari yapısı  ile aydınlık ve sıcak bir atmosfer sunan Kozzy Alışveriş ve Kültür Merkezi , 400 kişilik Gönül Ülkü - Gazanfer Özcan Tiyatro Sahnesi, sergi alanları ve 9 salonlu Avşar Sinemaları ile kendini diğer alışveriş merkezlerinden ayırarak ziyaretçilerine çeşitli faaliyetlere katılma imkanı sağlamaktadır.  Diğer taraftan projenin, hedef kitlenin tüm ihtiyaçlarına hizmet edebilecek özellikteki seçkin ve beğenilen markaları bir arada bulundurması; Belediye meclis binası, alışveriş merkezi ve tiyatro gibi farklı amaçlara hizmet eden yapıların bir çatı altında toplanıp kendi içinde uyum halinde işleyişini yürütebilmesi ile örneği çok az görülebilecek Yap-İşlet-Devret projesi şeklinde Kadıköy Belediyesi’ne karşı bir sosyal sorumluluk projesi olarak kamuya kazandırılmış olması; rahat ulaşılabilen, merkezi bir bölgede yer alması gibi rakiplerinden ayrılan özelliklerinden dolayı 9 Aralık 2011 tarihinde AMPD – Alışveriş Merkezleri Perakendecileri Derneği, tarafından Türkiye’nin, 15 Haziran 2011 tarihinde ise Paris’te yapılan Uluslararası Alışveriş Merkezleri Konseyi (International Council of Shopping Centers – ICSC) konferasında Avrupa’nın En İyi Alışveriş Merkezi seçilmiştir.

Name: The Restaurant Brokers
Description: The Restaurant Brokers is a commercial real estate company and business brokerage firm that specializes in the purchase, sale and lease of restaurants, bars, taverns, nightclubs and associated food and beverage related businesses.  Established in 1980, The Restaurant Brokers have brokered thousands of transactions and provide services to buyers, sellers, landlords and tenants on a multitude of levels. With a forty year history of success that is unparalleled and a client list that reads like a “who’s who” of the Arizona restaurant, bar and nightclub industry, The Restaurant Brokers are absolutely the best available resource for buying, selling or leasing a restaurant, bar, nightclub or associated business in the Phoenix metro market.

Name: Ryan Joffe Properties - Industrial
Description:
Welcome to Ryan Joffe Properties - Industrial, an industrial division of Ryan Joffe Properties.

Founded in 2012, Ryan Joffe Properties is a owner-led boutique brokerage in Cape Town specialising in the sale, leasing, and auctioning of real estate across South Africa, with a focus on the Western Cape.

Our track record speaks for itself when it comes to the sale of commercial, industrial, and investment property. We are proud to be positioned as one of the Western Cape’s foremost real estate agencies.

The Ryan Joffe Properties team is made up of talented and experienced property brokers who bring an in-depth understanding of the property market as well as an established network of clients and property investors to the table. When it comes to putting your property in good hands, our team are the experts.

Name: Westpark Shannon, Ireland's Premier Business Campus
Description:
Westpark Shannon Ireland is a world-class leading edge business campus, set on 40 acres. It is home to major global enterprises and to smaller dynamic businesses. It confers all of the advantages that locating in Ireland offers - and many more. The ease of access to European and world markets; the availability of a talented workforce; significant operational cost savings when compared to Dublin; low corporation tax; top quality campus facilities and support services; and the quality of life enjoyed by the Region's workforce and their families.

The Westpark Shannon Business Campus offers world-class office and support facilities and services in a dynamic business environment. Westpark, with over 90,000 square metres of office space in impressive multi-storey buildings, is already home to 50 businesses including major global enterprises and smaller dynamic businesses. Whether you require an elite serviced office suite or a large corporate HQ - Westpark can quickly be your new prestigious home.

Westpark Shannon is perfectly suited to businesses operating in major growth sectors including Aviation, Life Sciences, Logistics, Information and Communication Technology, Finance, Big Data, Software and Internationally Traded Services.

TALENT FLOW: There are two Universities and four technological colleges within the wider region, providing a student cohort of over 50,000, with over 18,000 graduates every year. New businesses can also call upon an inflow of proven talent from throughout Ireland and Europe, attracted by opportunity and lifestyle.

LOCATION: Westpark Shannon is centred between the university cities of Limerick (20 minutes) and Galway (50 minutes) and is adjacent to direct motorway connections to Dublin City and Dublin Airport (circa 2 hours away) which provides flights to over 150 destinations. The campus is also just 5 minutes from Shannon International Airport with connections to the UK, Europe and the US.

Name: Sunbelt Business Brokers of Naples and Fort Myers
Description:
Selling a Business:
When selling a business, it is vital that you use a professional that is experienced in selling businesses. Our Sunbelt Naples & Fort Myers office will do a complete evaluation of your business so that you can be sure that your asking price reasonably reflects your business’ value. Sunbelt will work with you to sell your business confidentially and quickly.

Buying a Business:
The Business Brokers at Sunbelt do all of the time-consuming searching for profitable opportunities for you and protect your interests when buying a business. Our brokers are able to quickly evaluate a Naples & Fort Myers business to make sure you are obtaining a business with a fair market price and that there is still growth potential.

Protecting Your Confidentiality:
The complex nature of a business sale requires strict confidentiality. We recognize the importance of protecting both parties throughout the entire process. You can have confidence that your correspondence will be done quietly as you investigate opportunities for purchase or respond to inquiries from potential buyers. Our guidance allows you to get professional advice without divulging details to the public.

Sunbelt Works for You:
Whether you are buying, selling or just need a business evaluation or franchise consultation, our Sunbelt team in Naples & Fort Myers is here to help. Business Brokers at Sunbelt have been protecting the interests of their clients for decades. We are here to help you make profitable choices in business.
