Name: Honore Investissement Immobilier - H2i
Description:
H2i est une société créée en 1992 qui a pour activité le conseil et la commercialisation de locaux commerciaux auprès des promoteurs, des investisseurs, des collectivités et des aménageurs.

Depuis plus de 20 ans, partenaire privilégié des promoteurs de logement pour l’intégration des commerces en pied d’immeubles, H2i s’est forgée une véritable culture « consommateur » et « retail » sur toute la France.

De par sa connaissance des marques, du commerce et des consommateurs, sa vision lui permet de réfléchir à des problématiques de quartier tout en gardant en tête les attentes des municipalités et collectivités locales.

Depuis sa création, H2i a commercialisé plus de 3 000 locaux commerciaux soit 450 000 m² répartis de façon égale entre la Région Parisienne et la Province, le centre-ville et les zones d’activités.

La particularité de ces opérations est d’acquérir en l’état futur d’achèvement (VEFA) des locaux commerciaux de proximité qui seront livrés brut de béton, au sein notamment de grands projets de rénovation urbaine ou Zac de centre-ville.

Name: The Vortex Group, LLC
Description:
The Vortex Group, LLC is a commercial real estate company specializing exclusively in tenant representation. Established in 2002 by a small group of seasoned professionals, the sole focus of the company is to advise tenants with all aspects of their office space requirements. Preferring to avoid contradictory allegiances to landlords, the company does not manage property, nor does it have any residential, industrial, or agency departments. Vortex’s principals are involved on a daily basis with a specific tenant’s office space requirements, providing advisory, analytical and negotiating skills, as well as comprehensive knowledge of the marketplace. Our boutique platform allows us to work as a team to produce skills and services necessary for each assignment.

Our partners have spent their entire careers assisting New York office tenants. Since Vortex’s establishment, the company has completed headquarter assignments for a host of prominent tenants, including Lazard, Akerman LLP, Rockefeller Brothers Fund, Tweedy, Browne Company LLC, Hypo Real Estate Capital Corporation and Bracewell LLP.

Description:

CREDAI NORTH BENGAL is as association of CREDAI BENGAL along with its fellow associations like  CREDAI ASANSOL and CREDAI HOWRAH. CREDAI has been a strong voice that represents the interests of the Real Estate Industry in North Bengal. CREDAI North Bengal has deep focus on quality construction and timely completion, and also takes care of infrastructure needs and labour welfare. 

CREDAI-North Bengal since the inception has always been at the forefront of understanding the needs of its buyers.  Property Exhibition is just one of many such initiatives the Association has undertaken from its inception. The Property Exhibition provides its members an ideal platform to showcase their developments and properties in a congenial environment to their prospective buyers/ investors. CREDAI North Bengal has its own website which projects products of the member developers, updated list of CREDAI NORTH BENGAL, e-news, Govt. circulars, notification and judgments to directly benefit the members. 
Real Estate can be tricky. There are plenty of protocols to be followed. Which is where we come into the picture. We work towards creating a more transparent, corruption free market for both builders and consumers. Networking comes to us naturally. Today, we closely work with government representatives, policy makers, investors, finance companies, consumers and Real Estate professionals. On behalf of developers/builders, CREDAI North Bengal lobbies with the government authorities in order to ensure formulation of constructive policies.

Name: Land & Commercial, Inc.
Description:
Land & Commercial, Inc. has been in business and served the State of Maryland since 1974. We specialize in the industrial, office, retail, land and development fields of Real Estate.

Land & Commercial, Inc. is committed to the highest ethical and professional standards. We have developed a reputation for expertise and excellence in commercial and industrial real estate.

Our President, Leo Bruso, is a member of the Society of Industrial and Office REALTORS (SIOR), which is the leading professional office and industrial real estate brokerage association, representing today's most knowledgeable, experienced, and successful commercial real estate brokerage specialists. There are more than 1.2 million REALTORS* in the USA. Only 3,000 REALTORS have achieved this designation WORLDWIDE. SIOR's members are located in more than 630 cities in 31 countries.

Name: Fairway Commercial Group, LLC
Description:
When it comes to Chicagoland real estate, your business deserves a Chicagoland expert—a savvy negotiator, a tireless advocate, and a trustworthy fiduciary. Your business deserves Fairway Commercial Group.

Fairway Commercial Group partners with Chicagoland business owners in strategically developing real estate strategies that drive growth, sustain value, and enable them to occupy their ideal office space, medical practice, or industrial facility.  We take the time to thoroughly understand your business, identify all opportunities, and maximize leverage through our deep local market expertise.

In the highly competitive world of commercial real estate, efficiency and attention to detail are essential. Fairway Commercial Group specializes solely in tenant representation, which enables us to to provide our clients with the highest level of transparency and execution. Unlike most real estate agents, who work for both landlords and tenants and therefore have a conflict of interest, we have a fiduciary responsibility to you, the tenant.  

We've had tremendous success helping our clients renegotiate their current terms or find their ideal spaces because of our adherence to three simple principles: trust, transparency, and dedication to the client.

Sadly, far too few tenants receive the necessary representation they deserve to not only save time but also to achieve the most advantageous deal for their business. Clients of Fairway Commercial Group can concentrate on their business and worry less about market rates and lease negotiations because they trust us to negotiate and execute at the highest level.

MAXIMISE THE UPSIDE MINIMISE THE DOWNSIDE

We have created an environment which gives your business the very best opportunity to succeed whilst minimising your risk. Our beautifully designed offices are amongst the finest on offer in Leeds but they are flexible so your business can develop and change according to supply and demand and there are no long term contracts to sign if you don’t want to.

Need an office for a few days? No problem, if we have room, we’ll be happy to do business with you. Need an office for a month? six months? a year? two years? No problem, just call us to discuss your needs.

Perhaps you don’t want an office at all. Perhaps you simply wish to have a presence in Leeds in order to facilitate business growth. Again, no problem. Our Stonebridge Virtual Office service is able to suit your needs, from simple phone answering through to a call forwarding and postal forwarding service. If we’re here, so are you.

Cowerken is een model van werken en huisvesting waarbij vier waardes van centraal staan: samenwerken, openheid en transparantie, gemeenschap en toegankelijkheid. Leden kunnen hun bedrijf op de locaties van de Kamers vestigen, en alleen gebruik maken van, en betalen voor, de ruimte op het moment dat zij daar behoefte aan hebben.  

In Den Bosch, in Oosterhout, en in Amsterdam hebben wij opslagruimte, vergaderrruimte, kantoorruimte, werkruimte, workshopruimte, en gespreksruimte.  Onze ruimtes kunnen vooraf worden gereserveerd door bedrijven die nog geen coworkers zijn, door contact op te nemen.  Coworking arrangementen variëren van een virtueel kantoor or correspondentie adres tot 24/7 gebruik van de ruimte met een eigen sleutel.  Of een vaste huur.  

Alle Kamers ondersteunen van harte het Coworking Visa Program, waardoor leden van aangesloten coworking-kantooren gratis gebruik kunnen maken van alle coworking-ruimten in meer dan honderd plaatsen in Europa alleen.  .

Ser la primera empresa mexicana inmobiliaria en redefinir la manera de hacer los Bienes Raíces.


VALOR

Efectividad.
Eficiencia.
Satisfacción total de nuestros clientes. 
Honestidad.
Responsabilidad.
Conseguir el mejor precio y las mejores condiciones. 
Servicio integral.

Trabajo en equipo. 
Lo que tu sueñas nosotros te ayudamos a hacerlo realidad. Déjanos ayudarte.

There is always room for negotiation...

Name: Solution Impôt
Description:
La loi Pinel permet aux particuliers acquéreurs d’un bien immobilier locatif de bénéficier d’un avantage fiscal, à savoir une réduction d’impôt. En effet, la loi Pinel récompense les investissements immobiliers locatifs réalisés en France en accordant ladite réduction aux acquéreurs sur leur déclaration, s’ils remplissent un ensemble de conditions, qui sont fixées par la loi.

De manière générale, et indépendamment de la loi Pinel, investir dans l'immobilier exige beaucoup de réflexions et de préparations. Ce type de projet, à la base relativement complexe, nécessite les conseils de professionnels, spécialisés en la matière. Ils vous aideront effectivement à prendre la décision la plus avantageuse en fonction de votre situation et de vos attentes.

Name: InSite Commercial Realty
Description:
The InSite Advantage is the difference between being a Good broker and being a Great broker. Here’s what we mean:

1. Maximizing Values

Good brokers will maximize your property’s value at the closing table. Great brokers know how to maximize your property’s value even before you think of putting it on the market. Are your rents in line with the market and how much can they be increased? Are your operating expenses and taxes in line with similar properties? What level of reserves will be required to satisfy a lender? A great broker shows you how to increase your cash flow and anticipate issues that may arise in a sale.

2. Managing Transactions
Good brokers will find a buyer, hand off the paperwork to other professionals, and show up at the closing. A GREAT broker understands their fiduciary obligation to you survives the signing of a contract. Great brokers help you navigate the nuances and intricacies of a commercial transaction while it is in progress. They become your project manager, a trusted team member ensuring benchmarks are met and potential problems are avoided or addressed in time to overcome them. A GREAT broker protects your time and money by increasing the probability of a successful transaction.

 3. Making Markets
Good brokers seek to match buyers and sellers, landlords and tenants. GREAT brokers CREATE transactions that benefit all parties. They combine information learned during daily conversations and activities with their judgement of what will work for the parties involved. A GREAT broker will present you with opportunities as they arise, and then help you exploit them.

4. Providing Decision Advantage
Good brokers provide market data from “reliable” sources. Great brokers keep your goals and best interests in mind by combing through the various data points, analyzing them and providing you with a Decision Advantage: the information you need to know to make the best decision.

An InSite professional is a GREAT broker!

Name: Kaarsilla Kinnisvara
Description:
We offer high quality commercial real estate development and management services. Our aim is to create unique buildings that are both functional and well designed. To achieve this, we work with renowned architects. Through innovative architecture and modern solutions, we create premises that meet the needs of our customers.

We know our buildings better than anyone else, making our in-house sales team an integral part of the development and leasing process of commercial premises. By mapping the needs of our customers, the sales team ensures that their needs are already taken into account at the development stage. Meanwhile, our property management team ensures that the building, its technical parts and the surrounding area are kept in good order.

Kaarsilla Real Estate has a large customer portfolio ranging from large companies to small businesses, from start-ups to foreign companies.

History
Kaarsilla Kinnisvara OÜ was founded in 1996. established in 1999, is a constantly developing company based on Estonian capital, looking for new challenges and valuing long-term solid partnerships, which has grown out of the Tirsi chain of stores in Tartu, the first of which was established in 1999. in…

2004. The operational rights of the stores and the Tirsi trademark were sold to AS A-Selver in 2004. Since 2004 the company has mainly been active in the rental and development of retail and office premises.

Kaarsilla Kinnisvara OÜ offers premises for tenants in Tartu, Tallinn, Pärnu and Narva. The company is planning to build new retail and office premises on its registered immovables in these cities, as well as in Jõhvi.

Name: Smith Realty Partners
Description:
Former Ohio State University Basketball Captain Rick Smith had accumulated 24 years of standout experience in the competitive commercial real estate industry when a question came to mind:  How great could a commercial real estate firm be if it was free of the burdens of legacy systems and legacy thinking?”

Smith Realty Partners is his answer.  It is an organization to which he has recruited only the best, including partners and team members with broad and successful experience in the commercial real estate marketplace, and a network of partnering organizations that are stars in their respective fields.

The firm is full-service providing commercial real estate investment counsel, brokerage, property management services and more.  Its professional experience and services are best-in-class.  But Smith Realty Services was founded to move beyond those minimal requirements.

Internally, its uniquely open and forthcoming environment fosters loyalty that translates to a level of energy and a freedom to act on the client’s behalf that otherwise could never be achieved.  Externally, the partner’s reputation throughout Ohio and beyond, and the personal, human touch that characterizes their dealings with clients, tenants, vendors and peer organizations earns respect and praise.

For clients, these tangible and intangible qualities set Smith Realty Partners apart from and above the crowd.  For Rick Smith and his team, it is only the beginning.

Name: SoCal Real Estate
Description:
SoCal Real Estate is the only commercial real estate publication dedicated to covering the Orange County, San Diego County, and Inland Empire markets. Our platform of daily e-newsletter, monthly print magazine, and comprehensive website is the most complete way to reach the most important people in Southern California CRE. 

Our daily e-newsletter, “The Briefing,” brings you the most up-to-date CRE news on this region every morning, focusing on the top deals and developments of the day. Our monthly print magazine provides in-depth features on current trends in the region and the industry as a whole, as well as roundtable discussions on hot topics, guest columns, expert commentary on recent legislation’s impact on CRE, updates on key projects in the market, and useful excerpts from market research reports, as well as a round-up of regional news and deals. Our website, updated daily, contains top news as well as archived stories and issues. 

Whether it’s a newly completed sale, lease, or development deal; news about executives on the move; recaps of industry events; or the lowdown on an emerging trend or project, SoCal Real Estate brings it to you first and best. Subscribe today from our homepage so you don’t miss a single story or issue.

Name: The Landmark Baku
Description:
The Landmark Hotel Baku is a mixed-use complex located in the heart of Baku’s CBD. It is the location of choice for the international community operating in Azerbaijan.

The Landmark Hotel is a highly individualized five-star boutique hotel offering guest rooms, suites and apartments. All rooms have high ceilings and an abundance of natural light. Floor-to-ceiling windows provide commanding views of the city skyline or the Caspian Sea. Each room is decorated in warm earth tones and has authentic works by Azeri artists. Rooms feature complimentary high speed internet access and WiFi, large flat-screen TV, DVD player and electronic safe. Oversized bathrooms feature heated floor, washlet, deep bathtub and a separate walk-in rain-shower.

The Landmark Hotel was designed to meet the expectations of business executives. Complimentary use of computers with internet access, printing and scanning facilities is available in the Sky Lobby, local calls are free. Guests receive upon arrival a welcome drink and a bowl of fresh fruit in their rooms. They also benefit from the hotel’s flexible check-in and check-out times policy.

The Landmark Health Club encompasses 2,500 m2 on 2 floors and includes a south facing terrace for sunbathing. The 28 m long “sky pool” is maintained at a comfortable 27° to 28° C. A sauna, steam room and 3 treatment rooms are available. Fitness, yoga and dance classes are provided on most days. A state-of-the art golf simulator is also located in the Health Club.

The Landmark has 7 restaurants, 1 of which has a large outdoor terrace. The Conference & Banqueting Centre has rooms of various sizes including a 700 m2 ballroom. Guests can enjoy watching their film in our private screening room, which has a 5.8 m wide screen.

Name: SmartSpaceUS
Description:
SmartSpace is not just an office space, it's a co-working space. Co-working makes it easy to expose your business to the community, collaborate, learn, and network. This contemporary, professional, and flexible work environment has drop-in options, dedicated desks, and 1 to 4 person offices available. Networking opportunities and a sense of community are big reasons why people pay to work in a communal space as opposed to working from home for free or renting a nondescript office. We encourage a good work-life balance for our members by providing comfortable and functional work spaces in a fun, friendly atmosphere.
 
What does SmartSpace offer?
- AMENITIES: You have access to amenities like a full-time on-site community manager, a kitchen, conference rooms, high speed internet and WiFi, 24/7 access, free coffee and tea, filtered water,  state of the art printer and scanner, and private phone booths. Our conference rooms are fully equipped with white boards and video conferencing. Plus, all utilities are included. 
- FLEXIBILITY: With a month-to-month commitment, you can upgrade as your business grows. Smart Space has office spaces for up to 4 person teams, or you can combine spaces to create your own pod. We also have drop-in daily options.
- CONNECTIONS: You have access to unlimited ideas through our community of entrepreneurs. There’s always a new person to meet.

The combination of a well-designed work environment and a well curated work experience are part of the reason people who choose to co-work at SmartSpace will thrive.

Name: PNVT - Parques de Negócios do Vale do Tejo
Description:
Os Parques de Negócios do Vale do Tejo são as primeiras Áreas de Localização Empresarial (ALE’s) do país.  

São espaços qualificados e de exigente qualidade urbanística destinados a empresas industriais, de logística, comércio e serviços, geridos por uma Sociedade Gestora, com competências de licenciamento, gestão condominial, fiscalização e prestação de serviços de apoio às empresas, reguladas pelo Decreto-Lei n.º 72/2009, de 31 Março.

Incluem uma Aldeia Empresarial (com restaurante, creche/colégio, auditório, salas de formação, salas de reuniões, hotel, agência bancária, health club, vídeoconferência, cafetaria, …) e ainda ETAR, posto de abastecimento, incubadora de empresas, equipamentos desportivos, área de ciência e tecnologia, ciclovias e espaços verdes.

É assim, e pela positiva, um conceito bem distinto das tradicionais zonas industriais. 

Nestes espaços o licenciamento é imediato por ser da competência da Sociedade Gestora, os índices de construção são bem superiores ao normal, o preço é concorrencial face à área metropolitana de Lisboa, as acessibilidades são excelentes e os compradores beneficiam de isenção de IMI e IMT e de incentivos financeiros do QREN (NUT de Objectivo I).

Os Parques de Negócios que neste momento temos em comercialização situam-se em:
    • Cartaxo – junto ao nó da A1 e com frente de 1 km para esta auto-estrada;
    • Rio Maior – junto ao nó da A15;
    • Torres Novas – junto ao nó da A23.
Três localizações de excelência.

Name: Headwater Capital
Description: Headwater Capital (www.headwatercapital.com) is a private equity firm specializing in long-term, secure cash flow from commercial real estate. Based on 45+ years of experience in CRE investing, the company exclusively invests in demographically secure, low risk retail developments in growing, economically prosperous markets around the country. Investments are skillfully sourced and structured to provide reliable and secure cash flow, and a hedge against volatile equity markets and inflation. Headwater’s team of professionals conducts a meticulous fundamental property analysis and technical appraisal to ensure safe and reliable cash flow, with the potential for significant capital appreciation over time. Estamos buscando cada vez mais, estar atualizados de informações e serviços que possam oferecer com a maior rapidez e presteza o que o mercado imobiliário necessita do profissional.

Nossa Missão
Satisfazer as necessidades de nossos clientes mediante um serviço personalizado, preservando a integridade e a qualidade em todas as nossas intermediações.

Serviços
Consultoria Imobiliaria
Assessoramos aos nossos clientes a encontrar o imóvel adequado a seus anseios e necessidades.
Prestamos Consultoria a promotores e/ou construtores, para que desenvolvam o produto adequado ao que o mercado busca, tanto em localização, desenho, preço e qualidade.

Identificação, avaliação e aquisição de imóveis.
Orientação no lançamento e comercialização do produto, com assessoria nas vendas das unidades imobiliárias.

Documentação Imobiliaria
Elaboração de contratos de compra e venda, levantamento de certidões necessárias para a venda e compra de um imóvel, processo de escrituras públicas e de registro de imóveis. 

Financiamento Imobiliario
Nossos serviços envolvem todas as etapas do processo de financiamento, desde o cadastramento do cliente, a obtenção da documentação exigida, incluindo certidões pessoais e do imóvel, a análise cadastral e de crédito requerida, a contratação e o registro dos contratos da hipoteca.

Name: SYPN

Connecting people in property in South Yorkshire

Name: CO-LAB ESPAI DE TREBALL
Description:
Co-Lab és un espai de treball compartit (Coworking). Cada vegada són més les empreses que com nosaltres, decideixen compartir oficina. Oferim a altres autònoms, emprenedors o freelance la possibilitat de Connectar, Col·laborar, Compartir i Innovar. 
Cada vegada són més les empreses que com nosaltres, decideixen compartir oficina i sortir de casa.
Si estàs teletreballant, a CO-LAB trobaràs la via d’escapament que estaves buscant, seràs més eficient a la vegada que comparteixes experiències i projectes amb altres empreses.
CO-LAB és un projecte nascut de tres empreses locals. Després d’haver conegut l’experiència coworking i de treballar des de casa, ens vam juntar per oferir a altres emprenedors, freelance i autònoms la possibilitat de Connectar, Compartir, Col·laborar i Innovar en un espai de treball compartit.
Oferim el servei d'espai de traball Fixe, per dies i hores. També disposes de Sala de Reunions, Office, Internet i Impresora, entre altres, inclòs en el preu.

Name: F.L. Ejendomme A/S
Description:
F.L. Ejendomme A/S er en aktiv familiedrevet virksomhed med investering, udvikling og porteføljepleje som hovedformål.
F.L. Ejendomme har flere datterselskaber, og koncernen har eksisteret siden 2000 og har rødder tilbage til 1959. Vi er beliggende på Ahlgade 40, 1. i Holbæk.

Vores fokusområde er erhvervsejendomme med god beliggenhed, og vi har valgt hovedsagligt at beskæftige os med ejendomme i Holbæk Centrum og Holbæk Megacenter. Det er alle ejendomme, som er kendetegnet ved god risikospredning, meget lav tomgang, god vedligeholdelsestand, højt serviceniveau og professionel administration. Vi lægger vægt på at servicere lejere i vores ejendomme gennem vores ejendomsadministration.

Derudover ejer og administrerer vi tillige ejendomme i andre selskaber samt ejerforeninger.
Ejendommene består primært af attraktive erhvervslejemål til detail og kontor samt en mindre andel boliglejemål.

Det er vores mål, at porteføljen altid fremstår med højt profilerede og særdeles velholdte ejendomme, der er konkurrencedygtige med byens øvrige udlejningsejendomme. Vores forretningsmetoder bygger på gensidig tillid, hvilket understøttes af vores dybdegående lokalkendskab og gode netværk.

Name: Integra Real Estate Capital
Description:
Integra arranges permanent, bridge and construction loans for the acquisition and refinance of commercial real estate and multifamily properties across United States. 

Our clients benefit from our strong relationships with more than 150 traditional and non-traditional lenders such as local and national banks, CMBS conduit lenders, agency lenders (Fannie Mae/Freddie Mac), life insurance companies, mortgage REITs, credit unions and private equity funds.

Name: Gatlin Development Company
Description:
Gatlin Development Company, Inc. (“GDC”), is a real estate investment corporation specializing in retail shopping center development, management and renovation. The company was founded by Frank C. Gatlin III, CEO. in 1976 with a mission statement based on integrity, commitment, and experience. The principal of the GDC team possess decades of experience in retail development. They also have extensive knowledge with respect to the development of custom luxury homes, affordable single-family homes, apartment complexes, retirement housing, hotels, light industrial buildings, and self-storage facilities.
Gatlin Development Company’s main focus since 1984 has been the development of Walmart anchored shopping centers. Since 1984 Gatlin Development Company has developed over seven million square feet of retail shopping centers valued at over one billion dollars. Gatlin Development Company’s projects are located all over the United States.
Gatlin Development Company prides itself on the ability to adjust to economic and market conditions to maximize returns, growth, and profitability. GDC has consistently been able to modify its business model to meet market conditions, even during the economic downturns of the last few years.
The ever-expanding vision of CEO Frank Gatlin continues to widen the company’s investment focus while consistently providing maximized returns to investors, financial opportunities to retailers both large and small, and growth and revitalization to communities and local businesses facing challenging economic times. With headquarters in Jacksonville Florida, Gatlin is well positioned and eager to pursue investment opportunities nationwide.

Coldwell Banker Commercial es el Sistema de Soluciones Inmobiliarias de mayor trayectoria y prestigio en los Estados Unidos.

Su historia de liderazgo, innovación y éxito se remonta a San Francisco en 1906. Después de un terremoto devastador, un joven Profesional del real estate, Colbert Coldwell, vio la necesidad de brindar servicios inmobiliarios de confianza, honestos y conocedores para ayudar a reconstruir la ciudad. Años más tarde, Benjamín Arthur Banker se unió a esta iniciativa, convirtiéndose en su socio cofundador.

El Sistema Coldwell Banker Commercial comprende la empresa de Soluciones Inmobiliarias más grande del mercado Internacional, con:

Tecnología líder en la industria
Cerca de 3200 Profesionales que confiaron en nuestro Sistema, distribuidos en 174 oficinas a nivel Internacional
El Sistema Coldwell Banker Commercial en su página web cbcworldwide.com cuenta con más de 15.000 propiedades listadas
Más de 14.000 transacciones realizadas anualmente

Con el respaldo de más de 100 años de integridad, experiencia y valor, el Sistema Coldwell Banker Commercial brinda a los Profesionales una gama de servicios diseñados para agregar valor a su gestión, esto los convierte en especialistas del mercado, garantizando a sus clientes Corporativos, Pymes, Propietarios, como Inversores y Usuarios (inquilinos) servicios de excelencia y calidad para su negocio.

Coldwell Banker Commercial es el sistema líder en la industria de Commercial Real Estate. Se ha extendido a nivel internacional, siendo subsidiario de Realogy Corporation LLC.

El Sistema Coldwell Banker Commercial Uruguay llegó en el 2013 como la propietaria de la master Coldwell Banker Commercial, con derechos exclusivos para este país. Los accionistas han tenido la misma visión y empuje que los fundadores en 1906, con el objetivo de traer el Sistema a Uruguay para convertirse en el referente de todos aquellos Profesionales que desean brindar un servicio en Bienes Raíces honesto, ético y profesional.

Name: Bermuda Land Development Company Ltd.
Description:
The Bermuda Land Development Company Limited (BLDC) was formed in 1996 to foster the development of roughly 400 acres of land across four sites in Bermuda, i.e. Southside, Daniel’s Head, Tudor Hill, and Morgan’s Point. BLDC was established by the Bermuda Government to oversee these properties previously occupied by the US and Canadian military. 

BLDC’s mandate is to reintegrate these sites into Bermuda’s social and economic fabric, creating employment and opportunities for the well-being of the present and future generations of Bermudians.

Headed by a Board of Directors, the BLDC is a financially self-sufficient, private company.

Its overall responsibility is to manage, finance, promote and transform the former military base lands into sustainable, long-term environments for the communities in which they are located. BLDC’s mantra is to create communities where individuals can LIVE, WORK, and PLAY.

The largest parcel of land is at Southside in St. George’s Parish – a growing, self-sustained community where housing, commercial and leisure opportunities abound. The BLDC’s portfolio at Southside encompasses pristine beaches, private residences, affordable housing, commercial properties, warehouses, a bowling alley, a former cinema, restaurants, retail, berths, vacant development lots, walking trails and other sporting venues.  Its maintenance responsibilities include road infrastructure, landscaping, street lighting, sewage, water supply and telecommunications.

At Daniel’s Head in Sandys, the 17-acre BLDC property is surrounded by water on three sides and boasts eight, small beaches. At Tudor Hill and Morgan’s Point in Southampton, BLDC’s retains beautiful waterfront parcels with sweeping views of the South Shore and Great Sound, respectively.

In the future, BLDC will continue to seek new development opportunities that will yield significant benefits for Bermuda and its residents.

Name: Stéphane Plaza Immobilier Bordeaux Rive Droite
Property Tax Advisory Group
Description:
Property Tax Advisory Group, Inc. (PTAG) is a national organization whose focus is helping companies and institutions increase profits by reducing the burden of personal property and/or real estate taxes. Our professionals are nationally and state certified and work in each state where there is an assessing jurisdiction.

Personal property tax is an area in which overpayment to the state and county tax collectors is the rule rather than the exception. Property tax overpayments are often the result of understaffed accounting departments racing to meet tax filing deadlines and hurriedly submitting reports without the advantage of knowing many of the property tax regulations. Additionally, taxing authorities who process these reports are also pressed to meet deadlines. They have little or no time to correct taxpayer renditions that are not taking full advantage of the tax codes and regulations.

Personal Property Taxes are imposed on capital machinery, furniture, equipment and other tangible assets.

Real Estate Taxes are those which are imposed by the county on physical land, buildings and improvements.

Name: National Cost Segregation Services (NCSS)
Description:
We are proud to provide cost segregation services to Real Estate and Tax Professional throughout the United States of America.

Cost segregation is the correct and most efficient method to depreciating commercial property. By applying its principles, significant portions of building costs can be depreciated in as few as 5, 7, and 15 years instead of the standard 27.5 years for residential rental property or 39 years for commercial property.

NCSS has completed thousands of successful cost segregation studies. We are comprised of Big 4 Accounting Firm Alumni, full-time experienced construction engineers, and a dedicated team of CPA's. We have a "No Loss Record" with IRS Audits and we provide ongoing IRS protection with every study we complete! 

The first step to determining if cost segregation would be advantageous in your tax situation is to run the numbers and then discuss those numbers with your tax adviser. We provide projections free of charge and can usually have numbers within your hands within 1 day.

The company has since created a rich portfolio of developments that span retail, restaurant, residential, hotel, serviced apartment and commercial office buildings.

Krukziener Properties has been responsible for the purchase and development of over 100 residential and commercial buildings throughout Auckland. Widely acknowledged as the market leader in quality design, Krukziener Properties has received a number of industry awards including a number of BOMA Design Excellence Awards, Tourism and Leisure Property Awards and an Australasian Award for Best International Construction Project. 

The most widely recognised of these developments are the restoration of the Customhouse into DFS Galleria, the transformation of the Old Magistrates Courthouse into the Metropolis five star hotel entrance, the refurbishment of the former New Art Gallery into retail and offices and the refurbishment of One Queen Street into HSBC's NZ Head office.

Krukziener Properties has consistently been a leader in the market, setting new benchmarks of quality and value within Auckland City. Krukziener Properties is committed to the preservation of historical buildings through discerning renovation and has restored and redeveloped many recognised landmarks in Auckland City. The goal of Krukziener Properties is to create profitable, quality projects that provide a quality environment in which people enjoy living and working. Name: Art Guild House,The Phoenix Mills Ltd.
Description:
The Phoenix Mills Limited has elevated Kurla into a suave, futuristic, regal and artistic blend of commercial and retail spaces.The area houses "Phoenix Marketcity", which is Mumbai’s biggest retail led mixed used development which houses Mumbai’s largest mall.

The company has now launched their most prestigious and most sought after project in the last decade in the same mixed used development “The Art Guild House” where Art meets Business. This will offer state-of-the-art office spaces planned over six floors and two basements parking in the center of the emerging economic hub of Phoenix Marketcity, Kurla.

  Unique Features of the Art Guild House:

    "Art Guild House" offers opulent interiors with exquisite Art installations, never before seen structural interiors, dynamic art galleries amidst a sophisticated business environment spread across a total area of 8 lakh sq ft. offering 179 units, ranging from 900 to 4000 sq ft. large business houses can occupy an entire floor which offers up to 1.5 lakh sq. ft.

The Art Guild House will benefit from increased and easier accessibility to Kurla with the new projects that have brought the far ends of the city closer like Santacruz-Chembur Link Road, Eastern Express Freeway, Monorail and the Metro Rail project. Enhanced connectivity to Santacruz Domestic Airport and Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport and easily accessible from the east and West pockets of the city.

Mixing work with pleasure as part of the largest retail and commercial development in Mumbai and increasing productivity of employees with offices inspiring art, premium amenities and several recreational options within the same vicinity.

Competitively priced at a fraction of rate of office spaces available at Bandra-Kurla Complex.

For the first time a commercial building will showcase the work of Indian contemporary artists by housing inspirational permanent installations.

The Art Guild House has a LEED certification

Name: NAI Harcourts Metro
Description:
NAI Harcourts Metro offers a spectrum of commercial real estate services to a wide range of clients from local businesses to national corporations and international investors.

NAI Harcourts is the powerful combination of two established and highly successful international real estate companies. Harcourts International and NAI Global.
As the consequences of the Global Financial Crisis (GFC) hit the real estate services world in 2009, there emerged a market opportunity to launch a business in Australasia to meet the needs of property owners, developers, and occupiers as well as the needs of traditionally independent real estate firms who previously had competed as individual firms. The market was ready for a new and fresh participant created from the culture of accountability that comes from independent ownership yet recognises the importance of being coordinated and consistent in order to deliver quality service and solutions.

NAI Harcourts is the result.

NAI Global is the 4th largest commercial real estate services company in the world. Harcourts International is a fast-growing Australasian-based franchise network with a strong foundation in the residential property market.

With our united strengths, we bring you the very best in local commercial property solutions harnessed by formidable global resources.
From a large network of offices all over Australia and New Zealand, we offer a large and talented team of professionals ready to meet the needs of local, national, and internationally based individuals and organisations.
By combining local expertise with the market intelligence, tools, systems, and support available through our global partnerships, we provide our clients with a unique competitive advantage. An advantage that has proven us to be a force in Australia and New Zealand commercial real estate solutions.

Name: Blackfin LLC

Building Operations & Maintenance

Diagnostics and Troubleshooting
Energy Audits and ENERGY STAR Benchmarking
Mechanical, Electrical & Plumbing (MEP) Engineering
Building Systems Owner’s Representation
Commissioning and Retro-Commissioning
Property Condition Assessments

Blackfin specializes in improving building performance, increasing tenant satisfaction, and extending asset life, while focusing on energy efficiency and sustainability. Ready to elevate your building operations? Let’s connect to discuss how we can enhance your property’s performance and profitability.

Name: NIVOU Kontorfællesskab
Description:
Merging work, life & people in the heart of Aarhus.

Hos NIVOU er målet at skabe et attraktivt arbejdsmiljø for den mindre, men etablerede virksomhed. 
Bliv en del af et kontorfællesskab, der har fokus på at assistere virksomhedernes drift og vækst i inspirerende og motiverende omgivelser med en stærk kultur. Som en del heri vil der løbende blive afholdt arrangementer, der netop skal skabe en fælles kultur og relationer på tværs af virksomhederne.

Vi har i samarbejde med HAY og Jensenplus sørget for, at hele kontorfællesskabet er indrettet med flotte designmøbler, så virksomheden kan flytte direkte ind i behagelige og flotte omgivelser.

Inkluderede faciliteter:
- Fibernet
- 2 mødelokaler á 8 personer
- Fri kaffe og te i samarbejde med Street Coffee 
- Reception
- Unikt fællesskab på tværs af brancher
- Events (fra talks til fredagsbarer) 
- Mulighed for frokostordning serveret frisk hver dag

Som virksomhed hos NIVOU, bruges Jeres tid og energi på dét, I er bedst til - og som skaber værdi for netop Jeres virksomhed. Til gengæld sørger vi for hurtigt fibernet, varm og frisklavet kaffe samt en piccoline til at tage imod eventuelle gæster, så ingen forstyrres af de praktiske og administrative opgaver, som hører med til at drive et kontor. 

Vores vision er, at skabe et kontorfællesskab til gavn for de enkelte virksomheder. Derfor vil der være et stort fokus på, at de virksomheder som lejer sig ind bliver en del af et netværk, hvor vi hjælper hinanden, og at sammensætningen af de forskellige repræsenterede brancher på kontoret giver mening.

Classée Monument Historique, entourée de douves en eaux vives, cette élégante demeure, vous accueille toute l’année pour vivre une vie de château à la française !

Le centre d’affaires du Château de Bourron :

Un vaste centre d’affaires en Seine et Marne, a vu le jour dans les années 1980, dans les dépendances du Château de Bourron, il propose de nombreux bureaux de 10 à 300 m².
Un site idéal, facile d’accès !

7 km de l’A6, de Fontainebleau et de Nemours, 50 minutes de Paris.
Accès en train : Gare de Paris-Gare de Lyon jusqu’à gare de Bourron-Marlotte/Grez. Trains toutes les heures de 6h19 à 23h17.

Journée d'étude, intencive, séminaires de direction au Château de Bourron :

Mise à disposition de 3 salles de réunion lumineuses, bénéficiant des perspectives nord et sud du parc.
Voici en quelques mots les séminaires au Château de Bourron :
– Discrétion, prestige, espaces verts
- Destination Fontainebleau
-  Séminaire proche de Paris
– Wifi via fibre optique (30 mégas)…

Cadeau d’entreprise :

Vous voulez faire un très beau cadeau à votre client ou à votre associé, offrez-lui un cadeau original : Un séjour au Château de Bourron, qui pourra être agrémenté d’activités sportives ou culturelles.

- income modeling specific to ad valorem taxation
- cost approach
- econometric market sales approach
- early and late stage negotiations

Connolly Hospitality are a Melbourne based business and property agency, specialising in the sale and leasing of all hospitality focused businesses and properties, in particular, Hotels, Bars, Motels and Resorts. The agency draws from four generations of family experience, directly as buyers, owners, operators, vendors and selling agents of hotels, motels and caravan parks.

In late 2012, Pat Connolly established Connolly Hospitality and was joined by his brother Will Connolly. The brothers recognised the need for an agency with a modern, refined approach, that could offer all the technological advantages of a large agency combined with the tailored, personalised service of a boutique agency. Known to hoteliers, moteliers and business owners throughout Australia, the Connolly brothers are passionate in their endeavours to be leaders within the industry through providing successful outcomes.

Specialist services include hotel, motel, bar, restaurant resort and hospitality/leisure business and property sales, leasing, landlord-tenant negotiations, property management, buyers advocacy and more. 

For Connolly Hospitality's latest news, publications, features and articles, see features & articles. To read what Connolly Hospitality's vendors, purchasers and associates have to say, see references. Connolly Hospitality are members of and market businesses and properties for sale through businessesview.com.au and realbusinesses.com.au.

Connolly Hospitality are members of the Australian Hotels Association, Hotel Brokers Association Victoria and the Real Estate Institute of Victoria.

Name: Westcapital Group Pty Ltd
Description:
The Westcapital Group was founded in 1998 by businessmen Alan Johnson and Ian Goodenough.

Johnson and Goodenough first started out in the engineering business through Pipe Supports Australia - supplying a range of brackets, pipe supports, fire sprinkler supports, and mechanical & electrical support systems to the commercial construction industry from their Belmont factory.

Pipe Supports Australia has grown to become a leading supplier to industry in Western Australia, supplying several landmark projects throughout the State including:

Graham Farmer Freeway Tunnel 
Coles and Woolworths Logistics Distribution Centres at Perth Airport 
Perth Convention & Exhibition Centre 
Wastewater Treatment Plants at both Beenyup & Woodman Point 
Shopping centre expansions at Innaloo, Lakeside Joondalup, Whitford City & Westfield Carousel
 
Looking to the future ahead, Johnson and Goodenough sought to expand their business interests. Their first development project was undertaken on Deanmore Road, in Scarborough. This was soon followed by an up-market townhouse development in the trendy locality of Leederville, the Allum Green retirement village in Merriwa, and the Westcapital Commercial Centre in Belmont. 

From these early beginnings, the Westcapital Group has amassed a diverse portfolio of commercial and residential projects.

Today, the Group has a diverse range of  commercial projects throughout Western Australia including offices, warehouses, showrooms, retail and commercial.

Name: Hotel Investment Italy - Wellness Spa Country Resort
Description:
Hotel Investment Italy is the name of a mission project regarding the research analysis for professional investors interested in buying a beautiful estate in Italy in order to develop a Wellness Spa Country Resort.
The mission is promoting the business opportunity among professionals in order to create a networking aimed to the closing of the operation.
The owner of the real estate property is a family based company and is looking for investors interested in acquiring it in order to develop and manage the real estate operation as a portfolio investment or in order to resell it after development.
The transaction of sale is direct between the parties, without brokerage fees.


The investment consists of Real Estate development and revitalization of an historic Spa business in the Province of Rimini (near Bologna and Ravenna), by acquiring the company owner of:
•	Concession for the exploitation of three hot mineral thermal springs, blessed by St. Francis of Assisi and with multiple therapeutic applications;
•	An estate of a total of 83,400 Sq m, of which 9,000 Sq m is for agricultural use and 74,400 Sq m has permission to develop a SPA-Hotel Resort up to 4,450 Sq m floor area;
•	Existing buildings, for a total of 1,200 square meters, used as offices, bistro, multiple restrooms to support to the hosting capacity of the park, and an unfinished hotel (built in the 70's, with an unfinished second floor after a  renovation in 2004), with 22 rooms and spacious lounges.
•	Plumbing facilities and wells for spa water.

The building construction will be agreed with the council after proposing a detailed architectural design. This will permit the optimization of the building according to the business mix and the intention of the purchaser of the real estate.

Name: I&D Consulting Services
Description:
Overview
We help boutique commercial brokerages stay relevant, and support mission-driven owners and municipalities in delivering signature developments that get approved, funded, and built.

For nearly two decades, I&D Consulting has led $450M+ in industrial, mixed-use, adaptive-reuse, affordable housing, and clean-energy projects from raw dirt to ribbon-cutting.

Our plug-in model gives boutique brokerages, family offices, and civic stakeholders the development horsepower they need to:

1) Protect momentum through entitlement strategy, utility coordination, and incentive stacking
2) Retain trust by executing beyond the listing
3) Share upside via co-development, JV, or advisory engagements

Who We Help
- Boutique CRE Brokerages (3–10 producers) facing complex, high-stakes listings
- Mission-Driven Owners – nonprofits, faith-based groups, community developers
- Cities & Agencies – navigating catalytic sites and public-private projects

Core Specialties
• Mixed-use & infill development
• Adaptive reuse & site rollouts
• LIHTC & workforce housing
• EV / hydrogen infrastructure
• Disaster-recovery & rebuilds
• Dry-utility planning + approvals

End-to-End Services
- Site selection & due diligence
- Entitlements, zoning, permitting
- Utility coordination across agencies
- Owner-representation & rollout execution
- Dev-OS: Our in-house project operating system for clarity, speed, and scale

Engagement Options
1) Advisory Sprint – Rapid roadmap to clear early-stage roadblocks
2) Execution Arm – We run the playbook, you stay front-and-center
3) Co-Development – Shared risk, shared reward via flexible JV models

Outcome:
You preserve your client relationships, protect margins, and deliver real projects with less friction and more momentum.

At I&D we don’t just think outside the box—we threw the box away.

Name: National Association of Commercial Real Estate Due Diligence Professionals
Description: The National Association of Commercial Real Estate Due Diligence Professionals is an organization that brings together the end users and professional providers of engineering, environmental, construction, seismic and architectural due diligence services as defined by our governing agency, ASTM International. The main services provided and governed are property condition assessments, phase one environmental reports seismic probable maximum loss and construction disbursement reports. We strive to maintain only those members who can be identified as having a need for these services, or the professional credentials and associations necessary to provide them. NCARDDP was organized over a year ago around the basic goal of enhancing the quality of due diligence throughout the industry by encouraging discussions and feedback between both users and providers and providing the medium to do this.  Over 1,300 members have utilized NCARDDP to both increase their due diligence business and decrease their liabilities for all aspects of the myriad of differing transactions and challenges the industry provides on a daily basis.  Our goal is to facilitate QUALITY DUE DILIGENCE  in commercial real estate investment banking by providing our membership with the necessary resources, contacts and services to excel at their particular level and position in the industry because, as the ASTM Standards state: “There are varying levels of assessments and due diligence that can be exercised that are both more and less comprehensive than this guide, and that may be appropriate to meet the objectives of the user. Users should consider their requirements, the purpose that the assessment is to serve, and their risk tolerance level before selecting the consultant and the level of due diligence to be exercised by the consultant.”

Name: Lee & Associates Commercial Real Estate Services, Inc. - Riverside
Description:
The Lee & Associates Riverside office was founded by Al Fabiano in 1989 because of the tremendous growth of the Inland Empire through distribution, manufacturing and housing. Little did we know that the real estate market was about to spiral downward. Despite the bleak market, the office continued to grow through the hiring of quality people with experience and local real estate knowledge who understood how to market Industrial, Office, Retail, Land and Investment properties whether in an up or down economy. In 2009 Lee & Associates Riverside office celebrated its 20th anniversary. We have continued to grow despite the ups and downs of the market by hiring and training new brokers and support staff dedicated to a "consultative" approach to their clients.

This pursuit of complete client satisfaction allowed Lee & Associates - Riverside to mirror the explosive growth of the Inland Empire. In 1999 we opened the Temecula Valley office; in September 2007 we opened the West Riverside office, and in January 2008 we opened the Coachella Valley office by hiring local professionals to address the growing commercial real estate needs of Southern and Eastern Riverside County. Since then our Riverside County offices have grown to 60+ highly competent and professional broker/consultants, and support staff, who serve their clients' needs and expectations on a daily basis.

TICPM staff members have a depth of experience in their chosen profession and possess credentials such as Certified Public Accountant, Real Property Administrator, Certified Commercial Investment Manager and Certified Property Manager.

TICPM holds the prestigious Accredited Management Organization (AMO) designation from the Institute of Real Estate Management (IREM), an affiliate of the National Association of Realtors. Awarded to real estate firms with a superior track record of high performance, experience, stability, and financial accountability, the AMO designation signifies excellence within the industry.

By adopting the simple model of chopping up their studio they were able to reduce their overheads while also creating an environment that was conducive not just to the arts but to enterprising individuals and companies.

As their focus shifted from their own art and more into creating these environments Artistic Spaces really came to be. Year on year the company has grown and now operates across a large part of London with some 200 units ranging from 100sq ft to 10,000 sq ft.

Niet nuilen, maar doen, zoals ze in Nijmegen zeggen.

Inmiddels richten we ons allang niet meer alleen op het beheer van studentenkamers, maar op alle soorten woonruimte voor studenten en jonge werkenden. Dat doen we in de regio 024, maar ook in Arnhem, Grave, Wijchen en Wageningen. Met ons team van vaste medewerkers kunnen wij u van dienst zijn op elk gebied van de vastgoedmarkt. Neem gerust eens contact op om te bekijken wat wij voor u kunnen betekenen.

Voor woningzoekenden geldt dat beschikbare woningen uit de panden die KBS Vastgoedbeheer in beheer heeft, op deze website en via Facebook zullen worden aangeboden.

KBS Vastgoedbeheer is gevestigd in de Van Welderenstraat in  het centrum van Nijmegen, vlakbij het grootste gedeelte van onze woningen. Hier hebben wij bewust voor gekozen zodat verhuurders en huurders altijd binnen kunnen lopen voor vragen en advies. De koffie staat klaar, de hond ligt voor de deur.

Description:

Over 9,000 members, who include 70% of the Fortune 100 and nearly half of the Forbes Global 2000, meet locally, globally and virtually to develop networks, share knowledge, learn and thrive professionally.

Bura fərqli və intellektual insanların bir yerə toplandığı eqzotik, sakit və rahat iş məkanıdır. Burada fərqli iş adamlarını tanımağınıza, iş münasibətlərinizi möhkəmləndirməyinizə, həyat keyfiyyətinizi artırmağınıza və yeniliklərə əsaslanan korporativ təcrübələri yaşamağınıza şərait yaradılıb.

Korporativ mühitlər sizi şübhəsizki inkişaf etdirir. Məqsədimiz korporativ mühit yaratmaqla sizin bacarıqlarınızı və potensialınızı başqaları ilə paylaşmağınıza şərait yaratmaqdır. Başqa tərəfdən yanaşsaq siz özünüzü və işinizi, sizinlə eyni korporativ mühitdə çalışan yoldaşlara reklam etmiş olursunuz. Sakit bir mühitdə fikirləşmək, fikirlərinizi paylaşmaq, iş qurmaq, yeni tanıdığınız yoldaşlarla əməkdaşlıq etmək üçün CODESK sizə şərait yaradıb. 

Siz burada aylıq Dərs Otaqları kirayələyə bilərsiniz və dərslərinizi sizə uyğun istədiyiniz qrafikdə tədris edə bilərsiniz. Bununla yanaşı sizə iclas etməyiniz və seminarlar verməyiniz üçün iclas zalı təqdim edirik. 

Biz sizə yaradıcılığa açıq kollektiv ilə müxtəlif xüsusiyyətlərə malik peşəkar profilləri əhatə edən yüksək motivasiyalı bir məkanda bənzərsiz bir təcrübə təklif edirik.

Name: icraburada.com
Description:
Ne derler bilirsiniz, “Alırken kazanılır”, işte biz karlı bir yatırım fırsatı olarak gördüğümüz icralık gayrimenkul ve icralık taşıtlarla ilgili olarak bu şiardan yola çıkarak hareket ediyoruz. Ve bizim gibi düşünen kişiler için icradan menkul ve gayrimenkul alımında takip, bilgilendirme, analiz ve raporlama gibi işlerin peşinde koşturuyoruz. Üstelik kocaman bir uzman ekip(Hukuk danışmanları, icra takip yetkilileri, özel müşteri temsilcileri, veri tabanı yöneticileri, risk analizciler. Hatta sizinle ihalelere giren eksper takımı), sadece bu konuyla ilgileniyor ki, icra ihalelerinden yapılan alımlarda risk en az düzeye insin.
 
icraburada.com, her gün 400’den fazla yayın takip ediyor ve Türkiye’de en çok icra ihalesi indeksleyen site oluyor,  üstelik icralık gayrimenkul ve taşıtları sadece indekslemiyor bir de üzerine danışmanlık, ihalelere katılım, eksper desteği ve hukuksal temsilci yani avukatlık hizmeti veriyor.
 
Biz  icra ihalelerine katılımı arttırmak ve icra ihaleleri takibinde yasalık, güven ve hakkın tecellisi hususunu görev edindik. Zira icradan gayrimenkul ve taşıt almak önemli bir yatırım; bunun için en uygun ve en sağlıklı şartların hazırlanması da bizim misyonumuz.
 
İcra ihaleleri dendi mi akla gelen ilk marka olmak. Ve bunu güvenilirliğimiz, saygınlığımız ve sağladığımız fayda ile yaratmak. Önemli olan kazanmak ama insan da kazanmak. Bizim vizyondan anladığımız budur.

Name: Library Rooms London
Description:
The Library Rooms offer beautifully designed and premium located talk therapy spaces in London. 

In the Library Rooms you will find a home for your psychotherapy practice.  We place the client therapy experience at the center of our space design, with therapeutically aware receptionists, elegant waiting areas, beautiful clean bathrooms, and an easy journey by elevator to the therapy space.  

Our emphasis is on creating an aesthetically pleasurable space for talk therapy.  Our rooms include beautiful new modern British-designed furniture and prints of appealing abstract art.  Each room is thoughtfully furnished with fresh flowers, tissues, and shelves filled with books on psychology, philosophy and literature.  

Professionalism and discretion is paramount, and along with a discreet receptionist, each room has a Do Not Disturb sign on the door, along with excellent naturally sound proofed period building walls.   There are also silent clocks in each space in view of the therapist, allowing time to be checked without disruption.

In our design we have found the balance between a therapy and work space, where each room comes with a simple writing desk, complementary phone, WIFI, and charging station, along with basic stationary requirements.   Adjacent to each therapy room is a kitchen with complementary espresso/cappuccino machine, tea, soft drinks and snacks to keep you focused during your time in the Library Rooms. 

In keeping with the quality of the professional atmosphere we only work with accredited therapists on a medium or long term basis.   A minimum of 4 hours per week must be booked. 

Rooms are generally booked in 4-hour slots, with 3 blocks per day: morning (8-12), afternoon (12:30-4:30), and evening (5-9).  We schedule a 30 minute break after each block, allowing reflective time for the therapist to write up notes and a calm changeover.  Flexibility is possible depending on availability and hours can be swapped within a month, at no extra cost.

Name: Nidos.Work
Description:
Atuando no segmento de escritórios corporativos, escritórios compartilhados e coworking desde 2010, oferecemos soluções completas para montagem e gestão de espaços de trabalho para empresas de todos os segmentos.

 

Somos uma equipe multidisciplinar de administradores, arquitetos, engenheiros e designers propondo soluções personalizadas para cada tipo de negócio.



Quando decidimos criar a Nidos.Work, nosso objetivo era oferecer muito mais do que espaços de escritório compartilhados. Desde sempre, nosso negócio não se baseia em "locação mesas por hora", mas sim em prover um ambiente inspirador, criativo e comunitário, onde cada membro se sinta um orgulhoso proprietário do nosso espaço.

Nossas instalações estão localizadas em um prédio monousuário de 3 patamares e 1000 m2, estacionamento próprio e ao lado do Metrô São Joaquim, com acesso fácil a 23 de maio, região central e Av. Paulista. Escolhemos sair dos grandes centros financeiros da cidade, buscando uma alternativa de escritório mais sustentável e assumindo um compromisso social com a revitalização do bairro do qual fazemos parte, porque entendemos a importância de gerar um impacto positivo na comunidade do nosso entorno através da economia, investimentos e atração de pessoas para a região. Por isso, escolhemos a Liberdade que hoje é um polo urbano de criatividade, cultura e artes na cidade de São Paulo, além da já tradicional cultura oriental presente na região. Cercada por excelentes restaurantes, comércio e escritórios, a unidade ainda conta com acesso por ciclovia que está ligada as principais regiões da cidade.

Name: Harvey Ramirez Realtor
Description:
As an ardent realtor, I bridge the distance between people wanting to sell their homes and those looking to buy their dream house. I have a firm belief that the house and the community play a significant role in developing one’s personality and life experiences.
Born to a farm foreman of Yuba City CA who arrived in California in 1950s, I grew up in a very small farming community. Having my family settled here for long, I developed long-life ties with people of different cultures. Enjoying deeply entrenched ties with the North Cal community, I have raised my family here to strengthen my bond with our community. That exposure has helped me evolve as a person and a professional.

I take my job seriously, which is to help with the transfer of a house’s legacy and memories from one hand to the other. People remember me as a resourceful and knowledgeable realtor. I rely mainly on the referral business and repeat the clients. I strictly adhere to the top-notch work ethic. My values and ethics are the reason I have made my mark on the industry.

Living my passion, I have remained in the estate business in different capacities for over 20 years. I acquired my real estate license in 2013 to materialize my deep-rooted passion for helping people in real estate.

Nuestros asesores y agentes inmobiliarios serán los encargados de ayudar a los vecinos y visitantes de la zona a la hora de comprar, vender o alquilar un inmueble aplicado a todas las fases del proceso, desde la captación hasta la postventa.

Nuestro objetivo a corto plazo es la implantación de la marca en la zona, haciendo un trabajo honesto desde el principio para consolidar con fuerza nuestra presencia en el barrio.

El barrio madrileño de Aluche, perteneciente al distrito de Latina, está situado junto a la Casa de Campo y el barrio de Campamento. Cuenta con un extraordinario acceso a  diferentes sistemas de transporte público, en Cercanías la línea c-5, en el Metro de Madrid la línea 5, y la línea 6 da el servicio al barrio con la estación de Carpetana, en autobuses son varias las líneas que pasan por las calles de este barrio tanto urbanas como interurbanas. Cuenta con dos parques, Parque Aluche y Parque de las Cruces, con caminerías para el disfrute de toda la familia. Uno de los principales llamativos de este barrio es su polideportivo, que cuenta con piscinas de invierno, y verano, canchas de futbol, baloncesto, pádel, tennis, y pista de patinaje.

Aluche es un barrio pintoresco y peculiar donde conviven diversas culturas y eso es lo que lo hace destacar, sus factores multiculturales hacen que encuentres todo tipo de gente de diferentes tipologías, nacionalidades, y costumbres, haciéndolo un barrio bastante interesante.

Name: Carolina Coworking
Description:
Carolina Coworking is creating and cultivating a community of growing businesses and creative entrepreneurs with space-as-a-service. Our spaces include over 7,000 square feet of coworking space, private offices, and a conference center where our community members can collaborate and network with the larger professional community. Located in Downtown Chapel Hill, Carolina Coworking finds its home across the street from the University of North Carolina and is surrounded by hundreds of restaurants and entertainment options. Parking is also available nearby. All community members enjoy high-speed wifi, color laser printing, a break room complete with gourmet coffee all day long, locking storage, and a shower/Mother's room.

The space is only the beginning of our amenities though. We're focused on contributing to the support and development of vibrant companies and a diverse business environment. Free weekly Wednesday Workshops featuring a seminar by an industry professional followed by a happy hour provide our community members with the opportunity to expand their knowledge and network. Via the new Coworks application available for smart phones, community members will be able to interface directly with each other through the directory, browse through upcoming events, and reserve spaces. Finally, our staff is always available to help with any unique questions and to facilitate networking opportunities for all of our community members. 

Our Founder and Community Director Gregg Gerdau: “We envision engaging our local community with frequent open networking events, lunch-and-learn seminars and a great place to work across the street from one of the world’s renowned research universities. Why just lease empty space when, by subscribing to Carolina Coworking, you can join a community of like-minded entrepreneurs and creatives collaborating with experts and professional resources.”

Schedule a visit today at www.carolinacoworking.com/contact

Name: Dynamic Energy Assessors
Description:
Hello,
 
We are a team of tried-and-trusted associates working from our base in Croydon and we enable your planning applications to meet current requirements.
 
We provide a national service for BREEAM consultancy and assessment, Code for Sustainable Homes consultancy and assessments (CSH), SAP, Water and Daylighting calculations, Energy Performance Certificates (EPC) for commercial & domestic properties (SAP & RdSAP) and energy consultancy for individuals and businesses.
 
Many local authorities now require CSH standards and SAP calculations/EPCs to meet domestic planning requirements whilst BREEAM certification is required for commercial. Having quality advice from a BREEAM/SAP/Code Assessor during the development ensures a successful planning application. We will define available options and the impact of each option on the project allowing you to choose the most effective. We then provide the required certificates upon completion.
 
Choose Dynamic Energy Assessors for your BREEAM consultancy, Code assessment, SAP, Water or Daylighting calculations, EPC or energy consultancy, and we promise you a fast, efficient, and hassle-free service.
 
Call us free with your Code planning requirements on 0800 090 1605
 
I look forward to talking to you soon
 
Derek White
 Senior Consultant
 
For your reassurance, we are fully insured and accredited

Name: Bayleys in the North Commercial & Industrial
High Demand Real Estate
Description:
Jose is a licensed real estate broker since 1994, specializing in identifying compliant commercial real estate for all cannabis use types. He brings extensive commercial real estate joint venture capital experience with expertise in acquisitions, operations, dispositions, as well as debt placement for investment grade and income producing commercial real estate with tax sensitive exit strategies.

Jose is a partner for La Corona Wellness, a cannabis dispensary scheduled to open on 4/20, at 3326 Mission St, San Francisco. Jose and his partners also have 3 other retail locations in San Francisco going through the permitting process.

Jose volunteers and serves on the boards of various civic, community and business organizations, serving in high executive leadership positions and currently serves as the President of the San-Francisco Filipino-American Chamber of Commerce.

He proudly served as Chairman for the National Federation of Filipino American Associations
(NaFFAA), Region 8, Northern California from 2004-2010 and advocated on community and economic development and social justice issues for the underserved ethnic minority communities in the Bay Area.

As a cannabis advocate, Jose serves on the Cannabis Working Group Committee for the California Hispanic Chamber of Commerce helping stakeholders understand and create programs and business opportunities under “Social Equity” initiatives. Jose has had several brain injuries stemming from the removal of a sizeable brain tumor in 1993. He benefitted from the use of cannabis replacing very strong prescribed seizure and pain medications allowing normalcy in his day to day life.

Dear Family and Friends:

I don’t post much about myself on a professional level, but, I wanted to share some exciting news with you.

Over the past several years, I've been active and involved in the Cannabis Industry on a host of fronts, learning all I can about this plant and business, which is poised to make an economic and community impact, the likes of which I’ve not seen in my 25+ years of advocating for our underserved and minority businesses and communities.

I’m involved as a commercial real estate broker specializing in identifying cannabis compliant properties to lease, sell, purchase, or, manage, as well as consulting with all parties (Landlord/Tenant & Buyer/Seller) in an effort to ensure local and state compliance are followed and permits to operate are granted.

I’m involved as a Co-owner for a soon to be opened cannabis dispensary in the Mission-Bernal Heights area of San Francisco, called La Corona Wellness. An almost 2 year process from start to finish with a Grand Opening scheduled in the coming weeks. Obtaining a dispensary permit in San Francisco, is a tall task, particularly the monetary, regulatory, zoning, building and political hurdles needed to get to the finish line. We had some great help along the way and thankful for the community support we’ve received. I’m happy to announce we’re working on our 2nd, 3rd and 4th locations in the City and hope to bring those on line before year end.
Meet individuals who are shaping the industry, as we as those who can assist you in creating and operating a successful Cannabis enterprise.

If you need additional information please call the CHCC office at 916-444-2221.

For those that are interested, there are still EXHIBIT BOOTHS and SPONSORSHIPS available, call the CHCC office for more information at (916) 444-2221.

Name: Walter Wagner Jr Co LLC
Description:
Walter C. Wagner, Jr. began his career in commercial real estate in 1954 after graduating with an economics degree from the University of Notre Dame.  He became an associate of R. J. Stewart & Associates in Louisville, Kentucky.  By 1959, Walter decided to open his own commercial real estate company.  His first major client was the Rouse Company who developed The Mall at St. Matthews, the first fully enclosed mall in Kentucky.  Walter brokered the land lease with the Rouse Company and was the leasing agent for The Mall attracting the original anchor tenants of A & P, Kaufman-Straus and Rose’s.  His next big deal was the sell of Plainview Farms (975 acres) to a group of developers who would later form NTS.

Throughout the 1970′s and 1980′s, the Walter Wagner, Jr. Co. grew and prospered with such major clients as Kroger and Kentucky Fried Chicken.  Walter personally mentored many young agents, some of whom rose to success with their own commercial ventures and real estate firms.

Walter also developed a thriving property management business and oversaw the leasing and management of office buildings, retail centers, and industrial properties for clients.

Jody Zimmerman joined the company in 2002, bringing twenty years of entrepreneurial skills to the company.  He graduated from Clemson University in 1981 with a degree in Chemical Engineering and received his Masters in Business Administration from the University of Louisville in 1986.  Jody is the sales director and the strategic planner for the company.

The Walter Wagner Co., LLC celebrates its fifty seventh year in business in 2017, has twelve associates, and four staff personnel.

Our team is committed to superior client service and we look forward to the next fifty years in business.

Name: State Tower Syracuse
Description:
A rich past, a bright future.

The State Tower is located at 109 South Warren Street in Syracuse and is adjacent to the Connective Corridor—a public-private partnership focused on creative place-making, urban revitalization, complete streetscapes, sustainability, and smart growth. Built in 1927, it shares the Art Deco architectural characteristics of the local Niagara Mohawk Building—as well as the Empire State and Chrysler Buildings, whose construction followed in 1930 and 1928, respectively. The construction features a steel and concrete structure, a decorative terra-cotta and brick façade, and a luxury Art Deco lobby.

The State Tower has a unique “wedding cake” design with floor plates decreasing in size in sections as the building rises. The exterior brick color also transitions from darker to lighter as it rises, giving the building an even greater appearance of height and elegance. At 22 stories and 315 feet tall, the 181,000 square foot building provides unparalleled views and remains the tallest building in Central NY.

The building is an integral part of the Hanover Square Historic District, which is listed on the National Register of Historic Places. Hanover Square is distinguished by a beautiful fountain and plaza where lunchtime entertainment is available during the summer months. The plaza offers a variety of restaurants, cafés, several retail establishments, and loft-type living spaces.

Our apartments have been beautifully constructed and meticulously designed, from the operable windows and Energy Star appliances to the wood cabinetry, ceramic tile, and hardwood floors.

The State Tower boasts 105,000 square feet of fully renovated and meticulously maintained office space in the heart of Syracuse’s commercial district.

Alive with arts and culture, dining, and entertainment, this vibrant area in the heart of downtown Syracuse is the ideal location for shops, stores, boutiques, cafés, and more.

Contact us today to learn more!

Name: Gerrits
Description:

This focus has allowed us to provide coatings solutions on projects throughout the world, ranging from Wal-Marts, to large infrastructure facilities, to the Athens Olympics, to multi-family and single family residences. We have developed scientifically proven formulations for both horizontal and vertical substrate applications; including an extensive line of masonry water repellents and sealers, elastomeric coatings, masonry stains and anti-graffiti products.

Vision
Our vision and focus is clear . . . to manufacture environmentally friendly, value-engineered products that protect structures from weather and graffiti damage. In addition, we have committed a significant amount of capital toward the development of new and innovative products that meet ever-changing construction demands.
	  	 
Rainguard Worldwide
    * Australia

    * Dubai
    * Europe

Our mission is to
    * Develop innovative solution-based products.

Customer Orientation

Op zoek naar een geschikte kantoorruimte?

Via onze website kunt u gratis in contact komen met een makelaar. Hierbij kunt u al uw wensen aangeven en zelfs een geschikte kantoorruimte zoeken die aansluit op uw budget.

Een gratis zoekopdracht plaatsen kan hier:
https://www.kantoorruimtevinden.nl/zoekopdracht-plaatsen/

Wilt u in contact komen met potentiële huurders/kopers?

Wij hebben een uniek systeem waarmee u in contact komt met nieuwe potentiële huurders/kopers. Wij hebben verschillende mogelijkheden om uw object(en) op onze website te plaatsen. Hierbij is het belangrijk om een budgetklasse aan te geven zodat u leads kan ontvangen met het geschikte budget.

Meer informatie over onze werkwijze en mogelijkheden kunt u hier vinden:
https://www.kantoorruimtevinden.nl/voor-makelaar/

Name: Salinger DC&W
Description:
At Salinger DC&W, we specialise in delivering strategic industrial property solutions tailored to drive financial outcomes and reduce operational costs for corporate occupiers. As a boutique, relationship-focused partner, we build long-term, trusted partnerships by ensuring that senior leadership is involved at every stage of your project.

Our independence is central to our client commitment: we only advise tenants, meaning that our unbiased, conflict-free advice focuses solely on your success, ensuring every decision optimises your real estate investment and protects your bottom line. Our clients, including Penguin Random House, DSV, Bosch, and Toshiba, trust us to achieve substantial operational savings and real estate optimisation, often realising 10–30% cost reductions and lasting value.

Our key services include:
• Industrial tenant services and cost reduction: We uncover both on- and off-market opportunities, creating negotiating leverage to reduce operational expenses, with property strategies fully aligned with your business goals.
• Industrial lease portfolio management: Using best-in-class IT systems, we deliver accurate governance and comprehensive reporting across your portfolio, reducing risk and operational costs. This cost-effective approach is a resource that pays for itself.
• Industrial project services: Our data-driven solutions and detailed scopes of work unlock enterprise value through transformative supply chain strategies, positioning clients for long-term success.

With over 50 major warehouse projects completed and proven cost savings for our clients, Salinger DC&W has the expertise and agility to handle complex real estate projects efficiently. Our size allows us to move quickly, delivering agile, bespoke solutions that fit your specific needs. Our reputation for fair, transparent dealings and strong market relationships ensure we’re well-positioned to negotiate the best terms for you.

Name: Anton, Sowerby & Associates

Anton, Sowerby & Associates Commercial Real Estate Services is your Southeast Michigan partner in commercial real estate. Based in Macomb County for over 38 years, our deep roots in the community
