At Anton, Sowerby & Associates, we specialize exclusively in commercial properties, including retail, office, industrial, investment, and land development. Whether you're buying, selling, leasing, or investing, our goal is
to guide our clients through every stage of the process with confidence and clarity. Our services are tailored to meet the needs of local businesses, property owners, investors, and developers looking for more than just a transaction — they’re seeking a partner who truly understands the region.

What truly sets us apart is the strength and diversity of our team. Outside of being seasoned commercial real estate professionals, our team includes individuals with backgrounds that include finance, retail, construction, marketing, hospitality, as well as former business owners who bring firsthand insight into what today’s businesses need to succeed. This blend of expertise allows us to approach opportunities from multiple perspectives and deliver solutions that are both strategic, practical and ultimately, successful. 

While we fully embrace modern tools and technology, using advanced data platforms, digital marketing, real-time communication (RTC) tools and sometimes even a little AI to operate more efficiently and effectively, we never lose sight of the fact that commercial real estate is, at its core, a people business. Relationships, trust, and knowledge are the foundation of everything we do.

At Anton, Sowerby & Associates, we don’t just close deals — we build lasting partnerships.

Description:

Public toilets

The mall consists of four separate buildings surrounding the yard plaza, which contains a recreational area, it has cafes, restaurants, specific seating areas and wooden pergolas, the entire elements of the project are connected through vertical and horizontal axes, such as walking paths, elevators and escalators that fulfill the technical requirements for all the shopping mall of the highest standards.

A variety of unit areas, which in range between 40m² for the smaller units up to 1500m². Units overlooking the main streets.

A beautiful landscape external plaza, which serves as a green area, walkways, fountains & sitting areas in a stunning environment of lighting and music.

The mall is spread on 3.8 acres, and the rental space is 16000 meters squared, it contains and underground parking garage as well as a cargo garage connected to the warehouses with special ramp.

Name: RYMAYA PVC
Description:
RYMAYA se situe parmi les principaux fabricants de portes et de fenêtres en PVC en Algérie.

En tant que leaders du marché, nous considérons qu’il est de notre responsabilité de déterminer la qualité.

Ayant le siège social et de fabrication à Sétif, à l’est de l'Algérie, notre société produit et assure la commercialisation de menuiseries des produits PVC.

NOUS OFFRONS DES PRODUITS SELON LES NORMES EUROPÉENNES ET ALGÉRIENNE.

Très prochainement, nous aurons une capacité de production moderne d’une superficie totale de plus de 8000 mètres carrés et plus de 84 employés. Nous appliquons les normes les plus élevées de qualité et les dernières technologies, en conséquence les produits offerts par notre société sont en ligne avec les normes nationales exigées dans le domaine de la construction.

La qualité de la menuiserie RYMAYA est le résultat d’un système de production dans lequel chaque étape est soumise à la surveillance et la vérification pour répondre aux normes requises.

FOURNISSEURS RECONNUS AU NIVEAU EUROPÉEN.

Par conséquent, nous proposons une large gamme de produits et de services, travaillant avec des fournisseurs reconnus au niveau européen (ROTO, VHS, GU, SCHTEC) et algérien (CHIALI, GENERAL PROFIL) en investissant dans un personnel qualifié et compétent, en vue d’assurer la qualité des produits et des services offerts en faveur des partenaires internes et externes à la fois.

Nous promouvons la performance et la fiabilité, en fournissant des produits et services de la plus haute qualité.

Name: mCubed Offices
Description:
The founders and managers of mCubed Serviced Offices have taken their fair share of hard knocks. With decades of experience in starting and running small businesses, they know how stressful it can be, how much work goes into it, and how hard it can be when things fall apart. They've also learned exactly what is needed to take that pressure off.

The goal at mCubed is to provide your business with a fully supported, stress-free administrative service, allowing you to get on with the core work of your business, and letting us handle calls and mail for you. 

We provide an extensive range of services with our virtual and physical office spaces, so we have you covered whether you need an actual space to run your business out of or just a prestigious address for mail to be processed from.

If you are after reception services for your business, a professional boardroom to hire, or even just a desk space for an out-of-town executive to operate from for the day, we have you covered in every area, ensuring your work runs as smoothly as possible.

To suit our varied range of services, we are equally as varied with the types of clients we take on. We provide for cleaning companies, accountants, technicians and nanny agencies, to name a few. We don't limit ourselves to representing only a certain type of clientele, because our work is versatile enough to cover virtually all kinds of business.

Take a look at our website for a full description and price list for our services, or just call one of our friendly reception staff, always on hand to answer all your queries.

Name: Turcotte Real Estate Services, Inc.
Description:
Turcotte Real Estate Services, Inc. is a San Antonio-based independently owned commercial real estate firm that specializes in land and industrial transactions, with a focus on tenant representation and brokerage services. The company's founder, John Greg Turcotte, CCIM, has 36 years of experience in the commercial real estate industry, representing clients within the Alamo City and along the I-35 corridor in Texas, as well as throughout the United States. His associate, Rick Stagers, CCIM, has almost 21 years of experience in commercial real estate throughout Central and South Texas and actively participates in multiple industry-related organizations. Another colleague, William J. "Bill" Holder, is a 20-year veteran in the San Antonio commercial real estate market who specializes in land, industrial, office and retail brokerage. Doug Swanson brings an additional 30 years experience to the firm adding depth to our office and retail services. Doug joins the firm after serving as Regional Vice President Client Services, Central Texas for a nationwide provider of property and listing information for the commercial real estate industry. Doug has specialized in tenant and buyer representation in office, retail and industrial sectors.

The firm's professional expertise and its extensive network are among the many reasons that Turcotte Real Estate Services has quickly established itself as a premier resource for companies requiring tenant representation and brokerage services on land and industrial leases, acquisitions or sales.

Name: Seminario Zentrum
Description:
Seminario Zentrum es un espacio multidisciplinar de cerca de 50.000 m2 en el que se ubican 70 empresas. El complejo acoge también un Hotel Restaurante, un Club de Pádel, los Archivos de la Diócesis de Bilbao, un Centro de Interpretación, el denominado Bosque de la Concordia, una Capilla, un Salón de Actos, una Escuela Universitaria de Magisterio, un Centro de Educación Especial y otros espacios. Todo ello conforma un centro de negocios y de servicios único, con una oferta diferenciada.

Nuestra estratégica ubicación nos permite ofrecer una excelente comunicación con todo el territorio de Bizkaia y su tejido empresarial. Estamos en un entorno privilegiado, muy cerca de Bilbao y del Aeropuerto de Loiu, colindante con el Parque Tecnológico de Zamudio y próximo a los polígonos industriales de Ugaldeguren y Torrelarragoiti. Además, un amplio aparcamiento de 500 plazas a las puertas del edificio facilita el acceso a las zonas de oficinas, restauración y servicios.

De esta manera, desde Seminario Zentrum ofrecemos a las empresas y organizaciones la posibilidad de tener todos los servicios que necesitan al alcance de su mano. Un universo que conjuga modernidad con tradición, ocio con trabajo, formación con diversión y gastronomía con deporte, en el que se mueven diariamente cerca de 3.000 personas.

Name: NHPP Commercial and Investments and Capital Lending
Description:
ABOUT NHPP COMMERCIAL 
NHPP Commercial was founded to help investors get the highest returns on their investments and to change the brokerage industry. Our mission has always been to match every commercial property with as many qualified buyers as possible. Our team have a proven track record and has over 30 years experience in helping business clients. We provide state of the art marketing, technology, market research, analysis, forecasting, and large pool of national and international buyers. Buyer/Seller Services Clients rely on NHPP Commercial to find them properties and to provide financing and research. Sellers count on NHPP Commercial to provide effective marketing and access to our large pool of national and international buyers. Find out how 
NHPP Commercial can help you. 1031 Exchange A 1031 exchange gets its name from Section 1031 of the U.S. Internal Revenue Code, which allows you to avoid paying capital gains taxes when you sell an investment property and reinvest the proceeds from the sale within certain time limits in a property or properties of like kind and equal or greater value. With our access to on market and off market properties we are able to help investors reach their goals. Advisory Services NHPP Commercial provides a single point of contact to manage your company’s real estate requirements. We can work as either an extension of your company’s real estate department – assisting or consulting on strategies – or as a complete outsourced solution to fully manage a portfolio of properties. We work with developers to REITs, high net-worth individuals to pension fund advisors and beyond. Based on your business objectives we offer real estate solutions for acquisitions, dispositions, consolidations and relocations. 

For more information
Kevin Ng, Director, Sales and Investments 
Tel/Fax: 888.868.6985 knh@nhppcommercial.com

Name: KARA Group
Description:
The Kara Real Estate Group is a commercial and industrial real estate management and trading company, exclusively owned by Hungarians and operating as a family business for three generations. With over 35 years of experience in the Hungarian real estate market, we have become one of the few companies that have successfully adapted to the economic changes happening in our country and in Europe. During this time, we have successfully retained our core values and increased our market presence by continuously adapting to new market challenges.

Among the tenants in our family's commercial real estate portfolio, you can find names like Penny Market, Nespresso, and Generali Insurance. Our goal is to provide a new kind of proactive service, thus supporting our clients in achieving their business objectives.

The changes in the Hungarian real estate market over the past fifteen years have highlighted that traditional business policies no longer guarantee success for decades. Therefore, we have decided to establish the Kara Real Estate Group as a separate entity from our family's real estate portfolio, operating independently and exclusively in the real estate market.

Our leasing department handles the complete process of leasing and managing office, retail, and industrial properties, as well as representing tenants.

From our portfolio of nearly 500 A and A+ category office buildings and over 4 million office leasing opportunities, we provide immediate proposals and alternatives to our clients. 

We are committed to earning the trust of our clients as credible experts and serving as their long-term strategic partners in achieving their business goals. Our credibility is continuously reaffirmed by our partners and clients.

Description:
e-railz is a full-service developer specializing in the complete transfer of environmental liability. Our principle competency is redeveloping heavy industrial distressed sites.

e-railz is unique in our structure and approach to re-development. We are able self-perform all but the most specialized contracting work, which allows us to control timelines and work quality from start to finish. This structure also allows us to provide comfort to a selling entities board room as we offer industry leading safety ratings, an award-winning safety process, LEAN construction, and provide bonding capacity of more than 2 billion dollars aggregate.

e-railz contracting team provides Construction Management, Design Build, General Contracting, Program Management, Integrated Project Delivery, Engineer Procure Construct, Engineer Procure Construction Management, Self-Performed Concrete and Equipment, Self-Perform Demolition, Self-Perform Decommissioning, Equipment Installation Management, Pre-construction, Feasibility Studies, Engineering Management, Virtual Design and Construction, as well as Facility Management.

The e-railz approach:
●  Identify sector-specific transactions with facilities that fit our success model; 
●  Provide creative solutions for divestitures of retired assets; 
●  Utilize political relationships domestically and abroad; and, 
●  Develop sustainable sites attracting new jobs and investments to the communities where they are located.

e-railz offers insured fixed-price contracts that transfer environmental liability from the party financially responsible for the contamination whereby eliminating remediation obligations, environmental law violations, and potential litigation. Our risk management process offers both a complete transfer of the entire real estate asset or options for owners who want to retain control of their property and clearly position them in the marketplace.

Belajar dari keluhan para pembeli rumah disuatu perumahan yang katanya harganya murah, ternyata kualitas bangunan sering mengecewakan. Dari situlah Jawara Corporation hadir, menawarkan kepada masyarakat, khususnya masyarakat kota Malang, untuk merekomendasikan beberapa hunian/ perumahan murah dan megah yang kami develop dengan menyesuaikan standart perekonomian daerah. sehingga mampu memuaskan para user/ pembeli untuk mempunyai rumah idaman yang megah, aman dan nyaman namun murah. Perumahan kami yang kami coba kemas dalam misi bertajuk rumah murah ini, tersebar di berbagai lokasi, dan akan terus berkembang ke beberapa lokasi yang tentunya untuk memenuhi kebutuhan Anda/ masyarakat atas kemudahan akses Anda/ mereka dalam menempuh perjalanan dari tempat tinggal ke tempat bekerja, atau pergi belanja, berpariwisata, sekolah/ belajar dan lain lain.  Argumentasi di atas adalah merupakan dasar dari model bisnis kami sehingga terdapat beberapa point alasan 
Mengapa harus memilih beli rumah di Jawara Corporation?
Lokasi yang sangat Strategis. 
Rumah dibangun tidak perlu menunggu DP lunas. 
Proses KPR mudah dan cepat (tidak perlu menunggu rumah jadi). 
Harga termurah di kelasnya atau perum sekitarnya. 
ROI (Return of Investment) dijamin bakal berlipat ganda. 
Kualitas bangunan dan pondasi didevelop untuk struktur 2 lantai.

Name: Foley & Puls Multifamily Research
Description:
For more than three decades, Foley & Puls has been at the forefront of multi-family market research and analysis.  The research, together with our experience in residential development,  provides insight into market performance and project potential to real estate investors, developers, owners and lenders.  

Our methodology creates a forward- view of a project’s potential by integrating intense research into market fundamentals such as inventory structure, rent increases, renter incomes and unit absorption data with projections of demographic trends and income-driven demand per unit type.   

This extensive experience  is crucial to understanding the dynamics of product supply and demand—critical information which enables our clients to identify current  and future project potential, zero-in on appropriate target markets and create product mix and pricing strategies that will maximize potential yield.

Name: Espaço Office
Description:
Nasceu em agosto de 2013, em Maringá-PR e tem em seu DNA o propósito de facilitar e tornar mais dinâmico o fluxo de trabalho de empresas, profissionais autônomos, startups, freelancers, entre outras iniciativas que carregam consigo a inovação em seus serviços e produtos.

Atualmente, o Espaço Office atua em três frentes: o escritório virtual, o coworking e o auditório.  Todos os serviços foram pensados cuidadosamente para serem livres de burocracias e complicações, e, por esta razão, autointitula-se “escritório descomplicado”.

O escritório virtual é um serviço oferecido desde o início das atividades do Espaço Office. Essa modalidade de negócio oferece aos clientes cinco salas executivas para atendimento de clientes, sala de reunião, recepção com secretária e copa com café. Além da locação das salas, o Espaço Office disponibiliza atendimento telefônico personalizado com linha exclusiva, recepção de correspondências, utilização de endereço fiscal, atendimento de recados e envio por e-mail e SMS. Tudo isso em local privilegiado, no novo centro de Maringá.

Já o coworking, é o ambiente de trabalho compartilhado entre vários profissionais. No Brasil existem cerca de 200 coworkings, e em Maringá, o Espaço Office é o primeiro a oferecer esse serviço, desde dezembro de 2013. É só escolher uma mesa e levar o que precisa para trabalhar, o Espaço Office cuida de tudo. Ambiente climatizado, internet wi-fi de alta velocidade e o melhor, um monte de gente legal trabalhando no mesmo lugar. O coworker otimiza seus custos e ainda aumenta seu networking, pois como visto em outros lugares do mundo, esses lugares tornam-se berços de grandes negócios e ambientes adequados para difusão de conhecimentos. Um serviço que acompanha uma tendência mundial, o coworking reflete a inovação no posicionamento do Espaço Office.

Com grande crescimento e buscando ampliar o leque de serviços para seus clientes, em fevereiro deste ano, o Espaço Office passou a oferecer mais uma solução de sucesso: o auditório. Esse novo serviço foi criado para atender, de forma ideal, cursos, oficinas, conferências, treinamentos, entre outros eventos. O auditório conta com 100m2 e tem capacidade máxima de 80 pessoas. Vision: 
D&P Commercial Group strives to become a respected leader in both the healthcare and real estate sectors. Name: Arbitrage Business Solutions Corp
Description:
Welcome to ARBITRAGE!  The newest & fastest growing Business Brokerage in South Florida! Here at ARBITRAGE, we focus on our clients and the financial impacts these business transactions will create.  Our vision is very simple...take care of our clients to the fullest by offering unfiltered, genuine and substantial advice.  Sometimes our clients don't like what we say, but they LOVE that we told them the truth! We are NOT a firm motivated "BY THE DEAL" alone.  We are motivated by the SOLUTIONS we create for the CHALLENGES our clients have. We believe in building a solid, long standing business practice by providing sound advice and positive results. 

We offer 3 primary services: Alternative (Non-Bank) Business Financing, Mergers/Acquisitions and Business Sales & Immigration Services thru Business Investments with L1a, B-2 and EB-5 VISAS. Complimentary offerings focus on Business Valuations, SBA Financing, Business Exit Planning and Tax Deferred Strategies on Business Sales.

All brokers offer similar services such as Buy/Sell side representation, SBA Loans, Franchising, etc. however, the biggest difference between myself and others comes in 4 major places.

1. Tax-Engineered Strategies - Deferment of Capital Gains after the sale is paramount and how much you actually “keep” after the sale. Have others talked with you about Taxation or Capital Gains Protection?

2. Contract Terms - Many contracts from large firms have provisions, stipulations, rules & regulations that are harmful to Sellers. My contracts DO NOT contain those painful covenants. 

3. My Team – Access a Business Attorneys / CPA's / Certified Financial Planner to review details of the transaction to address both pre & post sale strategies.

4. Services - Arbitrage Acquisitions - Let economies of scale instantly add value to your business with the right acquisition.

We are a young, hungry and fast growing firm that is more than capable of delivering results.  Give us the chance!

Thank you!  Be Blessed!

Name: Farbasland
Description:
Farbasland berdiri dengan badan hukum bernama PT Farbas Umar Nusantara. Berdiri sejak tahun 2016, Farbasland di inisiasi oleh 4 anak muda yang mempunyai visi dan misi yang sama. Mereka sepakat untuk terjun ke dunia usaha dengan niat untuk bisa berkarya lebih banyak lagi kepada masyarakat Indonesia. Dengan value yang dikombinasikan dari mimpi masing-masing pendiri perusahaan ini, yakni Kebermanfaatan untuk Kebaikan, Produktif, Inovatif, Professional, dan terutama pondasi kuat kami berorientasi pada Ekonomi Syariah. 

Tahun ini Farbasland sedang menjalankan proyek di daerah Setu, Bekasi. Mengusung konsep perumahan ramah lingkungan dan green energy concept, karena selain didukung dengan fasilitas lingkungan seperti ruang terbuka hijau dan taman bermain anak yang ramah, konsep rumah yang modern minimalis serta penggunaan layout rumah yang mendukung agar pencahayaan yang dihasilkan maskimal dan airflow masuk udara yang dipertimbangkan dengan sangat matang sehingga didalam rumah menjadi sejuk dan nyaman.

Hal lain yang membedakan dengan developer sejenis adalah kami menawarkan konsep perumahan syariah, dalam hal ini skema pembayaran yang kami tawarkan menyesuaikan muamalah yang dibenarkan secara islam, berprinsip adil dan tidak memberatkan bagi konsumen. Melihat trend yang baik untuk perkembangan bisnis syariah di tanah air, visi besar kami juga menjadi bagian penting yang memberikan dampak positif bagi kemajuan ekonomi syariah di Indonesia, terutama di bidang properti.

Menjadi tanggungjawab kami untuk menciptakan bukan hanya kawasan perumahan secara fisik, namun menciptakan masyarakat yang baik dengan lingkungan yang berorientasi terhadap kebaikan, sehingga konsep berbagi dan kerukunan antar penduduk dapat senantiasa di implementasikan dengan baik dan berkelanjutan.

Name: SKA Foods
Description:
Sakht Kooshan Ajand (SKAFoods) was set up in 2001 with the full support of Mr. Naser JaberAnsari, one of the most trustworthy businessmen in Iran's traditional bazaar and Mr. Reza JaberAnsari was assigned the task of management. In the early years, all the activities were aimed at importing food products. At that time, the long-term goal was the introduction of Iran's unknown food products to the world, some products of high quality which was quite obscure in the worldwide competition. This goal was fulfilled in a few years and now is being pursued actively in a way that nowadays SKAFoods is a major exporter of tomato paste, nuts and pickle to England.

Now the third generation of Jaber Ansari family is in charge of SKAFoods. The two previous generations were working in jewelry and industry of chandelier and have 75 years of experience. Right now JaberAnsari family is working in different fields such as construction, steel, chandelier and food.

During these days, SKAFoods has focused its activities towards international markets. Nowadays, in all developed countries, the production process; including raising plants, packaging, delivering etc should be observed by some standards and hygienic regulation in order to guarantee the consumers' health. Also, there has been a revolution in taste and smell of food products all around the world. SKAFoods has been aware of all these changes and decided to satisfy Iranians' taste by unique specialties.

Now, the main purpose of SKAFoods is to introduce the greatest food brands to Iranians and open the doors to new tastes and smells.

Name: 110 Gulf Associates
Description:
From www.RugbyRealty.com

Most recently, Rugby has focused on a number of projects in and around Pittsburgh’s revitalized Cultural District. The Gulf Tower, a 594,000 square foot historic landmark office building, was purchased vacant from the Gulf Oil Company in 1987. After completely renovating the building, occupancy was brought to over 92%. Eight other historically significant buildings were then purchased in the Cultural District including the Ewart Building and the May Stern Buildings. In 2005, Rugby began the historical renovation of 930 Penn Avenue into a 42,000 square foot, high-end, luxury apartment building with underground parking. By combining the unique architectural characteristics of these historic buildings with state-of-the-art renovations, Rugby has been able to create a strong demand for their space.

Description:

Here in Shang we believe in a hybrid culture, where every member of our tribe thrives to reach his or her creative potential, and to live and work into setting the right values and principles for a conscious way of living. 
“You cannot expect creativity from people if you don’t give them creative space to thrive in”, principles are one thing but only action is the proof. So here in Shang we build a physical space that acts as a catalyst for action.

从核心办公空间有机延伸为生活社区的金尚，从布局到细节都遵从开放、灵活、巧妙的原则追求工作生活平衡设计。设计师、媒体人、作家、企业家、地产人云集这里密探明访。无论是论坛还是工作坊，新品发布、咖啡交流还是正式会议，甚至独立电影及大型讲座，金尚让空间脱离形式成为吸引独特人事的强大磁场和“精彩容器”。

Name: Silver Business Center Voorschoten
Description:
Silver is er voor een ieder die flexibel wil werken en vergaderen

Het aanbod bestaat concreet uit:
• werkplekken in één centrale ruimte, met gebruik van alle denkbare faciliteiten
• kantoorunits op de begane grond; vanaf 20 m2, al dan niet gekoppeld
• vergaderruimten op de 1e, 2e en 3e verdieping
• evenementenruimte (Grand Café) op de 3e verdieping van het gebouw

In Silver Business Center aan de Schoolstraat 174, midden in het centrum van Voorschoten, heerst al de nodige bedrijvigheid met een vaste gebruiker: vanhulzen•gummo•kicks. Dat maakt het voor nieuwe gebruikers mogelijk zo aan te haken. Focus op de business!

Silver hanteert een eenvoudige tariefstructuur met een vast bedrag voor huur van een werkplek of (vergader)ruimte en daarbij alle denkbare faciliteiten. Een printer, copier, WiFi-netwerk, vaste telefonie, meubilair, beamers, televisieschermen, flipovers, pennen, koffie, thee, frisdrank, koekjes bij de koffie en wat dan ook: het is allemaal zonder beperking klaar voor de vaste gebruikers.

De missie van Silver is eenvoudig: wij willen het mogelijk maken dat onze gebruikers hun ambities kunnen verzilveren door ze een zorgeloze werkomgeving te bieden, waarin het plezier van samen werken en presteren centraal staan.

Name: Circle Hub
Description:

Circle Hub offers short-term and long-term rental of private luxury office suites as well as a sleek and welcoming shared work space. Our business incubator program links our business clients to experienced professionals who can help pool resources, increase efficiency, and serve as onsite business consultants. Circle Hub has access to affordable and efficient import-export services, warehouse space with shipping/receiving services and a dedicated staff, and also makes a network of Circle Angels available to business clients in need of funding and investment partnerships. 
Yoga classes, parties, and other fun gatherings held in the Circle Hub space compound our role as more than just a coworking space, with the networks, infrastructure, and resources to facilitate creativity and business growth in the Los Angeles area.

Our mission has been to offer businesses affordable solutions to their space and storage requirements.

When we decided to build in Saraland it was a practical decision. It's a small town that offers lots of growth potential. It's a convenient location to virtually everywhere in Mobile County. Our buildings are located only 15 minutes away from the Alabama State Docks, Brookley Field and Interstate 10. We are also less than 30 minutes from the new ThssyenKrupp Steel mill in Calvert, AL. Over the years we have had the opportunity to watch and, in some instances, assist some major US companies realize the potential the Saraland area could bring to their organizations. Companies like GAF, UOP, Masland Carpets, and most recently O'Reilly Auto Parts.

Name: Coworking Lab
Description:
Coworking Lab è nato a Milano, in zona Città Studi, nel 2011.
Siamo stati fra i primissimi a capire che il mondo del lavoro stava cambiando modalità di fruizione degli spazi, ma anche e soprattutto nella modalità di interazione fra professionisti che, oltre a cercare un luogo funzionale in cui lavorare, avevano voglia e bisogno di una community in cui riconoscersi.

VISION
Vogliamo essere la community di riferimento a Milano per liberi professionisti, freelance e startupper che cercano un contesto dove lavorare, incontrarsi e far crescere il proprio business in un ambiente accogliente e creativo.

MISSION
Lavorare ad un proprio progetto ed essere circondati da altri professionisti, sentirsi a casa ed essere in ufficio, fare una pausa caffè e creare un’occasione di business: tutto questo è possibile in Coworking Lab!

I NOSTRI VALORI
Professionalità: amiamo il nostro lavoro, e ci piace circondarci di professionisti che mettono passione e impegno in tutto quello che fanno.

Innovazione: siamo in costante evoluzione, siamo curiosi e, come dimostra la nostra storia, ci piace creare prodotti e servizi che anticipino i bisogni di domani.

Stile: la nostra community è composta da persone brillanti, che ci piace accogliere in ambienti che ispirino la creatività e permettano di lavorare nel massimo comfort.

Condivisione: un caffè, un progetto, un momento di networking o di formazione. Condividere significa moltiplicare e mettere a disposizione di tutti.

Collaborazione: ci piace stare insieme e ci piace mettere a fattor comune i nostri talenti, le nostre idee e le nostre competenze (anche in tema culinario!) perché possano crescere e avere successo.

Name: Trimarchi Mgmt
Description:
We believe that real estate investments offer attractive risk-adjusted returns in part because of inherent market inefficiencies. These inefficiencies are the result of an industry that remains localized, fragmented and largely populated by small owner-operators 
We believe that real estate is not a commodity. Each asset is unique and requires a highly experienced and specialized staff to properly underwrite, structure and manage it based on its individual characteristics and those of its stakeholders. 
We believe that people make the difference. Our culture is that of a diverse, motivated and exceptionally qualified team of individuals possessing skill sets directly applicable to investor mandates.  
We believe that cash flow is the measurement of all successful investments and that the investment process does not end with the acquisition or development of a property. Rather, it signals the beginning of added value creation using leading-edge property management and yield optimization techniques.  
We are committed to the belief that the interests of investor and advisor must be aligned.

Description:

•providing strong project and integration management, integrated modules and applications, and relevant capability support to compliment our specialist real estate focus; or
•providing specialist real estate implementation, training and support to compliment your broad based skills.

Our mission is to provide innovative real estate management solutions that align commercial and residential real estate and facilities management initiatives with the overall corporate strategy to:
•achieve sustainable cost reduction,
•optimise real estate assets,

Name: شرکت تبلیغاتی اراد
Description:
ما در سال 1374 در راستای چشمانداز فرهنگی و تبلیغاتی، با ثبت کلینیک تبلیغاتی آراد شروع به فعالیت کردیم. از اولین اقدامات مجموعه در جهت رفع نیاز مشتریان، میتوان به احداث چاپخانه افست اشاره کرد.

همچنین با تمرکز بر اهداف سازمانی و به جهت ایجاد بستر مناسب در راستای معرفی هرچه بهتر مشتریانمان در بازار، به برگزاری نمایشگاه های مختلفی از جمله: جشنواره کودک و نوجوان، شیرینی و شکلات و نمایشگاه جوانان در محل دائمی نمایشگاه های بینالمللی مشهد مقدس اقدام کردیم.

در سال 1377 با نیت گسترش هر چه بیشتر فعالیتهای فرهنگی-تبلیغاتی، نمایندگی پخش پیامهای بازرگانی در شبکه های استانی را کسب کردیم. در سال 1378 با توجه به تحقیقات و تجربهی تبلیغاتی در این سالها، به اهمیت بالای رسانه تبلیغات محیطی (بیلبورد) پی برده و به جهت اخذ امتیاز تبلیغات محیطی در چند استان اقدام کردیم.

فعالیت کلینیک آراد در زمینه تبلیغات محیطی تا به امروز ادامه داشته و در حال حاضر با عنوان تخصصیترین کلینیک تبلیغاتی، گسترده ترین صاحب رسانه و جامع ترین بانک اطلاعات تبلیغات محیطی در سراسر کشور شناخته شده هستیم.

Name: Andalucia immobilier
Description:
Aperçu sur Andalucia Immobilier

Située à Tanger, Andalucia immobilier est une jeune société crée par M. Anass Benyahya diplômé en administration des affaires de l'Université de Saint Boniface au Manitoba - Canada et titulaire  d’un master en communication et marketing  à l'EHCT.

Andalucia Immobilier intervient dans le domaine de l’immobilier sous toutes ses formes en assurant une panoplie de prestations, achat , vente, location et gestion des biens immobiliers .

Composé d’une équipe dynamique capable de donner le meilleur d’elle même pour satisfaire les besoins de ses clients dans la matière.

La société intervient dans les domaines de l'immobilier, vente, achat et location ainsi que la gestion syndicale, La mission de la société Andalucia immobilier consiste à maintenir un niveau élevé d’intégrité professionnelle.

Andalucia Immobilier dispose d’une connaissance complète du marché et peut vous proposer les meilleures offres tant en termes de qualité que de prix. Tout en travaillant en collaboration avec d’autres partenaires choisis avec soins et selon des normes bien définies tout en respectant les attentes de nos clients.  

Clarté , convivialité et efficacité
Tels sont les maitres mots de notre organisation :

La clarté est la règle au sein de notre agence Immobilière Andalucia Immobilier. Vous avez la garantie de traiter avec un professionnel capable de vous fournir des conseils pratiques et de vous renseigner.

La convivialité au rendez-vous…
Andalucia Immobilier aime entretenir avec ses clients des relations confiantes et cordiales. C’est plus agréable et efficace quand les rapports sont chaleureux et conviviaux.



En quoi consiste le travail de la société Andalucia immobilier ?

Andalucia immobilier est un intermédiaire qui intervient dans les opérations d’achat, de vente, d’échange, de sous-location ou de location d’immeubles quel que soit l’usage auquel ils sont affectés. Elle est également compétente pour administrer, gérer, conserver un patrimoine immobilier. Elle peut également remplir le rôle de syndic de copropriété. 
 L’Objectif de  la société  est d’enrichir l’Exigence immobilière, c’est-à-dire, de maintenir la relation de haute confiance établie avec notre clientèle et d’en faire bénéficier les nouveaux clients. Cette exigence nous oblige à effectuer toutes opérations de vente, achat ou location dans les meilleurs conditions et avec toutes les garanties nécessaires : qualité du produit, connaissance du marché, transparence immobilière...

Pourquoi choisir Andalucia Immobilier pour  la gestion du syndic  ? 
	
	•	Nous sommes une équipe proactive pouvant réagir nuit et jour pour assurer la meilleure maintenance de vos immeubles et entreprises. Nous vous garantissons toute notre attention et notre réactivité. 
	•	Une des raisons de notre  développement est l’attention spéciale que nous portons à l’entretien et à la sécurité  des immeubles que nous avons en gestion, 
	•	à côté des fonctions basiques de syndic, comme le recouvrement des charges, et tous les aspects juridiques, nous vous offrons une  gamme complète de services tels que la sécurité, la maintenance et l’entretien des jardins, 
	•	Garantir que tous les propriétaires payent leurs charges de copropriété dans les délais est une tâche essentielle d’un syndic. Notre service de recouvrement proactif surveille l’état de paiement des charges afin de  toujours rester  créditeur dans chaque résidence.
	•	Nous vous garantissons une gestion professionnelle en collaboration avec nos partenaires qui vous offrent des avantages et des réductions intéressants.
	•	Nous restons votre interlocuteur unique qui fera preuve de réactivité, et d’efficacité pour mener à bien notre prestation.

Name: Innovation Institute by Investa Property Group

Description:
Florida Business Acquisitions is a licensed Florida business broker firm with offices in Tampa, Orlando, and Tallahassee covering North and Central Florida.

Our focus and experience is in selling small to middle-market businesses. Unlike most business brokers, our staff includes CPAs and very experienced sales & marketing experts. The process of selling a business is very complex, and takes a complex skill-set and expertise to do it successfully, whereby the transaction is a win-win for the seller and buyer. Our qualified staff is experienced and adept at sales & marketing, auditing, and understanding a company’s financial position and the vulnerable areas that must be addressed to assure proper transfer of the business goodwill.

Our core philosophy is that we will not sell a company that we would not buy ourselves under the terms that we offer to perspective Buyers.  We approach each seller from the perspective of a adept buyer and negotiate a fair price and terms up front. Our reputation is too important to over-sell a company or sell a company that will self-destruct when the seller departs. For this reason, we emphasize a thorough analysis and appraisal of the company. Our function is a third party, independent transaction broker. We have built a reputation in the lending community of being very thorough and properly pricing the companies we sell, making the transaction possible.

Our valuations will reflect the client’s needs through the above-average diligence taken in our work.  Today we are on the Board of Valuers for some of South Africa's top banks, including Nedbank, ABSA, Investec and SA Home Loans. 

We continue to attract, employ and develop our employees to provide only the highest quality within the industry.
		
HISTORY

We opened our doors to business in May 1997 and have, over the past 21 years, built up an excellent reputation amongst our corporate and private clients for producing work and service of the highest quality. We quickly set new standards in the valuation of residential properties and were one of the earliest users in the industry of digital photography, which we have always incorporated extensively in our reports as the most effective means of illustrating and recording property details. 

We have built up a substantial database of property facts to equip ourselves for residential, commercial and industrial valuations, and subscribe to the various recognised publications and databases as well as some lesser-known sources.

PROPERTY FIELDS

-  Residential
-  Commercial and industrial
-  Vacant land
-  Insurance and replacement cost
-  Specialised properties (service stations, hotels, cold storage, schools, shopping malls, etc.) 
-  Land restitution

-  Development feasibility studies 
-  Appraisals for estate purposes
-  Valuations for rates purposes
-  Shareblock

Should you like a quote for a valuation, please email our office at vals@douglasproperty.co.za or call 065 511 3377.

Founded in 1983, Charterhouse Development is considered a leader in real estate acquisition and development, with more than 65 years of collective experience. Charterhouse Development is also at the forefront of commercial real estate data analytics and technology, giving an added edge to our already extensive knowledge of the market.

Over the past decade, Charterhouse Development has focused on growing our impressive portfolio by acquiring and redeveloping neighborhood shopping centers primarily in the Northeast, as well as developing free-standing retail properties. Name: Zoning Inc.
Description:
Zoning, Inc. - Nationwide Provider of Zoning Information Reports, Specializing in Quick-Turn Zoning and CMBS Loan Program Zoning
Need a zoning report in a hurry?  We're featuring our Zone V report this quarter.  The Zone V is an  executive summary-style report noting current zoning, right to rebuild provision, conforming status, zoning or building code violations, survey comparison and notice of nonconformities relating to height, setback, lot area, lot width, floor area ratio and parking.  You get nearly all of the information provided in the Zone IV standard zoning report, but without municipality documents and their associated fees; this report can usually be completed in a week or less at a cost of around $300.  Call, email or go online to request a sample report and a quick, no-obligation quote.  With five standard zoning reports and a host of customization options, we can give you what you need for your zoning due diligence project.  

We’ve noticed that the CMBS loan programs are starting back up again, and these deals require zoning.  The great news is that we got our start back in the 90’s by developing reports specifically for these loan programs.  Zone II and IV reports were actually created to meet 3.0 and 3.1 zoning endorsement requirements.  We would be happy to set up a master agreement for services that allows you to electronically order reports with pre-determined pricing and components, making the process smooth and efficient.  You’ll have a project manager assigned who will be familiar with your specific project needs and who will be able to provide status-on-request at any time.  
Zoning, Inc. is here to help with whatever your zoning needs may be.  Contact us for more information, sample reports or to receive a fast quote.   Our customer care is second to none.  We want to help relieve some of your due diligence stress and always go above and beyond to work with you and meet your individual project needs.

Name: Capital Asset Partners of Florida
Description:
WHO WE ARE /ABOUT US
Capital Assets partners of Florida is a real estate company located in Fort Lauderdale Florida currently managing/leasing over $1M SF of industrial space in Hialeah, Hialeah Gardens, and Medley. We are a team of professionals with offer 75 years of cumulative real estate experience in extensive acquisition, development, leasing and management expertise. Our vast experience in the sector has accumulated over the years due to our relationship and partnership with real estate owners, brokers, and in-market partners.

WHAT WE DO
Our key interest in any target market is the acquisition and strategically repositioning of “off- market” valued-add properties with a lot of potential and rehabilitation opportunities, providing capital investors with distributions during the “holding” period and maximum profits on resale. 

We endeavor to source acquisitions that satisfy the following criteria:
-	Acquire under-performing “off-market” value-add properties in Hialeah, Hialeah Gardens and Medley that provide an opportunity to rehab and increase rental rates and occupancy.

-	Purchase properties in supply constrained industrial areas with strong economic factors and positive real estate trends.

-	Acquire properties suitable for “alternative” use, i.e. retail, multi-family and or conversion to “small-bay” warehouse.

-	Ability to purchase small warehouse properties and convert to “industrial condominiums” for re-sale on an individual basis.

OUR ACHIEVEMNETS
Our principals have acted as ground-up “developers” for numerous national credit tenants providing a platform for the conversion of industrial space to retail use. Some of our clients include: McDonald’s, Taco Bell, Family Dollar, Burger King, Wendy’s, Boston Market, Payless Shoes, Rite Aid, Pep Boys, Eckerd’s, Walgreens, CVS, Mobil Oil, Amoco, and AutoZone.

Name: Wheeler Appraisals, LLC
Description:
We are full service real estate appraisers providing commercial, industrial, residential development, farm, and acreage appraisals throughout central Florida for the past 30+ years.   The firm was established as Wheeler and Klusza Real Estate Appraisers in 1971, and was succeeded by Wheeler Appraisals real estate appraisers (and Klusza and Associates), in 1986.

We operate as Wheeler Appraisals, LLC commercial, industrial, and land real estate appraisers, and Bill Wheeler Appraisals, LLC for single family residential real estate appraisals. (The firms have common origins but are separate entities).  Principals have direct involvement in all real estate appraiser assignments; there is no use of sub-contractors or trainees. Offices are at 1720 South Florida Avenue in the Holllingsworth district of Lakeland, zip code 33803.

We subscribe to multiple data sources including Argus, REIS, Earthplat (statewide coverage), CoStar (regional coverage), multiple MLS services (including most of Florida and three counties in western North Carolina), Loopnet (national coverage),  Central Florida Commercial Real Estate, PWC Korpacz, Marshall Valuation Service (cost data) and DCD (cost data).

Commercial real estate appraisal assignments are concentrated in Polk County (including Lakeland, Winter Haven, Lake Wales, Haines City, Bartow), central and east Hillsborough County (Plant City, Brandon, edges of Tampa), east Pasco County (Dade City, Zephyrhills, Wesley Chapel), Hardee County (Wauchula), Highlands County (Sebring, Avon Park, Lake Placid), Lake County (Tavares, Eustis, Leesburg, Clermont), and Osceola County (Kissimmee and St. Cloud).

The company goal is to provide in a timely manner a well-documented value analysis presented in a clear and concise report.

Name: Lyon Business Brokers, Inc.

The decision to purchase a business is a decision to invest in oneself. Pride of ownership, freedom, flexibility, and job security come with owning your own business. You, as a business owner, will be on your own, controlling your own destiny. You will be able to realize your entrepreneurial dream. Job security and the feeling of independence will be yours as you move your business into the future.  We look forward to working with you to help you achieve your dreams of business ownership.

The decision to sell your business is a difficult one to make. It brings up more questions: Is now the right time to sell?  What should I ask for my business? How long does it take to sell?  How do I keep everyone from knowing that my business is for sale?  Lyon Business Brokers can assist you, the business owner, with these decisions and more. First and foremost we maintain confidentiality so that employees, customers, and suppliers do not
know that the business is for sale. Pertinent information will be gathered including financial information on the business.  We will re-forecast the financials to reflect the true nature of the business’s profitability. We identify and describe the historical in order to better identify and sell the future.

Name: MoneyBee Tax
Description:
MoneyBee Tax is a dedicated capital allowances consultancy helping individuals and businesses achieve lower tax liabilities and retain more earnings.

We specialise in preparing capital allowance claims for people and businesses spending money on property. So whether you’ve bought, refurbished, extended or built commercial property and pay UK income or corporation tax, we could help you save thousands of pounds.
 
Many types of commercial property in the UK are eligible for significant tax savings through capital allowances - dental, veterinary and private medical practices, shops, factories, offices and warehouses, to name just a few. If you own furnished holiday rental accommodation in Europe or certain types of residential property, including Houses of Multiple Occupancy, you may also qualify for big tax savings.

The value of capital allowances will vary property by property, but we rarely come across a case where we could not save our client money. Importantly, even if you bought the property years ago, a claim for capital allowances can still be made. 
  
Our professional and diligent team are focused on providing a quality service, working direct with clients or through accountants, surveyors, solicitors and other professional advisors.

These tax savings are rightfully yours so why not check out what you could be owed by using our free capital allowances calculator at www.moneybeetax.co.uk.

Name: Upmo
Description:
We're a small prop-tech startup made up of software designers, developers and commercial property experts who believe that there’s a cheaper, easier and fairer way for companies to go about finding and managing office space.

We’ve already done a lot to make finding office space easier but this is just the start and we’re currently working hard to provide you with the tools and information you need to make the best possible office move without having to engage an agent.

Why without an agent? Mostly because by removing the agent from the transaction we can operate a far cheaper model and pass these savings on to you, but also because it allows you to talk directly to the people who know best - the providers, and finally because it means we can focus on building tools that make your experience better.

Ultimately we believe in a world where workspace is available on tap, where you can switch on and off your space solutions, scale them up or scale them down seamlessly and book it by the hour, the month or the year. While we know that there is a long way to go before we get there, this beta website represents our first few steps towards achieving that vision and as we grow we hope to take lots of little steps towards achieving that reality.

Being in beta though, means we’re still learning, so if you have any feedback, want to speak to us about anything workspace related or want to hear more about where we’re going, please get in touch.

Name: Washington BBI
Description:
Washington BBI is a full-service business brokerage firm that caters to mid-sized companies located in the greater Puget Sound area.  We are a real estate affiliate of Ludwick Properties LLC of Bellevue, Washington.  We provide the following services: 

-	Seller Agency
-	Buyer Agency
-	Business Consulting and Exit Planning 

Our Seller Agency program targets the CEOs of other mid-sized or larger firms, people who may see something of strategic value in our clients’ firms.  Our goal is to get as many firms as possible to actively engage and to bid up the price.  In addition to direct targeting, we also promote our Seller Agency clients nationally and internationally through our network of associations and affiliations. 

Buyer Agency is a rapidly growing segment of our revenue mix, and we are conducting more and more private searches for both individuals and corporations.  Private searches are conducted to find those “gems in the rough,” great companies that are considering selling but have not yet been listed.  In contrast to Seller Agency, the goal of a private search is to put our client’s into the sole bidding position, thus saving them time, effort, 
aggravation and money. 

Our skills, experience and processes are best suited to buyers and sellers of mid-sized businesses and we provide extraordinary service to both buyers and sellers. 

Washington BBI offers important advantages compared to other brokers, including vertical market expertise in manufacturing, distribution and service industries.  Our sales processes are designed specifically to maximize value for sellers or to minimize the purchase price for buyers, depending on who we are representing. 

Whether buying or selling, Washington BBI does a superb job of guiding clients past the complexities, around the obstacles, and through to a successful conclusion.  We have the experience, the know-how, the processes and the industry connections to do a great job!

The importance of high standards and technical efficiency is obvious, but even more important is our sense of professionalism, which is derived from prolonged training and a belief in corporate and personal responsibility. We have experience as both advisors and investors, providing clients with a deep understanding of both opportunity and risk. We promote a collaborative culture and are comprised of a thoughtful and responsible group of professionals, with the expertise and courage to provide clear and unbiased solutions. We focus on assignment quality rather than quantity and are selective in the number of engagements we take, which allows us to concentrate on each project. The county is only minutes from Wilmington and Myrtle Beach, and there is countywide water, good sewer infrastructure, rail service, access to the state port in Wilmington, natural gas, and a top-notch community college. If you are seeking a good place to do business, Columbus Jobs Foundation is here to help.

Name: Rapid Property Solutions, LLC
Description:
We are looking to acquire Multi-Family Properties, Student Housing and Retail space with good value plays.
Specializing in the $2-10MM range.

Through our relationships with an M&A firm and a few Hedge funds and corespondent lenders, We also help commercial property owners and small business owners get new financing, recapitalize their current debt structure or perform a workout on their commercial loans.

I have a large experienced team behind me in this endeavor, backed by a hedge fund that can actually close deals with capital that is ready to deploy.

We will find the right funding for the commercial project and do not take an upfront fee for providing this service.

We also buy distressed real estate (commercial and residential), redevelop the properties or get new management in place to stabilize the property.

Once stabilized or rehabbed, we then offer the property back to the marketplace either for rent, for sale, land contract or lease option depending on the type of property.

Additionally, we source Bulk REO for two real estate hedge funds.

Name: LEMA Leasing & Marketing Inmobiliario
Description:
LEMA es una empresa creada para resolver diferentes necesidades del mercado inmobiliario.

Estamos enfocados en emprendedores, pequeñas, medianas y grandes empresas, que necesiten apoyo para la toma de decisiones de un inmueble, una plaza comercial o terreno. Vamos desde estudios de mercado hasta la comercialización del punto. 

¿Qué brindamos? 
HERRAMIENTAS PARA LA TOMA DE DECISIONES
Toda la información que te brindemos, será una herramienta que apoye a definir el plan de acción de tu negocio, minimice riesgos y puedas incrementar la rentabilidad del proyecto.

SERVICIOS: 
Abarcamos una amplia gama de servicios, desde el estudio de mercado hasta la comercialización, pasando por la asesoría legal. 
•	Estudios de Mercado: El encontrar el sitio adecuado puede ser crucial, mediante nuestras diversas herramientas podemos brindar certeza del sitio y te apoyamos a alcanzar el mejor potencial.
•	Asesoría Legal: Somos un aliado para comprar, rentar o promover un sitio de forma ágil, segura y sin problemas. Nuestro equipo de expertos lo apoya en todo el proceso. 
•	Comercialización: Respáldese con la información y el conocimiento para la mejor toma de decisiones a la hora de rentar, comprar o promover un punto. 
•	Marketing Inmobiliario: Porque la comunicación y mercadotecnia con el cliente inmobiliario es diferente, conocemos y utilizamos las distintas estrategias y métodos específicos para llegar a él.

Name: Zing Advisors
Description:
Zing Advisors offers fractional CFO services to the commercial real estate, healthcare, construction and solar industry.  We have direct experience raising $1.3 billion of debt & equity from 2011 to 2021.  All services are provided by Casey Gilley.

FUNDRAISING / ACQUISITION / DEVELOPMENT
-Excel modeling for structured finance & GP/LP real estate transactions
-Prepare investment summaries including market data, pro forma, budget, deal structure, sales comps/lease comps/land comps
-Source debt & equity and institutional JV capital
-tenant credit underwriting & lease-up 
-Draft private placement memorandums Reg 506(b)
-Partnership and LLC agreements.  Work closely with legal.
-Crowdfunding experience

ACCOUNTING
-Monthly financial reporting packages in accordance with GAAP / 13-week cash flow
-Tax planning & compliance:  income tax, property tax, 1033x, eminent domain
-Coordinating external auditors and tax teams
-Administration of loan draws
-Investor reporting & communication
-Insurance administration: D&O, E&O, Property
-Set up new properties in accounting system & transition project to asset & property management

Zing Advisors acted as full-time Chief Financial Officer to a ground-up industrial real estate developer from 2017 to 2020.

Zing Advisors was a consultant to a development project for a $320 million public-private project financing with Emory University and Citi that was oversubscribed by 3x.    Zing Advisors also served as Interim Director of Finance for Maryland Proton Treatment Center.

Giới Thiệu về Bất động sản Nét
Hơn cả niềm tin

Trong những năm gần đây thị trường Bất Động Sản Việt Nam có những bước đột phá đáng kể, thu hút phần lớn các nhà đầu tư trong nước cũng như nước ngoài. Góp phần quan trọng vào việc thay đổi bộ mặt Kinh tế – Xã hội của nước nhà và cũng là một trong những thị trường được chính phủ quan tâm đẩy mạnh nhất.
Bằng tâm huyết và hoài bão với nghề, bằng niềm tin vào thị trường bất động sản sẽ chuyển mình vượt bậc trong tương lai, Bất động sản Nét được thành lập với phương châm “Hơn cả niềm tin” để từng bước khẳng định được vị thế của mình trên thị trường Bất động sản Việt Nam.
Luôn đặt lợi ích của quý khách hàng và đối tác lên hàng đầu ,Bất động sản Nét tự tin cung cấp cho quý khách hàng những sản phẩm – dịch vụ chất lượng, uy tín nhất.
Bất động sản Nét luôn mong muốn xây dựng mối quan hệ lâu dài và bền vững với quý khách hàng, quý đối tác qua các dịch vụ:

 

Tư vấn BĐS.
Môi giới – phân phối BĐS.
Dịch vụ pháp lý BĐS.
Dịch vụ quảng cáo BĐS.
Dịch vụ BĐS cho thuê…
Bất động sản Nét xin chân thành cảm ơn sự quan tâm của quý khách hàng, quý đối tác đến những sản phẩm, dịch vụ của chúng tôi và chúng tôi sẽ trở thành đối tác uy tín, tin cậy của quý khách hàng & quý đối tác như slogan “Hơn cả niềm tin” mà Bất động sản Nét đã và đang thực hiện.

ĐẦU TƯ THÔNG MINH – AN CƯ TRỌN VẸN

Chúng tôi mang đến bạn cơ hội sở hữu bất động sản trên toàn quốc với chất lượng cao cấp và mức giá tốt. Sản phẩm đa dạng – dịch vụ đồng bộ – đối tác uy tín là lời cam kết Bất động sản Nét dành cho quý khách hàng.

DỰ ÁN ĐÃ PHÂN PHỐI

Bất động sản Nét phân phối chính thức nhiều sản phẩm của chủ đầu tư uy tín như: Nam Long, Vingroup, Him Lam,…  tạo nên nhiều kỉ lục giao dịch trên thị trường bất động sản thời gian qua.

Our idea is simple yet powerful. The Indoor Weather Report’s Lighting and Weather sensors offers up-to-the minute comprehensive data that can chart how much, and where, energy is being used. Reports will even calculate how much money is being spent per day helping users optimize their utility expenses. 

Our latest sensor, for Freezing, Water, and Humidity alerts monitors leaks, freezing pipes, and the temperature/humidity ranges which can be critical for atmospheric sensitive rooms (large freezers, computer rooms, libraries, museums, etc).

- Beratung von Smart Solutions
- Beratungsleistungen von Kunst am Bau
- Vermittlung von Bauleistungen
- Immobilienvermittlung ( gem. § 34c GeWO)

Derzeit fokussiert sich Kardolsky Consulting auf den Bereich Parkhausimmobilien, wobei das Hauptaugenmerk hier der Nachhaltigkeit gilt.
 
Warum Parkhäuser?
 
Parkhäuser sind für die Attraktivität, Qualität und Funktionalität der innerstädtischen Infrastruktur unverzichtbar.

Grondzaken Nederland is opgericht in 2019 en houdt zich bezig met de aan- en verkoop van percelen cultuurgrond (landbouwgrond) in groeigebieden met de potentie om op (langere) termijn in aanmerking te komen om een andere bestemming te verkrijgen zoals bijvoorbeeld ten behoeve van woningbouw.
  
Wij verkopen een perceel zonder pacht of enig ander gebruiksrecht en de koper is zelf verantwoordelijk voor het beheer. Dit houdt in dat er jaarlijkse kosten zijn zoals waterschapslasten en dat het perceel – onder voorbehoud van eventuele kettingbedingen –vrij verhandelbaar is.

Wij bieden daarmee investeringen die een alternatief bieden voor sparen en beleggen. Wij werken met diverse marktpartijen en hebben een breed netwerk met experts die direct of indirect te maken hebben met de handel in grond, het detecteren van interessante grondposities en het onderzoeken van onder andere bestemmingsplannen, visiedocumenten, verordeningen op het gebied van ruimtelijke ordening. Wij delen deze informatie, die vrij publiekelijk is, met de koper.

Wij bieden een waardevast, vrij verhandelbaar en interessant investeringsproduct dat via tussenkomst van een notaris geschikt is voor eenieder die een goede investering voor de toekomst zoekt. Percelen worden op maat aangeboden als fysiek bezit en zijn daarmee geschikt voor vrijwel iedere beurs.

Name: Campus Innovations Group LLC
Description:
Campus Innovations Group LLC (CIG) was started under the premise that a team comprised of professionals who have significant experience working within higher education and the public and private sector could best create alternative operational and financing methodologies relevant to higher education.  CIG’s mission is to provide schools with a strategic thought partner and capital provider that works in a team environment with colleges and universities to identify and assess a wide range of options and opportunities. We bring a fresh perspective to the several challenges currently impacting the industry. 

We draw upon our team members’ many years of experience in other fields who have analyzed, addressed and solved issues similar to what higher education is facing today. We don’t come with a single product to sell.  We can examine traditional bond financing options and compare them to a variety of strategic opportunities for providing capital, new revenue streams and cost savings.  Our firm experience consists of the individual experiences of our members and advisers.

As educational institutions endeavor to remain relevant and highly competitive, many face challenges as they strive to update infrastructure and facilities, attract and retain top talent, and maintain reasonable tuition rates. To address these and other challenges, CIG assists schools to effectively unlock the embedded value tied up in non-core campus assets through operational efficiencies and deployment of capital combined with the assessment of facility management and development needs. Capital is provided by monetizing non-core facility infrastructure and real estate assets such as student housing, conference centers, hospitality, and innovation centers, as well as repurposing existing facilities, and looking at new campus edge development opportunities. Through innovative transaction structures, CIG provides both near-term liquidity and long-term sustainable sources of income to schools.

Name: Pleasant Street Advisors, LLC

Pleasant Street Advisors is a full service commercial real estate advisory and investment company.  We offer services including franchise consultation, business real estate strategy, valuation, third party underwriting and are currently raising equity for net leased deals in and around the Greater Boston area.  

For businesses, Pleasant Street Advisors can help your business grow by sourcing real estate, negotiating leases and / or purchase agreements and managing landlord relations. Think of us as your in-house commercial real estate department, for a fraction of the cost of actually having one!

For investors, Pleasant Street Advisors offers a straightforward, easily understandable, easily explainable investment model, which seasoned real estate investors or new participants in the commercial real estate arena can take advantage of.  We are currently raising equity to buy net-leased properties in Greater Boston, and offer an annual preferred return and equitable profit sharing on the exit of the properties we purchase.  Each individual asset we underwrite has a story and a strategic plan to achieve the investment goals.  

Whether you are a business that needs help with its commercial real estate strategy or an investor that would like to learn more about our platform, contact Pleasant Street Advisors today to set up an initial meeting.  Find out how we can offer you unparalleled service for any of your commercial real estate needs.

Our Customers tell us they expect 8 key results when they start a new workplace project:

2. They expect their facility to meet their operational needs for 5 to 10 years.
3. They expect their workplace to project an image consistent with their company's culture and brand.
4.   They expect their project to finish quickly, their money spent effectively within the budget, and to achieve a high level of quality.
5.    They expect the transition to the new building to be seamless.
6.    They expect to work with people they trust and their employees to be treated with respect.
7.    They expect their key managers to focus on their core business and not have their attention diverted by the construction and relocation process.
8.    They expect to be more profitable as a result of the project.

 And they want these results delivered in alignment with their Company’s values, mission and goals!
 
At C. A. Howell and Company, we deliver the results you want – the way you want them delivered!

Name: The Paper Clinic
Description:
Starting a new professional business is difficult!

This is no surprise to anybody! In our tech-driven world, starting up is no longer simply hanging a shingle.

Even if it were, office space rents are at all time highs and ROI's on these offices may not be as much for small teams. Start-up expenses can, and many times do, include web-sites, computers & associated software, phone & internet utilities, memberships to professional organizations or services, and much more.

Don't make it harder than it needs to be!

Affording start-up capital is a true challenge and many times the public misses out when stellar professionals go out of business because of these expenses.

Paper Clinic aims to create an environment and means for professionals (CPAs/accountants, attorneys, business consultants, insurance agents, etc) to start their business affordably while making business connections and having access to much needed resources and mentorship.

Description:
Lets receive your idea of the home you desire

People don't buy 12 feet by 14 feet constructed boxes. They don't even desire to be in vertical villages filled with random families. They want to belong to residential clubs with sporting amenities. They don't even seek a price that they can afford.
Home seekers look for places that reflect their personalities. They hope for bright homes that spiritually lift their lives. They want a place where they can unwind, recharge and renew themselves for a challenging tomorrow, every evening. They aspire to belong to communities where their children learn the right values and manners of social engagement. The try to earn the living they wished for themselves.
Everyday we remind ourselves with this truth. No one wants to buy a floor plan or a layout. They look for spaces that enable their aspiration to turn into reality. So we build the physical realities around the purpose that we find people seek. And measure ourselves by the satisfaction that our owners find in their new life and not just their home. Only when we do that, we credit ourselves with having received the ideas of our customers and hence worthy of our purpose.
Welcome to Foyer. 
Because your home begins well before you reach it!

Harel Capital, LLC. is a boutique discretionary capital provider who provides short-term bridge or equity financing for commercial real estate transactions that require higher leverage, complex structuring, creativity, or have a business plan that is not appropriate for traditional capital sources.

Typically our clients those are looking for debt and/or equity for acquiring commercial real estate assets or are sponsors who are seeking to repurchase their loans and/or recapitalize and restructure their existing assets from ranging from $1-$30 million.

Our company also provides liquidity for banks, hard money lenders and other lenders with legacy assets on their balance sheet. This includes "bad bank" joint venture option.

Our capital investment team has the proven ability to identify, structure and finance commercial real estate opportunities throughout the United States, offering structured products including bridge loans, direct equity, preferred equity and mezzanine capital. 

Buying Guidelines for Non-Performing and Sub-Performing

  Product Type 		SFOO, SFNO, 1-4 unit, 5+ Unit Light Industrial / Commercial, Lots, 
                                        Land up to 25 acres, Condos, Townhouse,
                                       Jumbo Loans, DWMH with Land

  Days Past 		        Due 60+ days

  Agency Times 		One +

  LTV 			       Up To 100%

 Lien Types 		Primarily 1st, 2nds will be allowed up to 10% of 2nds
                                       as long as they are mixed in with a pool of 1st.
                                       Only closed end HELOCs.

 Credit 			       N/A

 Demographics       Nationwide

Skills and Expertise
Investment property acquisition, investments, real estate, due diligence,
valuation, real estate transactions, real estate finance, commercial mortgages, CMBS, Bulk REO, non-performing loans, re-performing loans, performing loans, capital formation, capital introduction, syndication, investment marketing, real estate capital, real estate investment banking

Name: DIRIA Real Estate
Description:
Our History
In 1992, a small group of German investors bought the Tamarindo DIRIA beach hotel, which at the time had only 70 rooms.

From the beginning, Wolfgang Gollas, a successful entrepreneur in the fashion industry, was the promoter and leader of the activities that took place around the hotel.

The hotel was expanded to its current size of 242 rooms; the shopping center with 20 stores, 6 restaurants, a casino and a conference center, all together representing the current DIRIA Boulevard.

In the mid-1990s, more land was purchased in and around Tamarindo, with the goal of further developing Tamarindo as a tourist destination. Also the Tamarindo Airport was built.

All these activities were brought together under the name of the “DIRIA Group”.

Currently, the DIRIA Group consists of two main branches:

• Hospitality: “Tamarindo DIRIA Beach Resort” and “Jardín del Eden Boutique Hotel”

• Real Estate

Thanks to its large plots of land and its successful development of residential projects with the best location and quality The DIRIA Group has become the number one developer in the Tamarindo area, with numerous projects that were already completed and many more that are currently in planning (see website of “DIRIA Real Estate”).

As protagonists of the development of the most famous beach resort in Costa Rica, we aspire to keep the principles of sustainability and compatibility with the environment as the main focus of our current and future activities.

In this way, we will be able to pass on the Costa Rican "Pura Vida" lifestyle to many people in the future.

Wolfgang Gollas.

CEO & president

Ми створили Workit, щоб допомогти бізнесам і резидентам розвиватися і формувати сучасну офісну культуру, де робота — в радість, дні — продуктивні, а люди навколо — надихають. 

Ключ до успіху будь-якої компанії — це її співробітники. Ми небайдужі до того, як наші резиденти живуть і працюють. Тому ми створили умови, які допомогають знайти енергію для продуктивного та щасливого життя: влаштовуємо спільні заняття спортом, знаходимо можливості розвивати корисні звички, проводимо цікаві заходи, облаштовуємо робочий простір. 

Для компаній ми розробили гнучкі тарифи, які допомогають їм контролювати фінансові показники, а додаткові сервіси та консалтінг дозволяють зосередитися на тому, що важливо — успішності бізнеса.

Depuis sa création en 2006 à Rennes,  
S’appuyant sur son expérience et son analyse du Marché officinal en évolution constante, le Cabinet Offilia a décidé d’étendre son implantation à Rouen et est rejoint par René Djoubri, comme Associé, animé par les mêmes valeurs au service des Pharmaciens dans une prestation exigeante et par une sélection drastique pour soutenir des projets pérennes.
 
Offilia innove en 2021, s’appuyant sur son taux de réussite pour les officines confiées à la vente, et définit un barème d’honoraires unique avec un contenu de conseils et services inégalé et favoriser les transmissions sécurisées économiquement.
 
Pour les officines dont le prix de cession est inférieur à 3 M€, le taux d’honoraires sera limité jusqu’à 3 % HT pour une mission intégrale et une rédaction des actes à 1 % HT par les Avocats et Notaires spécialisés.
 
Pour les officines dont le prix de cession dépasse 3 M€, le taux d’honoraires sera limité jusqu’à 2.5 % pour une mission intégrale et une rédaction des actes à 0.90% HT par les Avocats et Notaires spécialisés.

Parce que la vente ou l'achat
d'un bien immobilier est souvent le projet d'une vie,
nous nous devons de vous proposer le meilleur.


Parti d'un double constat :
 
Les particuliers souhaitent de moins en moins collaborer avec les agences immobilières car aujourd'hui les commissions semblent de plus en plus difficiles à justifier.

Les ventes entre particuliers sont économiquement avantageuses mais compliquées (vous devez vous transformer en rédacteur en chef, en informaticien, etc.). Consommatrices de temps, elles n'offrent pas toujours toutes les garanties
.
 
Pour y répondre :
 
Nous avons choisi de proposer à nos clients une solution clés en main avec une communication de particuliers à particuliers massive (locale, nationale et internationale), des services de qualités, des offres économiquement transparentes et justifiées. Pour autant, ce n'était pas suffisant pour vous démontrer notre réelle volonté à atteindre vos objectifs.

C'est pour cela que nous avons décidé de nous engager en offrant à nos clients un règlement à la carte (une exclusivité Global MZ COMPANY IMMO).

Escritórios Compartilhados é uma forma inovadora de pensar o ambiente de trabalho. O sucesso se deve a um fator simples: profissionais quem buscam lugares democráticos, onde possam desenvolver seu trabalho e seus projetos, sem as dificuldades ou isolamentos de outros meios de trabalho como o home office e demais espaços públicos. Seu novo escritório está localizado na Av. Paulista, ou seja, no principal centro econômico, financeiro e empresarial do país. Ao lado do MASP (Museu de Arte de São Paulo) e com vista para o Parque Trianon você estará em meio a um dos principais pontos turísticos da cidade de São Paulo e toda estrutura comercial da região. 

> Edifício Requintado:
Os escritórios fazem parte de uma cobertura duplex comercial no requintado Edifício Paulista Corporate, que oferece segurança, estacionamento, área de convivência e portaria 24h.

> Salas de Reunião:
Dispostas em uma cobertura duplex equipada e sofisticada, as salas de reuniões possuem infra-estrutura completa com equipamentos de impressão, mobília moderna e com acessibilidade, internet banda larga com WiFi e acessos via cabo, pontos de energia, tvs, monitores e projetores para reuniões online ou presencial. Name: Real Locacao E Venda De Imoveis
108 梁山 - Fablab x Workspace
Description:
2019年，108梁山，開山。

「有緣千里來相會，無緣對面不相逢。」
創業之路，孤獨、艱苦、難行。除了需要投入大量心機專注業務，還要費神處理人際關係，回報往往難以準確計算，確認不符合大部分香港人「又要馬兒好，又要馬兒不吃草」的期望。
其餘有膽識的香港人，為生存，一生營營役役，又被迫錯過多少機會？
我們深諳此道，召集各路英雄好漢，由創科專才、工廠揸fit人、商界營運老手，務求結合「創新科技」、「⼯業4.0」、「商業營銷」三⼤元素，致力搭建一個真正為不甘平凡的年輕企業家追夢平台，「108梁山」。在此地，不論⼯業技術、⼤型機台操作、⾃動化模組整合、創科資源、廠商網絡以至產品銷售策略，全程有梁山好漢助陣，無私共享資源，創業之路不再孤獨難行。⽩⼿興家？其實唔難。
「不是兄弟你不好，是這世道不乾淨，容不得你這樣做人。」
梁山精神，在於各路英雄好漢，不同背景不同原因，皆聚首一堂，我們只是不認命，誓要完成一番創舉。一齊上梁山，做大事！ 
以下⼈⼠嚴禁上梁⼭。
「這腔熱血，是要賣給識貨的。」
1）懶惰的人。 成功必須苦幹，我們無法拔苗助⻑，你，仍是你事業成功與否的關鍵。
2）半途⽽廢的人。成功的法則是堅持，營商創業從來沒有⼀帆⾵順，但⾃古成功在嘗試，堅持正確的理念才是致勝之道。 請緊記，人一世物一世，至少做過了無憾，好比錯過了後悔。
